The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxk/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: The Supreme Court just put the Left back IN THEIR PLACE!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MACKENZIE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | **The Supreme Court came through. ** And put the Dems in their place! In case you missed it, Democrats in PA were directly violating a ruling by the PA Supreme Court to throw out invalid ballots. This is what the far-left commissioner of Bucks County had to say. “We all know that precedent by a court doesn’t matter anymore in this country... if I violate this law it’s because I want a court to pay attention to it” Well, the court was paying attention. And now they're cracking down on these Dems. The good news is that they stopped counting these bogus ballots. The bad news is that they felt bold enough to count them in the first place. These people need to be **HELD ACCOUNTABLE!** And I’m going to make sure that happens! My name is Ryan Mackenzie. I’m a state representative, smart conservative, proud father, and Trump-endorsed candidate. I just won a hard-fought race to get rid of Pennsylvania's most liberal Congresswoman. And I’m not finished fighting. In a few months, I’ll be on my way to Washington to help Donald Trump **DRAIN THE SWAMP!** And it’s all thanks to patriots like you. But we can’t afford to let 2024 be a lifetime victory. We must do everything we can to make PA a solid red state. And that all starts with holding out-of-control Liberals accountable and bringing **ELECTION INTEGRITY** to the keystone state. I want patriots like you behind me when I champion free and secure elections in D.C. Add your name now and join me in **DEMANDING** election integrity in this country. I’ll be taking this petition with me to Washington on day one and I want your name on the list! It’s not just the right thing to do. It’s what this country deserves!
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z841r93s8p4q4bgonkk5ec1v5rju3t4gha29h698_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaanvgeptbtou061kethbodbjq7g4ojiadguqfs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeb0vuscv80sikpsiv4brkscvdc0nouahb6sjobo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5tq435nkivmte08n4003lu80kmnllglllj7rtc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zarf4q8inokpj3691l6jdr9s35l5lu238855dm80_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt3d9cnf90f423vkdt5b5t6bcqvn8r4jsmnbfko8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpd0a7v7mf304tbq7422pbnq2q457r3l2mm8p660_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqdoet9c6bfait8ip0d451u569s7bnscp1vcgce0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcln7mdbdbg8e8o93h655f695g219h1uo8hu4ce0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0qud8jh4lu3npe0klgf3b67begp510eimdbekb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4bp4sr390nivf6vvl4gja2t7fjfm37g7a1okq9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkm9joftrl1qu5ulq5kdcpr6tlrvtr3p09spai58_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztu31hhoer4o79isju9qnt7dqdh2ac13h538fsig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4dudeepeojpqubo6oseils6g5ntaumgsisb1k88_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm1ob6c5h2bs)
---

---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbo0es182iiorp1r2hjjcrf0dg9a0cffq215o0q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm9pj2c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrs1bl68m1tqainq3rmrehso9u6l0573ompq95u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm9pj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlvcas9op60ru4t4ghjot9kmvg1au0n6k3abvvto_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdgm9pj2c1h2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1u1e4lneebd1411jmlkq7jinsti8rksodjll07o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zj2q775hr3f299c7lh19m0tv8c4m9ojv4q7aegmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zopbkfb3ddlgfv793l7ckno7teef7hj6k54av1ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zivt8qpv20u6q8rsos2tfeiksjun13c1akad2ct0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1l1a6dpqi3k90dtufs2im2812nuo4hlimgungd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zamt5n32b7ar804cr1aj69k9k89bvt5kgug9pr2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7dmhqujegkeefubj673qhrjgeadkn1e51b3nah8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqjasbm29rmeno3hu13mirdbdmu6l70gcovekoh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbmlfb3gfcvakqc4f02vk1qjct9h4equi5uggq0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvhnkafj0vl62ajfag24s3tupuc2v70d7m6ve048_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjvfslpmpjo83h52p7ae4cjn6ulkd1tueiqg9fu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgoqk5n5mt7igi5ecds1d8hb0mt6k0muvtm8gfig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0he6lq0rf315vt8cn09m7pi5n2cb70ovvsbjpm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2sb917jqvvdqltp7bmtfaqms67rigdqvebl6gf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)
---
The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1e9uqh87l1aueakm9lgrnbt2h14abm8rkebmj00_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim0oj2chh2bs)
---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251
---

In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zavqgt85l3nr7aohc8385fiipoh25qd99uk15vmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgq8p5efr6jb3s9u3ijko5kb1lbe5827pnkvv1d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zktd9vu741un31d7qljhifk4vf30l16dfmrio6j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfs74bvppmetk46josq5i5mfoebgkdhonbrdr8n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbvamf17neiatg69ffqk5ukt5ghs3mtlg5f2f0b0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj7chgm6p3246h22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5f3bmreqg525gdiqgv588v74d4epkj1057g08gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Find Daily Encouragement with Our New Devotional
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zabpcn45k41udonlju521j7tv5d3lgs6hnlfrqpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him. | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu23bnlkl9f6u8fblr7atafb8rtlqaj80f2dk7go_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim4o36cjh2bs)
---
| | | | | With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:
* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A Year’s Worth of Faith-Building Devotions—Just for You
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze13crkqdq8prgd1dtpvfuell7l414dt3fnvhmno_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him. | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcc8oeg93kr78amvorhh7su5a9q9arqvinut4i4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)
---
| | | | | With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:
* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.

Request your copy here: [https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5996pj6uvdglon56ihlgtv10evob6a23hkvgcng_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmpvhclssdccbfgc1oovkib6dstqbj7ck2ldd2tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2fusaj31nj3kqv4nfeh3fhtelopbpl8kj2qlit8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbdu16kb4c91ju7q5sa153eju3p37t0tp96jrctg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zut1clqno3gsj985ru8mgklksc9rmhdgmdmb08no_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc8qpatpg47liaq5vgkj8di0qpjgriqli2srr0go_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zol4iiralami5rllk1drle9243fafu0qgro4jvio_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z22b8jmfiu1cs8o9s7kcv3lnfms9ejp9fiinq3io_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron**
---
| | [**DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zht3dskqrvnuq2qrl4j8k1lmb8j4hr80taq3au9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zncg311e9hk97r9v56l4g4sfevla7j13ka106gug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj6ep31cdie48d245p25oh4ctj6cor5cpgecpb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlsh4h348b26fttg6ib42dlhpq30kqokiqcb8hkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimco76clh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6rsi0vkb8mg0ei9sidmr7jk5pgej0ik8ebn9240_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cphmapj0spim49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk4laebbgjb6oltaev5e5iei6tlqejuillp0mse0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zthks5acapp6ug5k7ol259grasbr536sfo03eajo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmch3hdu0m64nkaingji8bc7j53obunvloi6fppg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgm3ota12bjlngaiusemd020hdvcs52pjaumtqv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans

The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6flbgnla090vndcduob5t9pqpd4qpkl97pgarm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbqsntagi3rkp4tra1m2oflcgv7f0rcjddmhq3e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zujbcb66l48k4opq69ro5aujnd1cnoghquajrt28_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr3vmvi560jppvm3ingokrsk87tbvr5hpcurhj80_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhinc2fedr9c08i16vpfo14plin2q1fuq0obmo08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3lq13hauk37ui5ojvnhs190j5eckfqjau1d0fhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqb7ka0ripp1mpu388b8venbfm2l7j2tuiblae4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron**
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkfjgk8e0trh2o3vmrutr5alkvpt8ck6m7jrtcq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcbgrf1pfpahb100e18h517kd57mvp3ol0h6qpug_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zitpquodr7gu30175mg6a0gi47q5aal9uuvb08bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvqsadeiqkeukd2ribeor4dfippjrtrn3bmaog5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq9m3njmdeecdnp8kf6vbdl921e46d1s04o5qrhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdl9c4jfmfvb9ui25v0u7a4gn1mfpibc62is877o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmaaaornfn3plbvqfc6t7jqr9emc1g8r2kt108b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbjva7debsi486em4736bb9d26i7itc7fenr6hc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqkngg80vc4rnh75op1ifb3i14er0eolak5nd230_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpvb0hpgk3hventbh9pacsl8hnd41tshjqkepdp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp6lklmbg2ploehe7hq4kfaiotbfks1olq0v3c20_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z77sbipjo8nufd9redpp21hos3tdtkqpa8fec35g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1bvdj3plkb5u1k7glp965cnam5d0bf8re5sdi8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim2pr2cph2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---

---

And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuln1vd313ugcq5egoabqriqjo94pkregfa7rkq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimaor4cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6tg3bklr1ifuhsdlgmk63d6a9uoi95nktni0fk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimaor4cph2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl4q60p92as2ilvtveidv7g65slf8o04n9a08nmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimaor4cph2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi3ggfcmbta7563p1snbp9njvlmo0q7dovuf68t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimaor4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm8ob7c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdcvl1mbc0v2mksrb341i4pjiadgmd3cplhjraa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimaor4cph2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhj84cbea91a11ud4l7b2f5hrboko0o1nqnhosto_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cphmapb3chj649fg)
