name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Support Christian Legal Defense
body:
This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it!

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh37n86vdd6rj2tq4c60o6t4h9st1sqolvounk20_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlo0gev47e8rn569msgcqlbtu4m4in60msndjtoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp6bp9taql36df8hbrjtjs6v74u8i3r2vg5cr800_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsbjmo1bpe62flt1no9q6j899ros0gq1ondfr8ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zol40e1jbn80sqlucele233u90oc967t0nrtgu98_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh894ed415tsil2e7msk4svh8hnqbil9fkmev6fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2fa4bgdsb7pcrruuidd61rfktv5ajgqtoiniqrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)
---
Christian Legal Society
P.O. Box 7712
McLean, VA 22106-7712
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zee7e2628q96ui17p754mjge916f6ni4t8vil9b0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj6ep31ctge48d245p25oh4ctj6cor5ctgm0p724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze1aku33s86s9edth2pqmppn03qeer72egfsdt60_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdimeob0cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2gql98le8anasj0sv3u9o5v6qbuqima88rpltkg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cphmapr1c1ie49fg)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is corrupting our kids
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdfe8gj9u7p9fi06hb88ni5mb32dj4q4jabp58q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z95th8eldpijp40toril0v6pc9u8gd62dp5vi5kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf5e7gmn1tcng2hdmdd61r7gudsu72f9ku7qqcp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8v8n3ubjlbkp09423kvh5m14r4lp5d4db6oe318_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z00jc1m2q8bukfkb6mtqfsqm8h3v8lshjci4gb0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2j9plu974i142g6lpmi7fjr4g8ql15ohj460lf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbnpf5v6p5smk19pgf1eeck12m4cj54fr2i97550_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cdim1pj4c9h2bs)
---

clean_body: Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best , Marcus Welby , M.D. , and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will receive: ** All ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ** And a FREE copy of my children's book:Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Take Hillsdale College’s CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbmu2zAQRb-G6iRw01awMCArjZcgKVISlDiSCXARSMqB_z5Qnv0Br507uHMO5s9VXpWxxq835UAsNsqYpFfyYawt55jLtMdnaYNfJcWUl4SWuJOk0AKTXnNegCAtY02NMSbFQ_CGaz5Bx1vFFCGdamm_kBYmaAhfSF8YcfQQijvc8YaRSpGOMQUYT33d0alGHCsLMVdLBNDBKa-tmSDmV4QtxFzNwRVWPHLeEmInREdER-OXUB3MSSsLFegd0fGDD69jiY1pRmzApG7pDVNOL_g03Ifz-TeizZ6dTGGPMyA2bDGkDeZs_PqOHGizO8QGcMrY93BWblNm9YgNc8yfQ19R8Bl8Rmy43G8_5M9TOV5-lR_xIgq9_TXWmtS0iOP1KP2vlb_xgaeg_wIAAP__uP6OKg)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbmu2zAQRb-G6iRw01awMCArjZcgKVISlDiSCXARSMqB_z5Qnv0Br507uHMO5s9VXpWxxq835UAsNsqYpFfyYawt55jLtMdnaYNfJcWUl4SWuJOk0AKTXnNegCAtY02NMSbFQ_CGaz5Bx1vFFCGdamm_kBYmaAhfSF8YcfQQijvc8YaRSpGOMQUYT33d0alGHCsLMVdLBNDBKa-tmSDmV4QtxFzNwRVWPHLeEmInREdER-OXUB3MSSsLFegd0fGDD69jiY1pRmzApG7pDVNOL_g03Ifz-TeizZ6dTGGPMyA2bDGkDeZs_PqOHGizO8QGcMrY93BWblNm9YgNc8yfQ19R8Bl8Rmy43G8_5M9TOV5-lR_xIgq9_TXWmtS0iOP1KP2vlb_xgaeg_wIAAP__uP6OKg)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbmu2zAQRb-G6iRw01awMCArjZcgKVISlDiSCXARSMqB_z5Qnv0Br507uHMO5s9VXpWxxq835UAsNsqYpFfyYawt55jLtMdnaYNfJcWUl4SWuJOk0AKTXnNegCAtY02NMSbFQ_CGaz5Bx1vFFCGdamm_kBYmaAhfSF8YcfQQijvc8YaRSpGOMQUYT33d0alGHCsLMVdLBNDBKa-tmSDmV4QtxFzNwRVWPHLeEmInREdER-OXUB3MSSsLFegd0fGDD69jiY1pRmzApG7pDVNOL_g03Ifz-TeizZ6dTGGPMyA2bDGkDeZs_PqOHGizO8QGcMrY93BWblNm9YgNc8yfQ19R8Bl8Rmy43G8_5M9TOV5-lR_xIgq9_TXWmtS0iOP1KP2vlb_xgaeg_wIAAP__uP6OKg)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbmu2zAQRb-G6iRw01awMCArjZcgKVISlDiSCXARSMqB_z5Qnv0Br507uHMO5s9VXpWxxq835UAsNsqYpFfyYawt55jLtMdnaYNfJcWUl4SWuJOk0AKTXnNegCAtY02NMSbFQ_CGaz5Bx1vFFCGdamm_kBYmaAhfSF8YcfQQijvc8YaRSpGOMQUYT33d0alGHCsLMVdLBNDBKa-tmSDmV4QtxFzNwRVWPHLeEmInREdER-OXUB3MSSsLFegd0fGDD69jiY1pRmzApG7pDVNOL_g03Ifz-TeizZ6dTGGPMyA2bDGkDeZs_PqOHGizO8QGcMrY93BWblNm9YgNc8yfQ19R8Bl8Rmy43G8_5M9TOV5-lR_xIgq9_TXWmtS0iOP1KP2vlb_xgaeg_wIAAP__uP6OKg)

clean_body: I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country. This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link: | | Freedom Liberty Report PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _ `

name: Homesteading Handbook
subject: BLM Curfew
body:
Besides for the sheer chaos and violence in the streets...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19319/6374453/a12d029133a3c855abc647b69fa57ac5f44fb610/2c1caaedaa7b4eff9ee6ffbc8f5cb844c513e18e)
---
| | |
---
_December 8th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
Patriot,

Remember when BLM thugs ransacked Los Angeles and burned Rodeo drive to the ground...

...but the cops did nothing!?

Curfew started at 6 p.m.

So besides for the sheer chaos and violence in the streets...

You weren't even allowed to go to the grocery store (if it wasn't already looted).

The soft-on-crime urban politicians simply didn't care if you ran out of food and water.

Which is why I wrote the new book: [Back to Basics: The Homesteading Guide to Self-Sufficiency and Sustainable Living](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19319/6374453/a12d029133a3c855abc647b69fa57ac5f44fb610/2c1caaedaa7b4eff9ee6ffbc8f5cb844c513e18e)

Because I don't want there to be a "next time" without food or water.

But more than that: If you want plump, juicy vegetables, fresh water on demand, and succulent all-natural BBQ ribs... then my [Back to Basics Homesteading book will show you exactly how to become a self-reliant and impervious master of your own land...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19319/6374453/a12d029133a3c855abc647b69fa57ac5f44fb610/2c1caaedaa7b4eff9ee6ffbc8f5cb844c513e18e) free from the incompetence of our pathetic politicians and corporate elitist class...

Even if you've never heard of homesteading, have no idea where to start, or have already dabbled into the hobby...

...you'll find the secrets I reveal in Back to Basics to be truly life changing.

Besides, most people pay $47 for a copy—[but if you were lucky enough to run into this message, then consider this the time that fate turned in your favor.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19319/6374453/a12d029133a3c855abc647b69fa57ac5f44fb610/2c1caaedaa7b4eff9ee6ffbc8f5cb844c513e18e)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU2L2zAQQH-NfFOQZmRZOfiQXcehLCnFh5SehD4mXhF_Idvbv1_S7t57fTyGeTM_r_bq0pCm_rsbqX6EbPNqfbQ-uw_iMbueLzlFsiBAcQlcGCuLWMdj0E4XVMsKUZcSEIr3WmCUWimEyijhw9Fro8y9lK5UMaCkItXPORKEEUdVSXmI4IODUpWVNl6DYUq4gfJ2eBAtYZ76TOuaadn9kIKbDmEei6F-37ZlZXhi0DJoVwp7poObKM7b02DQ_tvfz_NjZdBWR10Jj5rjHQ1XZYzcgArcSR-iQB2CvzNs922067znQAybl-bCu_ONgX7ikWLaR4bN-fpJghsXl_qJYfPZhPalO93O9tvl8st255v9ceJvr92XP08bTRvD5u21419nKHIdl99pGNKqK6ZEP7o0_K3c_vsbHzX8CQAA__9c2YyU)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU2L2zAQQH-NfFOQZmRZOfiQXcehLCnFh5SehD4mXhF_Idvbv1_S7t57fTyGeTM_r_bq0pCm_rsbqX6EbPNqfbQ-uw_iMbueLzlFsiBAcQlcGCuLWMdj0E4XVMsKUZcSEIr3WmCUWimEyijhw9Fro8y9lK5UMaCkItXPORKEEUdVSXmI4IODUpWVNl6DYUq4gfJ2eBAtYZ76TOuaadn9kIKbDmEei6F-37ZlZXhi0DJoVwp7poObKM7b02DQ_tvfz_NjZdBWR10Jj5rjHQ1XZYzcgArcSR-iQB2CvzNs922067znQAybl-bCu_ONgX7ikWLaR4bN-fpJghsXl_qJYfPZhPalO93O9tvl8st255v9ceJvr92XP08bTRvD5u21419nKHIdl99pGNKqK6ZEP7o0_K3c_vsbHzX8CQAA__9c2YyU)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU2L2zAQQH-NfFOQZmRZOfiQXcehLCnFh5SehD4mXhF_Idvbv1_S7t57fTyGeTM_r_bq0pCm_rsbqX6EbPNqfbQ-uw_iMbueLzlFsiBAcQlcGCuLWMdj0E4XVMsKUZcSEIr3WmCUWimEyijhw9Fro8y9lK5UMaCkItXPORKEEUdVSXmI4IODUpWVNl6DYUq4gfJ2eBAtYZ76TOuaadn9kIKbDmEei6F-37ZlZXhi0DJoVwp7poObKM7b02DQ_tvfz_NjZdBWR10Jj5rjHQ1XZYzcgArcSR-iQB2CvzNs922067znQAybl-bCu_ONgX7ikWLaR4bN-fpJghsXl_qJYfPZhPalO93O9tvl8st255v9ceJvr92XP08bTRvD5u21419nKHIdl99pGNKqK6ZEP7o0_K3c_vsbHzX8CQAA__9c2YyU) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU2L2zAQQH-NfFOQZmRZOfiQXcehLCnFh5SehD4mXhF_Idvbv1_S7t57fTyGeTM_r_bq0pCm_rsbqX6EbPNqfbQ-uw_iMbueLzlFsiBAcQlcGCuLWMdj0E4XVMsKUZcSEIr3WmCUWimEyijhw9Fro8y9lK5UMaCkItXPORKEEUdVSXmI4IODUpWVNl6DYUq4gfJ2eBAtYZ76TOuaadn9kIKbDmEei6F-37ZlZXhi0DJoVwp7poObKM7b02DQ_tvfz_NjZdBWR10Jj5rjHQ1XZYzcgArcSR-iQB2CvzNs922067znQAybl-bCu_ONgX7ikWLaR4bN-fpJghsXl_qJYfPZhPalO93O9tvl8st255v9ceJvr92XP08bTRvD5u21419nKHIdl99pGNKqK6ZEP7o0_K3c_vsbHzX8CQAA__9c2YyU)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU2L2zAQQH-NfFOQZmRZOfiQXcehLCnFh5SehD4mXhF_Idvbv1_S7t57fTyGeTM_r_bq0pCm_rsbqX6EbPNqfbQ-uw_iMbueLzlFsiBAcQlcGCuLWMdj0E4XVMsKUZcSEIr3WmCUWimEyijhw9Fro8y9lK5UMaCkItXPORKEEUdVSXmI4IODUpWVNl6DYUq4gfJ2eBAtYZ76TOuaadn9kIKbDmEei6F-37ZlZXhi0DJoVwp7poObKM7b02DQ_tvfz_NjZdBWR10Jj5rjHQ1XZYzcgArcSR-iQB2CvzNs922067znQAybl-bCu_ONgX7ikWLaR4bN-fpJghsXl_qJYfPZhPalO93O9tvl8st255v9ceJvr92XP08bTRvD5u21419nKHIdl99pGNKqK6ZEP7o0_K3c_vsbHzX8CQAA__9c2YyU)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU2L2zAQQH-NfFOQZmRZOfiQXcehLCnFh5SehD4mXhF_Idvbv1_S7t57fTyGeTM_r_bq0pCm_rsbqX6EbPNqfbQ-uw_iMbueLzlFsiBAcQlcGCuLWMdj0E4XVMsKUZcSEIr3WmCUWimEyijhw9Fro8y9lK5UMaCkItXPORKEEUdVSXmI4IODUpWVNl6DYUq4gfJ2eBAtYZ76TOuaadn9kIKbDmEei6F-37ZlZXhi0DJoVwp7poObKM7b02DQ_tvfz_NjZdBWR10Jj5rjHQ1XZYzcgArcSR-iQB2CvzNs922067znQAybl-bCu_ONgX7ikWLaR4bN-fpJghsXl_qJYfPZhPalO93O9tvl8st255v9ceJvr92XP08bTRvD5u21419nKHIdl99pGNKqK6ZEP7o0_K3c_vsbHzX8CQAA__9c2YyU)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---

name: Chairman Steve Daines
subject: What a great victory we had, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

none of our success happens without you

body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.

There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ddfaad28534c1fbea7384711db9a28&_e=gtDZAuYSzItYX-7mJkrp9RUAJts8FwsDVj1VWDQSiMBigEo1k4AxQc9Pu5fqz6FDnf_pHWt3dI8z5ogp9MQsF14G_q1j-tanfOSSWWP8c5owzZjGu4yXht0aqkoWqwoJahtrPPFhf-YzmyiPuJo3E2l53ThpB4Sj_hzUOC6IDAP2e-QZP1n3HrOc9y2N0dGFXWG0h21th2msp8uWWgvcGLfvUnjjd_C1gWWmsNDvLz4S1qfbxMpVr0X5hGPeDmaDHZSrp7wilEC2QZe1U4wZ7w_404LIS1muf3_lIU0harpXcXWH3PZ7EUh8_er5yP02HRDJ6dpZ0BsCEvKh7V3XSISAzTH8tf2V8JcFOFVOmbQ3uLcust0I9x1beH0_3qHEKRgNZcH-X5K8oCXYM3qldA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.
---
Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.
---
According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_ , **_“she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.”_**
---
How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard _facts_.
---
_But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free._
---
**“‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee”**
---
[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]
---
When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as **Inmate Number _P01135780_**.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ddfaad28534c1fbea7384711db9a28&_e=gtDZAuYSzItYX-7mJkrp9RUAJts8FwsDVj1VWDQSiMBigEo1k4AxQc9Pu5fqz6FDnf_pHWt3dI8z5ogp9MQsF14G_q1j-tanfOSSWWP8c5owzZjGu4yXht0aqkoWqwoJahtrPPFhf-YzmyiPuJo3E2l53ThpB4Sj_hzUOC6IDAP2e-QZP1n3HrOc9y2N0dGFXWG0h21th2msp8uWWgvcGLfvUnjjd_C1gWWmsNDvLz5yYyEtAKy6Tl5vnmfXjEl58YtMs0_G2vgxRGTbpSpyf64WyKkUuBpzXCjFExZ1IVG0t143tndY_kY1ssDEK-G4CiRMZD6e7vKasazEd2bGsXJypsGwOBD_QM6uter4aikLjmdTGkBceFNGDTCUseRgpV0wiKPQClDjj1wtRCeAIA%3D%3D)
__
---
**In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.”**
---
And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!
---
_(Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please don’t even think twice!)_
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ddfaad28534c1fbea7384711db9a28&_e=gtDZAuYSzItYX-7mJkrp9RUAJts8FwsDVj1VWDQSiMBigEo1k4AxQc9Pu5fqz6FDnf_pHWt3dI8z5ogp9MQsF14G_q1j-tanfOSSWWP8c5owzZjGu4yXht0aqkoWqwoJahtrPPFhf-YzmyiPuJo3E2l53ThpB4Sj_hzUOC6IDAP2e-QZP1n3HrOc9y2N0dGFXWG0h21th2msp8uWWgvcGLfvUnjjd_C1gWWmsNDvLz7Qr4Fcj_mtcXvBsyoTUWA-6rDO61gc5PoQq5VPvmX75v2EN0xoeAFr-2jkPvyuHkzZNqe0cFe1ZR9TXPkdoiVYK5knlDLyYXjKwhZoi6TuXBYL2TfXSK5S2H0D6d7r-nr5RbtTe0bG6ASKwXob5mn9hsssjvbw3iXuTRFLfvEdDw%3D%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Take Hillsdale College’s CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c03e6a66f534f7ea1279bebcaed4064&_e=L0lX-ZfJ7xLhA-_0V6_5rdD4cmgBuk6wjeu-5TWmuLhW6VdKZszDUBf43XNYT2_fQ8dolM6APhtM45XqDcju-px8n1XP4vD0LRMt25ft_sxrTzAUivr1eYjuwSQx68Bn4YFpikl_wJ0wXjfuQm0YJ7CeifrIKVmwtmwDlFMskREpwykN_UOO7hiVA2P8cp5jKU-Citu1qj0vLIQVVuU1sUMiVTtZPKEOfx6_OTHICKPq03s9dH2u2cqPeyXw0rFZ55MRMHQERk7XDvrMS-M3F0idLCYcfYInjaWP9nqyLINmCltYQlwfpFsMVKlzuRGEreOfsdNy4FxVBIdI6ukmM2nPEENi8niVIDPe1McEDOX8OhauBkuYnZa3lEn2_fHq)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c03e6a66f534f7ea1279bebcaed4064&_e=L0lX-ZfJ7xLhA-_0V6_5rdD4cmgBuk6wjeu-5TWmuLhW6VdKZszDUBf43XNYT2_fQ8dolM6APhtM45XqDcju-px8n1XP4vD0LRMt25ft_sxrTzAUivr1eYjuwSQx68Bn4YFpikl_wJ0wXjfuQm0YJ7CeifrIKVmwtmwDlFMskREpwykN_UOO7hiVA2P8cp5jKU-Citu1qj0vLIQVVuU1sUMiVTtZPKEOfx6_OTHICKNGr82tYKl__uF45L12qbCH86aa5ZiFpeSnFW2nhhdmg2Aee9zFpaPkSLupIxIQ2c_0q9N-2_uy3PLRud4hy8h1RPI6e3EpcoIU6xfUXm0or65izU0VRlqBM9hqwomr5SvY8nA2bH3znGqsqfF15mDp)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsNEsyxWN0

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osNEsyxWN0

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I'm
reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your 2025
Hillsdale College calendar.

I know, I
know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since
you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you
had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

Claim
your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before December 31 by
clicking on this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63976359:sNEsyxWN0:m:3:2532013465:7090D4248ADDC3D346E3D2E5AE56E4A1:r

As you
know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism.
You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled
by an administrative state that operates without the say of our
elected representatives.

It is,
therefore, completely unaccountable to "we the people."

This
collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the
federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where
you live!

One
particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools…

At these
schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and
actively undermine parents.

In higher
education-especially at taxpayer-funded state
universities-bloated administrations push ideologies that teach
young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But
thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting
influence. We stay true to our mission…

…to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings
of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed,

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: We need your voice to make a difference.
body:
We’ve developed a range of impactful projects and content aimed at driving change during the off-year and leading into the midterms. Your insights on these initiatives would be instrumental in keeping our base informed and motivated.
| | | | | |
---
|
---
folks, To truly make an impact, we need your voice. Moving forward isn’t just about taking action—it’s about listening and learning together. That’s why we’re reaching out to ask for your input through a brief survey. Your voice is vital in helping us improve and chart the best path forward. By taking a few minutes to complete this short survey, you’ll help us:

* Focus on the issues that matter most to our communities.
* Create opportunities for involvement that align with your passions.
* Build on big ideas that drive real change at the grassroots level.

Your feedback will shape the future of our movement as we head into the midterms. Together, we can create a stronger, more connected force for change. Will you take a moment to share your thoughts?
---
| [Share your input to shape the future!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vo78h-mo1cpx-kyd76rh9/)
---
Thank you for your time and commitment. -The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| | | | |
---
__ONE__ donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in __EVERY__ major battleground. **Maximize your impact this cycle →** **No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003

|

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGL3CAYhn-NuRn0-4wmhxxmm8lS2ClLClt6EmPMrK3G4Dgt-fdlS-fe6wPvC8_z7aIvxge_Xb-Y6Pocdb7pedF2NYHatB80HnRO6acGBoJyoKzVvFp62YFqeeV6rhBlo4Ri1XtvVyYM8pk5wZpW8mWGVSoE26zYAMjK9x8_HFjLmVAItVg6B0o1fBFm7awkgmW33-fgrdmi-ZGyL0e9uVKF_r2U_UbwRGAkMJrNLanUwc8ul8O6rbhcp3wlMEowDYO2pSt2kgrmWtqBWCl2DhuHnRJKERzvJepbumfrCA5PwzOdzm8E5AeObvH3SHA4X_4Ra-Ju_HUjOPxV4MD00_CsP42nFz19fjl_f_3KGdPT-U2_nuj02BVLcJgu9OFd5X7Zf_sQ_E0qItg1Gh9qm2JV_jv_rx7-BAAA___-SYT0)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGL3CAYhn-NuRn0-4wmhxxmm8lS2ClLClt6EmPMrK3G4Dgt-fdlS-fe6wPvC8_z7aIvxge_Xb-Y6Pocdb7pedF2NYHatB80HnRO6acGBoJyoKzVvFp62YFqeeV6rhBlo4Ri1XtvVyYM8pk5wZpW8mWGVSoE26zYAMjK9x8_HFjLmVAItVg6B0o1fBFm7awkgmW33-fgrdmi-ZGyL0e9uVKF_r2U_UbwRGAkMJrNLanUwc8ul8O6rbhcp3wlMEowDYO2pSt2kgrmWtqBWCl2DhuHnRJKERzvJepbumfrCA5PwzOdzm8E5AeObvH3SHA4X_4Ra-Ju_HUjOPxV4MD00_CsP42nFz19fjl_f_3KGdPT-U2_nuj02BVLcJgu9OFd5X7Zf_sQ_E0qItg1Gh9qm2JV_jv_rx7-BAAA___-SYT0)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGL3CAYhn-NuRn0-4wmhxxmm8lS2ClLClt6EmPMrK3G4Dgt-fdlS-fe6wPvC8_z7aIvxge_Xb-Y6Pocdb7pedF2NYHatB80HnRO6acGBoJyoKzVvFp62YFqeeV6rhBlo4Ri1XtvVyYM8pk5wZpW8mWGVSoE26zYAMjK9x8_HFjLmVAItVg6B0o1fBFm7awkgmW33-fgrdmi-ZGyL0e9uVKF_r2U_UbwRGAkMJrNLanUwc8ul8O6rbhcp3wlMEowDYO2pSt2kgrmWtqBWCl2DhuHnRJKERzvJepbumfrCA5PwzOdzm8E5AeObvH3SHA4X_4Ra-Ju_HUjOPxV4MD00_CsP42nFz19fjl_f_3KGdPT-U2_nuj02BVLcJgu9OFd5X7Zf_sQ_E0qItg1Gh9qm2JV_jv_rx7-BAAA___-SYT0)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGL3CAYhn-NuRn0-4wmhxxmm8lS2ClLClt6EmPMrK3G4Dgt-fdlS-fe6wPvC8_z7aIvxge_Xb-Y6Pocdb7pedF2NYHatB80HnRO6acGBoJyoKzVvFp62YFqeeV6rhBlo4Ri1XtvVyYM8pk5wZpW8mWGVSoE26zYAMjK9x8_HFjLmVAItVg6B0o1fBFm7awkgmW33-fgrdmi-ZGyL0e9uVKF_r2U_UbwRGAkMJrNLanUwc8ul8O6rbhcp3wlMEowDYO2pSt2kgrmWtqBWCl2DhuHnRJKERzvJepbumfrCA5PwzOdzm8E5AeObvH3SHA4X_4Ra-Ju_HUjOPxV4MD00_CsP42nFz19fjl_f_3KGdPT-U2_nuj02BVLcJgu9OFd5X7Zf_sQ_E0qItg1Gh9qm2JV_jv_rx7-BAAA___-SYT0) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGL3CAYhn-NuRn0-4wmhxxmm8lS2ClLClt6EmPMrK3G4Dgt-fdlS-fe6wPvC8_z7aIvxge_Xb-Y6Pocdb7pedF2NYHatB80HnRO6acGBoJyoKzVvFp62YFqeeV6rhBlo4Ri1XtvVyYM8pk5wZpW8mWGVSoE26zYAMjK9x8_HFjLmVAItVg6B0o1fBFm7awkgmW33-fgrdmi-ZGyL0e9uVKF_r2U_UbwRGAkMJrNLanUwc8ul8O6rbhcp3wlMEowDYO2pSt2kgrmWtqBWCl2DhuHnRJKERzvJepbumfrCA5PwzOdzm8E5AeObvH3SHA4X_4Ra-Ju_HUjOPxV4MD00_CsP42nFz19fjl_f_3KGdPT-U2_nuj02BVLcJgu9OFd5X7Zf_sQ_E0qItg1Gh9qm2JV_jv_rx7-BAAA___-SYT0)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It’s not about swimming, it’s about God’s Truth
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc9q3DAYxJ9GvslI32f98cGHTb0OC9kS1pDSk9BK8kbUtoylbcnbly3pPdcfMwMz8-NszjbOcb19t0voYs5mz-bqjZvsTF3aPug1pV8GGDSUA2Xa8Mp3AriedBU6rhClaJHx6r2TXCK2En2jJuQWQCsugrBiQuRcXqvYPXI4MM2ZABS1bxwqb1XjdKuRc9Kw--ZtCXVcc_Qhu5S2Lc2xRJfrtN-quXsvZcsEDwQGAoNdg0-lnuM17OXDhbWE_SEkMEiwgoHWdMJW0oYFTVtoJoptQBGwVY1SBId7WUxO990Fgv1T_0wvxzcC8oGX4ON9Idgfz5_E2WWz8bYS7P9V4cDMU_9svg2HF3M5vRx_vo6cMXM5vpnXAz2N46exOIL9aRzp_wWqvfPbnzjPMUtFGnZbbJxrl5aqfPGG3x38DQAA__8J-Ibg)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|

clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u55xHO630haPHqlHKHfc8w~~/AARclAA~~)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
