And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. ~ With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! ~, you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. ~ , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!~ , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.~ Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift ~ Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. ~ God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, ~ Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." ~ | | | | | ~ The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | ~ PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uz0haaCc_tFTYJ1HUmk9YQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOBKcP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwOFcDc3BjQgpnVSZ7VWd0sUuxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uz0haaCc_tFTYJ1HUmk9YQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOBKcP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwOFcDc3BjQgpnVSZ7VWd0sUuxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uz0haaCc_tFTYJ1HUmk9YQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOBKcP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwOFcDc3BjQgpnVSZ7VWd0sUuxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uz0haaCc_tFTYJ1HUmk9YQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOBKcP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwOFcDc3BjQgpnVSZ7VWd0sUuxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KHfKNdLcXsOR3V-Lvro_8A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOBKcP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdVJntVZ3SxS7FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7vP_c8rL7ki9DNDivw40dw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOBKcP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnVSZ7VWd0sUuxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Take Hillsdale College’s CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38537ec366204cfcb2d453401468c487&_e=VY1etIAaNRrjSd50ml91Pdg2jQsOl4wgnidMZf2jGFN5LXmSkczzXJ4-reGaZe27wssfgB6rgghKW_Fda2XMk45uO1jgIZC_wlDMmBdOtf0nCv30MehQ3jrJ5bL9-xFx6nJuvFPSxo9qVHy1ZErEAiV8w-fzNVZ5OAfBbpSC5vtgKMnUAgNprlKUdVFeR6CNsdJ_19Zw4t_BrATVsfUycrHWF2rIka9xF3FXDiBk4Snz3SSkOlw1GGVJjq3OvXb79GUmgJBNwtTsMZlVoXG9Z9Oylbva2zI6ObhlGYcfeRTaCD6xdiA834eAUnD6BB5TE1wn-kBGXKGX-Ey-tSirRqMXYfA81OYRMF5_OFR-336cFWtTfOliRzHZECnAN6K-)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38537ec366204cfcb2d453401468c487&_e=VY1etIAaNRrjSd50ml91Pdg2jQsOl4wgnidMZf2jGFN5LXmSkczzXJ4-reGaZe27wssfgB6rgghKW_Fda2XMk45uO1jgIZC_wlDMmBdOtf0nCv30MehQ3jrJ5bL9-xFx6nJuvFPSxo9qVHy1ZErEAiV8w-fzNVZ5OAfBbpSC5vtgKMnUAgNprlKUdVFeR6CNsdJ_19Zw4t_BrATVsfUycrHWF2rIka9xF3FXDiBk4SkXyavdKGMv1dGsK0hfNUT89L7xBgIZ4_kpzTK5uFXyB4eOZJ0v2FNCk7bjFrzIw0XIO2XGxhCFhsn6vLU4TJLfehOST6_uNNtRSVHRAc-oUiLx38qJ9DsX7-Ce6L_fTNuuhqbWDEETNRUT0ZFWh46c)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38537ec366204cfcb2d453401468c487&_e=VY1etIAaNRrjSd50ml91Pdg2jQsOl4wgnidMZf2jGFN5LXmSkczzXJ4-reGaZe27wssfgB6rgghKW_Fda2XMk45uO1jgIZC_wlDMmBdOtf0nCv30MehQ3jrJ5bL9-xFx6nJuvFPSxo9qVHy1ZErEAiV8w-fzNVZ5OAfBbpSC5vtgKMnUAgNprlKUdVFeR6CNsdJ_19Zw4t_BrATVsfUycrHWF2rIka9xF3FXDiBk4SnzJx9xz1jB1wcHK5lOCO7brSzbILEgbFoQIN7lwkdT82gyKypxIzW_qe5_plUXWVkxfpeDJKVJaiOr6yeJ8vpUN494DYIU3t_sFQnFUMAfbykQx8avo0PQ-zbtaIHIPkdqW26bb88bPXno9uIX870u)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38537ec366204cfcb2d453401468c487&_e=VY1etIAaNRrjSd50ml91Pdg2jQsOl4wgnidMZf2jGFN5LXmSkczzXJ4-reGaZe27wssfgB6rgghKW_Fda2XMk45uO1jgIZC_wlDMmBdOtf0nCv30MehQ3jrJ5bL9-xFx6nJuvFPSxo9qVHy1ZErEAiV8w-fzNVZ5OAfBbpSC5vtgKMnUAgNprlKUdVFeR6CNsdJ_19Zw4t_BrATVsfUycrHWF2rIka9xF3FXDiBk4Sn6gIjGNh3KGgKkcSUtHuo8bxiKf9nZrerVLzkQ8fv_GuJhEks9l0h6Oc8Ojt-WMo-H7khXaken9vTB-dw954sFfpZhmMlO4SdlWYkeRTbGcY_-00vDwx5Lt6gJZi16Glug17PPZ_qzJudBx-mHV3-W)
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=38537ec366204cfcb2d453401468c487&_t=fPrLnYf2sXAoHAHcg3_hu3JwnnM59oJVaHsDrdy2RNenLuebB2RuFvYM8qZZF4L8HOZx39IXq9SAYoLrLr4luuKLRtsKioa2SLHfXfNk5ty-Ke4KDuoYX-fZ9fW8IIdgDrTj58PcbwD9iZLIoqSSbi3RDGHxvfk83WeN9qjqROU%3D)

subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |

| |

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df325db4731445a1a1e044153b4d8df8&_e=YeC8nMSTLitZcN6kLzo3WsIglmr4NWJskgAGtrSuTJB2eGF6teZaFEespN_1EgJ2gr_WnmubiKDtB8NMK4jH5DC1phcK8EX62jY-vleMQlhVwgITdMzS0SOO80GKWRp6SlepQT-KEY8NEF6u7X41kBU7otNR71UhxctsmYW0hcc8NMYiamZEBcQDVPwf6VPiRZt65qoSSwb4QhTwYlNtAs2qcNTYWjd8fz_qbr9517s2_BRDy2LZUM8Sj44IbH6GHq_Z8LWMQfEA4IdcT_mGKUv6m63TMvMzXrBOseXF0osNgqEvsAmKFXHIFnbN6-3eBnToa2Ce5LaF6SnSoLYkAAUsnMkDREZ-TrCjrlfuEgkvDvzWnNcMCeUT9LHlKOQlf5VmTjbsnGRC6FJDUuDi7Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df325db4731445a1a1e044153b4d8df8&_e=YeC8nMSTLitZcN6kLzo3WsIglmr4NWJskgAGtrSuTJB2eGF6teZaFEespN_1EgJ2gr_WnmubiKDtB8NMK4jH5DC1phcK8EX62jY-vleMQlhVwgITdMzS0SOO80GKWRp6SlepQT-KEY8NEF6u7X41kBU7otNR71UhxctsmYW0hcc8NMYiamZEBcQDVPwf6VPiRZt65qoSSwb4QhTwYlNtAs2qcNTYWjd8fz_qbr9517s2_BRDy2LZUM8Sj44IbH6GWrGy_ximYQ5htVHHq5h39IivnnXV7k9FC5vmzXcF09j8qEBKTvGqAE0HqYs-JDVQblZTPujZorFjzVOnsM3XLwMKuBxj_1d1zboUdyC5wSYOavys7a5TcXpnv843tkjqCMYHQjXcecGY5fUafotPzQ%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df325db4731445a1a1e044153b4d8df8&_e=YeC8nMSTLitZcN6kLzo3WsIglmr4NWJskgAGtrSuTJB2eGF6teZaFEespN_1EgJ2gr_WnmubiKDtB8NMK4jH5DC1phcK8EX62jY-vleMQlhVwgITdMzS0SOO80GKWRp6SlepQT-KEY8NEF6u7X41kBU7otNR71UhxctsmYW0hcc8NMYiamZEBcQDVPwf6VPiRZt65qoSSwb4QhTwYlNtAs2qcNTYWjd8fz_qbr9517s2_BRDy2LZUM8Sj44IbH6Go_FdMvIZPpBb_6Je1XxzS5Zq6FJVjnYz1coCFnzYbnWqPFD7cT0aVuu6hCeV88Oyfjp_qd8vJyHiK16vsao6Mn1J9RmYJ-JI8I_5E_Ee3WPT3CU4MfcvAZD-JNxFGj0_0lghKUw38jklfF9QeVLSxQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df325db4731445a1a1e044153b4d8df8&_e=YeC8nMSTLitZcN6kLzo3WsIglmr4NWJskgAGtrSuTJB2eGF6teZaFEespN_1EgJ2gr_WnmubiKDtB8NMK4jH5DC1phcK8EX62jY-vleMQlhVwgITdMzS0SOO80GKWRp6SlepQT-KEY8NEF6u7X41kBU7otNR71UhxctsmYW0hcc8NMYiamZEBcQDVPwf6VPiRZt65qoSSwb4QhTwYlNtAs2qcNTYWjd8fz_qbr9517s2_BRDy2LZUM8Sj44IbH6Gg7xNFvXz7AFul9M_N-vtMaFwI6Dg4rDiGvxZBKIA2UtgjrcEqlo4GQMq1XWboevOgHNsmQwOTugG_5Rm24JeD_xM_Lmee58hHdYdJ4Bhrt0UR28wdACz0tGj0R1pKEvRO4Uie3KNoWWw1v8_HjL8RA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df325db4731445a1a1e044153b4d8df8&_e=YeC8nMSTLitZcN6kLzo3WsIglmr4NWJskgAGtrSuTJB2eGF6teZaFEespN_1EgJ2gr_WnmubiKDtB8NMK4jH5DC1phcK8EX62jY-vleMQlhVwgITdMzS0SOO80GKWRp6SlepQT-KEY8NEF6u7X41kBU7otNR71UhxctsmYW0hcc8NMYiamZEBcQDVPwf6VPiRZt65qoSSwb4QhTwYlNtAs2qcNTYWjd8fz_qbr9517s2_BRDy2LZUM8Sj44IbH6GcgvN1HCyFhJxN0fPurD7uCKGCGnG1pP1qMeU52XzL59es-bzoMcRxmSOymFA4_vIMJzXPnf4l2muWuzqPkAkRpLrVhynxmgGM0T8K-JiKCRlUPZPNnkUrUwhkUAke8IS9Vq9Wx7LPBgTeM34ItuUZg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." | If this law were to pass, here are three reasons why this bill would be an important guardrail for our democracy: 1) Trump would be held accountable for his many crimes – including the 34 felony convictions on his record. 2) The Supreme Court, controlled by a 6-3 conservative majority, would stop any corruption that they’ve been a part of! 3) Trump would not be allowed to be in office EVER AGAIN.

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0605bd01-adea-4b62-abd2-1449357a9f53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – President Biden, Senator Schumer, and Senate Democrats are working around the clock to pass this law before Trump is inaugurated. But we need EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT who reads this to endorse this bill before midnight >> _**[[ ADD YOUR NAME → ]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcdcfce2-41fb-4ad1-bab6-2bc871a02853/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_

|
---
| | | | | This is a democracy, Peter. There are no kings that rule the United States of America. And we need to keep it that way. [So if you’re ready to fight for the future and support the No Kings Act, add your name NOW – you only have until MIDNIGHT to do so.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf3ba3d3-af1a-438b-a156-d9e9a6f038de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2933517f-2a95-461d-9bbe-ca58f0c010bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fbf354eb7664c388776a066b273da6d&_e=EUD0qcLinsaTlM7FWUvVcgWr3DtgEJLlkFBlVy-gVybSR6v1bi9LTCe7oBe3n0lLADWBn9CJLMkX9TLhpEo6pKf8BsD3QdSoo1j1xwEy8MX1gpocCsc62r-pWquItS27F90csmOC1r42f3lOOFlGuDENV4u0e7PzaH32xBk9Smpffu2uJ9F7aaQ0mCNnVoOOBOjktDGc-vLvLtByQ9OZN2PLdUgn-eQPQZIHQqaKuvoBsCnYvNJxCdIhXd2zWNpEHYfu3Qx9xfudv_o_hEM-5mDmjinNwfs6bwr_znSkO8vw6PqI_tcfvocdkRG-5_iatYobGM_oK5RNrMpmrgc2oadOfkBRTVEgQCe8XzuvMjQo8IcPvHEMHxBf3BGMOL0bWwMiXTOXlVzNh_pcfVGvuGlO-JWrOOreXKW-lj37rQb2PcLYGIcxznFMGFMGIrSP)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fbf354eb7664c388776a066b273da6d&_e=EUD0qcLinsaTlM7FWUvVcgWr3DtgEJLlkFBlVy-gVybSR6v1bi9LTCe7oBe3n0lLADWBn9CJLMkX9TLhpEo6pKf8BsD3QdSoo1j1xwEy8MX1gpocCsc62r-pWquItS27F90csmOC1r42f3lOOFlGuDENV4u0e7PzaH32xBk9Smpffu2uJ9F7aaQ0mCNnVoOOBOjktDGc-vLvLtByQ9OZN2PLdUgn-eQPQZIHQqaKuvoBsCnYvNJxCdIhXd2zWNpEHYfu3Qx9xfudv_o_hEM-5g00xVGCYa13WdOXeT8ZUnIy19IwJCEkB7FFvvA6mFI7HJ2a6ODLoNVdKST3F1r9hMxyfN9QeYbn_8Cetrlcu4RpcQANY1sGMycqffaJGWsjoi8PF0xiaRk-okBZIjvYEbCmYUMkfdouhyuksvx3bKMU3sQ4oaRI9vQdcOMdWQqG)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fbf354eb7664c388776a066b273da6d&_e=EUD0qcLinsaTlM7FWUvVcgWr3DtgEJLlkFBlVy-gVybSR6v1bi9LTCe7oBe3n0lLADWBn9CJLMkX9TLhpEo6pKf8BsD3QdSoo1j1xwEy8MX1gpocCsc62r-pWquItS27F90csmOC1r42f3lOOFlGuDENV4u0e7PzaH32xBk9Smpffu2uJ9F7aaQ0mCNnVoOOBOjktDGc-vLvLtByQ9OZN2PLdUgn-eQPQZIHQqaKuvoBsCnYvNJxCdIhXd2zWNpEHYfu3Qx9xfudv_o_hEM-5g58Zm7IdheJluPungTME5VtgUrYngTugN2JOnVvDYaug21yeEjBzjCAYPEzWVc580vjbb0t3IsNG6E3Ib7ZMty2ko5RWll1JnsxhmG87f30jQOr6W68jTFWmr_riCKYT3w1H3VPSDYg9ojiahH8nFjOo5B9rVCuFpGwvfN2lNkV)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Explore God’s Purpose for Your Life with Daily Readings
body:
I'm excited to offer you the brand-new 2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional.

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=783cff59239e48f3b8b93a40fa914965&_e=TfSM3vjg0tpHPInaeVQpF4fccTSS2eIt7wA_j-zCYVOt0gY8NYhWVfBD7kGI6Grcn4K2FU7nUFavPJTR43cjXqP7OLUs2DDRqXWebBuXh4TXRXSGdnRBYGcisoB6dECBAZHn2o_RbrtjmlCCtgLNsWHnulyEyC_dvudeSV4fNuHfprt-_rK-02dHefH1GK4PDLOzAAufVcHs5ih8F3vOZNERVEONfWTlJwyJebsLq7_wS0eNx6hCcCMmyzXesATTW-oJq6p_BBnplHxl9tReBiPdnDsjNx_A8EcoiIz6cbEEeBHt33PtRD8F9YTH9shdqogHCL1TdzWMDA6IDOb5XFYvG6Fby7kj0oB0_ESGI7LPd5al03wVrywz15IEt5bjybpl_7UZBpQhyuVAm79TU40UkLlRXRj5lB6tYQeXFqY%3D)
---
Dear Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him. | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=783cff59239e48f3b8b93a40fa914965&_e=TfSM3vjg0tpHPInaeVQpF4fccTSS2eIt7wA_j-zCYVOt0gY8NYhWVfBD7kGI6Grcn4K2FU7nUFavPJTR43cjXqP7OLUs2DDRqXWebBuXh4TXRXSGdnRBYGcisoB6dECBAZHn2o_RbrtjmlCCtgLNsWHnulyEyC_dvudeSV4fNuHfprt-_rK-02dHefH1GK4PDLOzAAufVcHs5ih8F3vOZNERVEONfWTlJwyJebsLq7_wS0eNx6hCcCMmyzXesATTptkrMoQosbxq0HHWYsG3E6RT9ble2T5jKKIxle4L_n9wi82DWnzdG0Oq_m0MtcE_6gYZ2HDXnXGxMXFsndk0B-zyB7W8rySJMJzFxz4uEFkoqLAp-Rwov-cJpbwHVpX4Omu3gxGBCuqf65ksnCWaL71T76aqkeoqoWa9hpBqNpY%3D)
---
| | | | | With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:
* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.

Request your copy here: [https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=783cff59239e48f3b8b93a40fa914965&_e=TfSM3vjg0tpHPInaeVQpF4fccTSS2eIt7wA_j-zCYVOt0gY8NYhWVfBD7kGI6Grcn4K2FU7nUFavPJTR43cjXqP7OLUs2DDRqXWebBuXh4TXRXSGdnRBYGcisoB6dECBAZHn2o_RbrtjmlCCtgLNsWHnulyEyC_dvudeSV4fNuHfprt-_rK-02dHefH1GK4PDLOzAAufVcHs5ih8F3vOZNERVEONfWTlJwyJebsLq7_wS0eNx6hCcCMmyzXesATTgp48JLVnEKHlw90kU6Tw0pFCF_TRvp6PuOIllO5SN1s7QxQ1hH3Bm8ORk_GSpO-DFuOuB2UpUBi5DiykhhLJaayHvssochTPoB4lMKaJqNHnyg5q8rLXLs95kLVc4Yw1rmmvVuPL2-8w7DQM9nA53nNb3vkQyTORd9MlJEmLsAo%3D)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
President-elect Donald Trump [returned to the world stage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DHvpCAUBPBPgx0GHqxoQXGN3V57pXkLD-WCYJBds9_-4vX_bpJJfpnMn-fyxJhiXn_jTraFsoAAzSVwMS4eY_ouuvM2EAGpjqw0Sg0PM6ix2yxOhMYAvsI4KJomPwkThETntXk4T120tyZBjFIqoR89hCFMzgktyGtAZHeIrdT-b4m5bRTSt3yo9q7sXbJba8fJ1C8GM4P5uq7e5Ze7SwbzTTOYJTCYhWEwt_reD16pvWs-eSv8KjV5fjZciWPjubRK3ONOvFI5KMe88pj5gTWe_db21FXrjyumFM_BMC3WHWP6v6X99M3Hwr8AAAD__4bnZu8) on Saturday to join leaders for the reopening of Notre Dame Cathedral in Paris.

# Sunday, December 8, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 2010, Elon Musk’s SpaceX launched and [recovered its Dragon rocket](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZI1M2wNM4OASsrn0QmTsBvpkY2R7Z5e_X81svFmpqlQqvX-P-WE58LH9tZFMXdOMEjV0CHKcveVwzbrxZiVCUg2ZblCqvw29GpvdSOdUP9pl9PpOg7edVt5jP97I-UH11LB5rXUox65TUt9aXPv17pzUkrxGa8VLcE25_Z_4qDut4UpPyq1LsQlmr_UsQv0ROAmc7EmFj3JaR61LAqclpK0InN4W7FxqypfAaQRPjuJCGVB2Et75F_hst3TAQi5FKrByLhVcipGyYxvCBcsHh_pTd9muFWqCTEBHpQy2xlTOnTI12fjzk0Pg0g9Cyy1aDu_L9TeET4PfAQAA___PqndP), becoming the first private company to accomplish the feat.

When you hear something like, "a bull in a China shop," do you ever wonder how the phrase was coined? Did a rowdy bovine actually wander into a fine retailer and start smashing plates? We may never know. We can know, however, what would happen if a bull actually _did_ get into a China shop. Check out [today's video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAUheGnsbcg-9qAGTxUrbylGSt1QTf4GlwZjMANyttXdM92hqNP-r-u_RVjisv4iTPZEnIPAvRFwkWY3mNMz15zbwMRkOJkZatUU7eNMnyyA5GpWy-7u0EEHwakuxe6blEp6ozn0Z6aBGGkVELXFYQmdMMgtCCvAZGdI5a8VT85LmWikJ75QVs15JknO5Wy7ky9MXAM3HEcVVz2guOG8_lg4FYG7uNdw-p-b9_LjYHjm_XrEVOKe9MyLcYZY_r3yqu-h4W_AAAA___yglHV).

Our sponsor today is [Percent](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8GtkSXH4M7MFSKvKVrRwvDxaYCY9k4Ud6-okM7dbu6n87Rp_N5H-82prjOHzajqaGMHLi8MH6BfvQ2ptcoqTcBkaOgaJgWQnVaiZ4uRneTm4LSznbAAkza9gDQMesAwCuk0bQ2xqFnTIDsrjyo8OYcSEAvubWkHbGW_fpV4loXDOlVHrhfXck0maXW7SDinfCB8GHD3eFaG2sPMZw1j0c5d4dE3P7ChKtGMvp4ZiJuKz6PhLX-EmfzZuO8EnHz6Joi3Y3fnjGleChNJMzZxvQjUf8b5WH4dwAAAP__Bo9k5Q). If you don't know much about private credit investments, this would be a great time to learn more.
|
---
## Trump Meets Leaders at Notre Dame Reopening
President-elect Donald Trump [returned to the world stage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DHvpCAUBPBPgx0GHqxoQXGN3V57pXkLD-WCYJBds9_-4vX_bpJJfpnMn-fyxJhiXn_jTraFsoAAzSVwMS4eY_ouuvM2EAGpjqw0Sg0PM6ix2yxOhMYAvsI4KJomPwkThETntXk4T120tyZBjFIqoR89hCFMzgktyGtAZHeIrdT-b4m5bRTSt3yo9q7sXbJba8fJ1C8GM4P5uq7e5Ze7SwbzTTOYJTCYhWEwt_reD16pvWs-eSv8KjV5fjZciWPjubRK3ONOvFI5KMe88pj5gTWe_db21FXrjyumFM_BMC3WHWP6v6X99M3Hwr8AAAD__4bnZu8) on Saturday to join leaders for the reopening of Notre Dame Cathedral in Paris. French President Emmanuel Macron [welcomed Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvTmCO8DOwNAlW7p2tC5wl1BhY2GaKP--cvdu7-lJ75O-r-t8pZTTev-khX2TMoMCM2gY1DRHSvk9mz56YQbGnr0eEZ0dHU79wwsHcdqhtpG0AhyRYQKxlkUJCfXJH28a1KQ1KmNPIE7OISijOBog6o6QWqmn75LW9mDJ7_Lkegpl6bN_tLbtHX50cOngQtvKr_2YjlJbCpk7uLT6s2zDRjXtw1pa5SHSwoOcR4nsIBAEdlPAaTQBz_aGyjK4W1993F4p57S7sTPqvlDKf9z2n4enh98AAAD__5LUXo4) to Paris before holding an impromptu meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymr Zelenskyy. The 860-year-old medieval [cathedral reopened Saturday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn8N3ojgIHYyMHTxlq4drQsc8VXYRPia1v--cvdu3_DpPel93KYbcuH18Y4LBcl1AgNeW9DmMiXksk--SyETAbmOgh2c689D7y7dHHzs7xFtJjIOTIrXGOFOg3VnAhx613E4aBbMxVpn_PkEuc_XGI03lDwgqmOw1Hb6rLzKTLns9UXtFOvSlTCLPDfl3hSMCsbaZK6p_ggvtB0PBeNapZFOuJCOKDOlhkU3qk9aN11XvaF8tYS7zvwivRO2TWMWajpzIwVj10J6fnMpvPWD8uaxIJc_vfyX4xXgNwAA__-t0GTb), five and a half years after being severely damaged by a fire that destroyed its spire and ceiling. The [restoration](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwR0WLJiQguJv3OVvr7QIXuI9YYiAxMrbn3z9dSON9Gk0X7fl5ilRfvz3O7oeywICNJfAhV1WT-mz6GF1ERFQDejkRSkzXYyyw-buaBGFvYorGi1hNZNGo6yVk1UGbBzInZoEYaVUQk8jRBOvIQgtcNXgPTsD9VLH70K5bxjTp7yxjqHsQ3Jb78_G1D8GM4P5OI4x5Hs4SwbzSTOYJTCYhWEw59Ir8tXv2HjF9qoVQ6eSOfXGw0YYua9ho46h85J5xfuL0kr5wWP1OWDjG_raOWU-8Q_62sat72mobn0elBI1c2FaPHZP6Xdh_-uxt4OfAAAA__-zFW3P), which benefited from nearly $1 billion in donations, was the most ambitious in modern French history.
## U.S. Tests Milk Supply For Bird Flu
The U.S. Department of Agriculture announced on Friday that it will [test the national milk supply](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEb22AGncPEaurx2SzTBY5hdA5HtBOXvV2yx3XZHOtK90vm4jTfkxNv8H1fyNe4jKLBSg1RuDMjpPdom-EgEZBryujemu_Sdcc3izUTOmI6iswp0Z7W-oEGn7RV7YxU07M81DcppbZS9tBC7eJ0mZRUFC4jiBK57bj933upCMb33F-V22tcm-aXWRxHmn4BBwHAcR7vdp42OcnoBw0KY6vIL8lQChmcJKPccKBdZqVTeZrly-pJ3zkHG9JR52lA7Axqa7MPj4JS4dL2wal6R0899_SvHy8N3AAAA__-xWGGo) for bird flu. As of Thursday, 718 dairy herds have been affected in 15 states. Raw or unpasteurized milk from dairy farms and processors nationwide will be tested on request starting Dec. 16, beginning with California, Colorado, Michigan, Mississippi, Oregon, and Pennsylvania. There is no evidence that humans have ever contracted the bird flu virus as a result of [drinking raw milk](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvRHBAcYeGLpkS9eOFnBHcg22I0IT-d9X7t7tPT3pfdL3dZkvgQuv18-wkG95m0GCEQqEHGcMXPbZ9OgzEZDuySun9WDdoMf-5jEgWYmW0Iw2OZyyzkPKSgVjI2nq2R9vCuSolJbGniAPeUpJGkloIITuCNy2evreeG03ymXfXlRPaVv64m-tPZ6d_ujg3ME5PFZ6P4_pKLVxKtTBOXJFkcuPqOEtFi53cad1JdyFm6xM0VLUcTCQZUrOJECYwJpIGPvq8fHmUvg5uM7I6xK4_KHbfypeHn4DAAD__zfIYCo).
## College Football Championship Week
The Power 4 conferences each crowned their football champions yesterday, and the games did not disappoint.

Top-ranked [Oregon held off No. 3 Penn State](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOnDAQhJ_GdIvsxRj-wkUaukubEhm8Bic-L8K-Q_f2ESkj_d0Un2Y036_H_HAxxbz9dE-yNfCMEjUoBDnO3sX0mXXjbSBC6hqyaug60w-mG5vdou6XXiq5GJTLGr6C9toYqWkcgjRBNdHebQrlqFQndd9iMOFrXaWW5DU6J-4QK5_tb4657hTSh990tis_m2T3Wo8iuh8CJ4HTdV3tupRy8FnLTQicVk6JNoLAXBeXksAp01UETnzSxhl2Tr4AhwAH5QylukpQGa6YYYkbVMoQM3haXhUKucIZEq9_Yt7gdUBmUFCI_A39PwZHch8OQeCU4psETs1p_XHFlGIxg9Bye7qY_p2p38l9W_wbAAD__-Zff20), 45-37, completing the Ducks' perfect season in their Big 10 debut. The Nittany Lions nearly overcame a 15-point lead in the final four minutes, but Oregon's interception with 1:54 left all but sealed the Big 10 title. No. 2 Texas and No. 5 Georgia [needed overtime](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAURL8Gd1hwwcRbUGxDl223tAhcHFbEWHATr__-ya9_1Yw00ujo_L0vd59L3tY__oWWUl1AgOYSuJiX6HM5Fz1EmxAB1YBW3pQy082oeXjaMGPSQkjtg3hgMAoSmiCj1NPkp5CGbK83CWKWUgk9jZBM-hWC0AKjBu_ZVTLVNv6reaMnpnLWD7Yx1NdQ7JNo70z9ZuAYuOM4Ruz7do0MXKil4Io81UoPXwoD16m2k4FbGLgcGTgNs5ZGCQZuxdrW7Hmn99Y54X_feSXeMbwbXsEpU0EuO_FW31vkIe38ceLQbNyPXEru5sa0WF8-l29A-knYx8JXAAAA__-MSm4c) to settle their rematch. Bulldogs quarterback Carson Beck [injured his arm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_OnDAQxJ8GukX-d9xRuEhD96VNiYxZzH4x9sXeO-vePiJ9upFmND_N_PpavhxFSuGnO9HynhcllAGpQDyWzVH8LKbf7I6oUPdo5V3r8XYf9aM_7Dp5r7RErSZUUo7oR3GbpJnMNsl1ND3Zq00q8ZBSC3Mb1D7uk_fCCNyMcq67BHEuw3emxAfu8ZPfWAafzz7ag_lZO_2jU3On5tba4Ndan7lwvRKdmn2OEQPCnjOvLsZOzQlbvRxXak6wov8NlL5f5QMBcwnk4M8K9citQnhxBUqwFrrIUBATY6EUoKIHJo4IwZ0IjO6ElBu45ogrnIWgYH1Fvlh9sduzUYxUx3tnRDgdxX8b-H-fvq36GwAA__-70X1g) in the first half, and he didn't return until he was forced into action on the game's final play—a handoff for a Trevor Etienne touchdown that won the SEC championship, 22-19. No. 17 Clemson's true freshman kicker, Nolan Hauser, [winked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fy6yAQheGngc4adheBVFDcRp1vm1KDYLFIkPFIxInfPqP06c6c4pv5367z1eeS77f_fmPXUp1Rob4AXtQwR5_La9YyusSMTJIdWCLTW0ODXF1YOBFT5KgsLpCsWTTpSL4PQCkpmd2pAaoBgJTuO0wmjSEorThq9F6cI7e6d-8139vKqbzqk_cu1E0Wt7b2OAT9EzgJnL7PV-AUd__BodVSBE5H8-3zEDjBYHqDinAgHC3AaI3cXXx85VLyYazQ6rb5XH7p9lfq0-FPAAAA___vDVNy) at his bench before drilling a 56-yard field goal for the [ACC Championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2upSAUhZ8GOwxuwJ-CYhq6M-2UBmHjYWYrRphjfPsbb3-7layVlS_fn9f8conSvv52G5oa8wwCFO-Ai3EOLtE9qyaYiAgoGzTdIGWvh16Ozdsszk9-8YMUYoK4RN1Nehy9l2JYZAxTk8zz1oEYu04KpVuIfZy8F0pgUOAce0Kq-Wz_5rTXN0a68wfP1uetIfOu9ShM_mJgGdjrulosx_6UDKzPRLgijznXxRExsKXm82ZgZwY2BQZWwai0GPQzJ9xK3nnNR-Fl-8-vtBfuvOc1VUJ-OfrHdc9vdwYeE1Lga3bUnCYcVyJKpR-YEuvmEn3j1Z90fQx8BQAA__9zXWzR) over No. 8 SMU, 34-31. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Census Blunders - Electoral College Winners and Losers
body:
The Future Looks Redder and Redder | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=655af9b891)
---
|
---
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=217b758f8f&e=8763c56857)
| | | | |
---
|
# Fix the Census: It’s time to count heads, not blunders.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
---
| The U.S. Census, once a symbol of precision and fairness, has become a political football—and not the kind you’d want to cheer for. Once upon a time, this cornerstone of American democracy was about counting heads, not tilting scales. But in recent years, Census blunders have become a national pastime, with significant errors and mismanagement creating a mess of miscounts that undermine its purpose.
These errors aren’t just academic; they distort representation, divert billions in federal dollars, and skew the Electoral College. And yes, it all started in 2020 when the Trump administration approved counting illegal immigrants as part of the Census—a decision that threw fuel on an already smoldering fire.
But let’s bring this debacle closer to home. The prize for one of the most absurd Census errors goes to Connecticut, where a whopping 70,500 mistakes left heads spinning. Initially, it was reported that the state gained 57,000 residents—a sunny tale of a population boom. The reality? **Connecticut lost 11,500 people.** Oops. Misclassified data from planning regions led to this embarrassing discrepancy, overestimating people moving into the state and underestimating those heading for the exits. It was a textbook case of sloppy data processing, masking the state’s real population decline and highlighting how far the Census had gone off the rails.
Unfortunately, this wasn’t an isolated incident. Errors like these cropped up nationwide, and the consequences weren’t evenly distributed. Democratic-leaning states like New York and Minnesota benefited from overcounts, retaining more Electoral College votes than they earned. Meanwhile, Republican-leaning states such as Texas and Florida suffered undercounts, losing votes they should have gained. The result? By 2024, overcounts handed blue states at least seven bonus Electoral College votes—votes that Republicans had to claw back to stay competitive. And the financial impact was no less significant: billions of dollars in federal funding, also tied to Census data, flowed disproportionately to states with inflated numbers.
The stakes couldn’t be higher. The Census isn’t just a tally sheet—it’s the foundation for congressional representation, federal funding, and the Electoral College. Get the numbers wrong, and you skew the entire system. But there’s hope for a course correction. If the next Census gets it right in 2030, we’re poised to see a dramatic shift in the balance of power. **States like Texas and Florida are booming, while high-tax, high-regulation strongholds such as California and New York are bleeding residents. Demographic trends suggest that red states could net as many as 14 additional Electoral College votes by 2030,** provided the Census doesn’t botch the count again.
Of course, more than waiting for population trends to do the heavy lifting is required. Washington needs to step in and ensure the next Census is handled with the kind of professionalism it deserves. That means auditing the 2020 Census, learning from its mistakes, and implementing safeguards to prevent future mismanagement. With a rejuvenated Department of Commerce and—one hopes—a no-nonsense, businesslike approach in place by the next administration, there’s no reason the Census can’t get back on track.
What’s at stake here isn’t just a handful of Electoral College votes or a few billion dollars in misallocated federal funds. It’s trust—trust in the institutions that form the backbone of our democracy. Congress must prioritize fixing the Census, ensuring that it delivers accurate, unbiased results that reflect the actual makeup of our nation. The American people deserve better than 70,500 mistakes. It’s time to count heads, not blunders.
_Dominic Rapini is a seasoned executive and lifelong Connecticut native from New Haven County. Currently a technology CEO in the cybersecurity sector, Dominic brings decades of leadership and innovation to his work. Previously, he was an award-winning account executive at Apple, Inc., driving success in the consumer retail business. A veteran of the personal computer industry, Dominic has held diverse roles, including as a manufacturing executive. In 2022, he was a candidate for Connecticut’s Secretary of the State, leveraging his deep commitment to public service and community engagement. Dominic is also a proud husband and father, dedicated to his family and his home state._

---
|
---

name: History Facts
subject: Is this the oddest pirate attack ever?
body:
Benjamin Hornigold was a powerful fleet captain during the golden age of piracy — the period in the late 17th and early 18th centuries when most of the pirates you’ve heard of were doing their plundering. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmlsa3d2nzn5qsmpgipsbsqm41yb0zr88rk08fkgjv579j88n15tbdaar18dtwprn1meng2ha6rsi1362tmma0bgcx31wenolgw9zg5arw7z256xcasn9o67cujaka0j3fbtrptx0ynmqxx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [A pirate once attacked a ship and stole hats instead of treasure.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| B enjamin Hornigold was a powerful fleet captain during the golden age of piracy — the period in the late 17th and early 18th centuries when most of the pirates you’ve heard of were doing their plundering. Blackbeard, for instance, started his career under Hornigold’s command, eventually becoming his second before going out on his own, as did many other notorious pirates.
---
It’s easy to imagine a fearsome pirate captain like Hornigold filling his ships’ coffers with booty from wealthy merchant ships, but in reality, not every trading ship targeted by pirates was carrying high-value goods. Often, ransacking a vessel was just a means to run errands — picking up rum, foodstuffs, ammo, ship repair parts, and other basics that were critical to maintaining the swashbuckling lifestyle.
Hornigold’s crew had a pretty short shopping list when they boarded a sloop off the coast of Honduras one day. [According to](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the journal of one passenger, “They did us no further injury than the taking most of our hats from us.” The pirates explained that they’d gotten very drunk the previous night and thrown their hats overboard, and simply needed replacements.As far as pirates went, Hornigold was among the more polite; [according to](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Woodes Rogers, the English governor of the Bahamas known for bringing pirates to justice, “Most people spoke well of his generosity.” Eventually, Hornigold accepted a royal pardon and made a drastic career change from pirate captain to pirate hunter.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The “pirate accent” emerged in the 1950s.
What we often think of today as the “[pirate voice](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so6cfo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” wasn’t actually associated with pirates until the 1950s, when actor Robert Newton played the lead in several popular pirate movies. Newton used an exaggerated version of his own West Country English accent, which, unlike many British accents, includes a very pronounced “r” sound. It’s likely some English pirates did sound something like that, since many folks from the West Country were the seafaring sort. But pirates came from all sorts of national origins, and had voices to match.

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.

My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6ijwJa1UqHAgq4pTpHFJMORQy0B8YEht4L8PtHHSp70zuHMO5v1Nv5lwhLR_MxEWf6DGqg3o0h40ftRGITnqaQsRtGBCUS4omzTv3ML47JTqYOE3KcdRjUx092UaB2YEV9JYb8fbNFmYhRvszahhMHLownL1cMEmLtSo5p47C4wPRnqprJokUcwcgK33COByNMkd4Qdg-0AoGVtvc-yO5d5aqUS-ELERsVWwJ0Jf2qPPuBOxXfCAASrNnrY7PEUujUp3SID5rHQPvlFOHVLM1wH6E7xHqJXIreYTLWibHRC5vr9-IWI8W9R_ciLXgrkWsC2k_XMUwYUzErlCNOH4DK2JxYQ9Ebn-Q9KQnH6y_F3KqUFqRK4vr3T7-n2YGeMdLq78CscR6ngjiu1X61O-_c-jHov4HQAA__-gLqFK)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6ijwJa1UqHAgq4pTpHFJMORQy0B8YEht4L8PtHHSp70zuHMO5v1Nv5lwhLR_MxEWf6DGqg3o0h40ftRGITnqaQsRtGBCUS4omzTv3ML47JTqYOE3KcdRjUx092UaB2YEV9JYb8fbNFmYhRvszahhMHLownL1cMEmLtSo5p47C4wPRnqprJokUcwcgK33COByNMkd4Qdg-0AoGVtvc-yO5d5aqUS-ELERsVWwJ0Jf2qPPuBOxXfCAASrNnrY7PEUujUp3SID5rHQPvlFOHVLM1wH6E7xHqJXIreYTLWibHRC5vr9-IWI8W9R_ciLXgrkWsC2k_XMUwYUzErlCNOH4DK2JxYQ9Ebn-Q9KQnH6y_F3KqUFqRK4vr3T7-n2YGeMdLq78CscR6ngjiu1X61O-_c-jHov4HQAA__-gLqFK)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6ijwJa1UqHAgq4pTpHFJMORQy0B8YEht4L8PtHHSp70zuHMO5v1Nv5lwhLR_MxEWf6DGqg3o0h40ftRGITnqaQsRtGBCUS4omzTv3ML47JTqYOE3KcdRjUx092UaB2YEV9JYb8fbNFmYhRvszahhMHLownL1cMEmLtSo5p47C4wPRnqprJokUcwcgK33COByNMkd4Qdg-0AoGVtvc-yO5d5aqUS-ELERsVWwJ0Jf2qPPuBOxXfCAASrNnrY7PEUujUp3SID5rHQPvlFOHVLM1wH6E7xHqJXIreYTLWibHRC5vr9-IWI8W9R_ciLXgrkWsC2k_XMUwYUzErlCNOH4DK2JxYQ9Ebn-Q9KQnH6y_F3KqUFqRK4vr3T7-n2YGeMdLq78CscR6ngjiu1X61O-_c-jHov4HQAA__-gLqFK)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

name: Kari Lake
subject: I will never give up. I hope you won’t either.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7a5f166a178648dea802a198385c3776&_e=PImoS4LyBE2zVq7aBfz9TctPvATeTb_00TJC4n7DrdhtDUyuc2ovkxB74Q49cXeQixv9TKNdIdbQRfylh2yf-wJrQAE_wFdxiVlB0TbzHOxfqk3XTrfgZDbSlOzGOPBeQVlwm6tAnctsIeN4x-rwAgaBp2q6eHD4rubUN6f8485LdghKae3CNl1nRdfk-dSwAhzG_Dp3xkEKzq0ynNvkID70yzwhLyttGPJJLq-92bBK753EnDuNsKfDuSq-ss5XtgO2MmTh5XZCsXIbUoSUOnrkhR53op_KVLKhueocn9MbDO3ygGSoTAR2uJoWJoLNhze6dqZzZWr6sWSy9M7qeUGhWniEw3a1SN_Tl3i-00Ve7094cOLyiUsYr1rS_kxykShOmCttBxdV7Q-8KM0AfZvhl5tJCnJAIfhCbehwT0A%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help.[_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy me._](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7a5f166a178648dea802a198385c3776&_e=PImoS4LyBE2zVq7aBfz9TctPvATeTb_00TJC4n7DrdhtDUyuc2ovkxB74Q49cXeQixv9TKNdIdbQRfylh2yf-wJrQAE_wFdxiVlB0TbzHOxfqk3XTrfgZDbSlOzGOPBeQVlwm6tAnctsIeN4x-rwAgaBp2q6eHD4rubUN6f8485LdghKae3CNl1nRdfk-dSwAhzG_Dp3xkEKzq0ynNvkID70yzwhLyttGPJJLq-92bBK753EnDuNsKfDuSq-ss5X-PYTuCCG3siiWlLfthsDBM7lD1vxUZsJfj0_KN2WDANEEyW52x61I-zMmysQ16RClLXQkhs2SnA6hNSqodUH9r32o-9G6eYaRW0iRTlthXlgY2hQcwoEeZRxIL5kkLG7Bu38w1sk8rABO23ONbzn-Ku-UT0BFIotp9sUIgGtJtI%3D) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes.[_If you’re able, would you consider supporting my “First Amendment Fund” to help me defend myself and defeat the Left’s sham lawfare?_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7a5f166a178648dea802a198385c3776&_e=PImoS4LyBE2zVq7aBfz9TctPvATeTb_00TJC4n7DrdhtDUyuc2ovkxB74Q49cXeQixv9TKNdIdbQRfylh2yf-wJrQAE_wFdxiVlB0TbzHOxfqk3XTrfgZDbSlOzGOPBeQVlwm6tAnctsIeN4x-rwAgaBp2q6eHD4rubUN6f8485LdghKae3CNl1nRdfk-dSwAhzG_Dp3xkEKzq0ynNvkID70yzwhLyttGPJJLq-92bBK753EnDuNsKfDuSq-ss5X5MifSPKsSd78q2W4TxrRmYIfbp8RZ5udRbZP8aW0dgCpD6__S_SS565SQi1JmFUndRFf-GcGh73grZajN-ben0XfTq8ONjIQpxfsKv2XS_A40YccUU0l-6jFcSsunJZAMGjiRHPOrkSxvW5d4oZxJDsMxM9pkLVq4ncvbJoHeRI%3D) Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7a5f166a178648dea802a198385c3776&_e=PImoS4LyBE2zVq7aBfz9TctPvATeTb_00TJC4n7DrdhtDUyuc2ovkxB74Q49cXeQixv9TKNdIdbQRfylh2yf-wJrQAE_wFdxiVlB0TbzHOxfqk3XTrfgZDbSlOzGOPBeQVlwm6tAnctsIeN4x-rwAgaBp2q6eHD4rubUN6f8485LdghKae3CNl1nRdfk-dSwAhzG_Dp3xkEKzq0ynNvkID70yzwhLyttGPJJLq-92bBK753EnDuNsKfDuSq-ss5XbzdSovtJjAQCUYz86TMP2l4LjbTCC46A4tM78IybZuUEewZdA3iXi08oXOFYh75JVMv0wcSFogMa0tXSsCZ4EMw2b7KYMVsKK_ntu_AuInfn8fGoNSo_Ny-xa7wxzqHuFTLTT8gwMdin4FNo3VZI-7vOzzUSdTZ4oUGBq4rCwsY%3D)

But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes. Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me. Thank you for your support – and for giving me hope that truth will prevail! Yours truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. I’m facing legal fees, plus an enormous sentence, all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud. But I’m still taking on this fight because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. I will never give up. I hope you won’t either. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C.
