\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Dec 7, 2024
Subject: Ask Biden to pardon more people while he still can:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
After President Biden recently pardoned his son, I am joining the call by grassroots groups and my colleagues in Congress to urge him to pardon thousands more people in his last months in office. Our community's fathers, brothers, mothers and loved ones deserve to be pardoned and join their families. They may not have a President as their father, but still deserve the same chance.
Pardons restore people’s rights, reunite families, and start to address unjust sentences and mass incarceration. President Biden can pardon anyone in federal prison, about 90% of whom are serving time for non-violent offenses.
I want to lift up the group Unified U.S. Deported Veterans’ request for President Biden to sign 25 pending requests to**pardon undocumented U.S. veterans who served our country. They grew up in the United States, and when I met them, I was brought to tears hearing how they were ripped from their families and the only community they knew.**
It's a shame that our country has abandoned and deported them after their service for minor infractions like marijuana use. After sacrificing and being willing to lay down their lives for the U.S. military, they deserve better than being left behind and separated from their communities.
[**Can you add your name to ask President Biden to pardon more people while he has the chance, including veterans at risk of deportation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5d-QvZCtV-awj_iMOT_-4mM4pIuECjJosR-GXN9HDAe71mqs_IEsaYD4g0EYWRaaf2Mq8bydGn2HtK4ndF8KcJUBITDYVCsGDFYLzNjdqRGj33KonEoy5WR0LNhwkzLQRhIZpGF16ngVW3pPIyTVLatj31KNTxVNyK06nRV4Gtxqbn6P1lUWS0G8LSIqQ4B3yaZ4s8dlQxcMDbYhriHlBlyD-2UpdDfpj_gP2SyWBm2yZ5faScgebzp2gaDDEamy-P1wByzD7d1B6PfuY3oD4ewTTpAyEUxpdZGk3si2JmCWU8iPdgi6xKp3-MDirAJaVQdC9Co69gJJMxceNFAMQGiOvqWQNznXPnX6c1wDFyvvlKim3Dsg_kTbkAYstTCnvUz7nmVkwpZiX0d3Gqwucrw/4c4/rJlvFIumQvaF-2mREmtdXw/h3/h001.0HNrGFosC9N0YpfqxyRJACL5uYMwH78IVDjLYhxqazs)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5d-QvZCtV-awj_iMOT_-4mM4pIuECjJosR-GXN9HDAe71mqs_IEsaYD4g0EYWRaaf2Mq8bydGn2HtK4ndF8KcJUBITDYVCsGDFYLzNjdqRGjlNPL5KiDsixmzEimF0owrNARk1SareOs1RU9AXH53agqETYSMHG5TfOqqJhcDgK1l2QFfXmcIaoINCRrfqF52KLfhS5TNGOmz12RgWz4L1NOterWFBez9poUSBCTpArsO9VzHif6Ir4eHbHPeHnlnT35JIYJy_JSfipEqqcMbNBlMS4JqFDM9ly6638BZTZX8sf9nhj3sKEOFfGMlCwG-Ic7Tfv4a-o9mf7U-_ORLRxDv1CIqpjKQo0sTnrE-i27puEFv8ZxBddGsAyePtOZLCZn-vZmEjxt0LuuNqO7RoQ/4c4/rJlvFIumQvaF-2mREmtdXw/h4/h001.tiUn3QVYmom9VF9eCm7IP13MMzCAQQq5URYEZBNlKiE)
---
There are more people President Biden can pardon right now:
I recently joined more than 65 members of Congress urging President Biden to use his pardon powers to issue pardons to people who’ve been unjustly imprisoned, people on death row, elderly and chronically ill people, and women who were punished for defending themselves against their abusers.
Grassroots groups and Congresspeople have also called for President Biden to use his clemency powers to free 3,000 people serving time for marjiuana-related charges (as he pledged and has done for a few people so far) and free the longest-serving U.S. political prisoner, Native activist Leonard Peltier.
Since Trump has announced plans to speed up killing the 40 people on federal death row, there’s a narrow opportunity to save lives and clear all of these people before Trump takes office.
[**Please add your name to ask President Biden to pardon more people in his last few months of office, including veterans, people on death row, elderly and chronically ill people, and people with marijuana-related charges.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5d-QvZCtV-awj_iMOT_-4mM4pIuECjJosR-GXN9HDAe71mqs_IEsaYD4g0EYWRaaf2Mq8bydGn2HtK4ndF8KcJUBITDYVCsGDFYLzNjdqRGgeR3MmfC_WPT0ogKzGmvUsUCsRbgnM2pTPKn6ucQbxKyOwpraYd7_i_ZdwEyG6l2bayLuOl6-JPnM8UgHsP53Apqjfz_rnbp2KfbGUnQkwggRdOMTROlW33P-Sq08RvcitwGqMh_Zyv-D8SmGZTR7FQhdKWHAJj7_sxPdmruO4wpMalr36HfhFlotoe_ihmWmLrik3f_VqzP4Rdc3A1C3ZISL9-xsY1gzZ_i9E742a05i2t-F97ABfTsnk3zJ6LLvtfn2CykeGIuRFgbuB9-rp_CZOwAgFmPX-HB7WaaN8qA/4c4/rJlvFIumQvaF-2mREmtdXw/h5/h001.Lrr2WBSI1NHloGelaiFhYRfneG3IyqLXss8y_l1dZ3U)
Thank you for taking action to address injustices in our criminal-legal system. Together, we will keep fighting for a humane immigration system and for true public safety, not over-criminalization or mass incarceration.
In solidarity,
Rashida
P.S. You can learn more about the group Unified U.S. Deported Veterans at [https://www.uusdepvets.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVCZ0oJEvjokCMpvxGFqSzNnbY5VZaUB1mjZEFgP8bHDNJo2aesfydq2PfLBlbXGRlCCLG6h_4qt1-YfpUvXhnPeFJbczeLp_cqSDEnpgd2QbFdlqzlGNsb-6jd6KVRT4GIA24W9Gl20qVDRrU-QIximMN7luO4CpnTAUN4bOC7TKrrR4w293o-wMnxAvhOoZygvR3K0X8wJ3GuVhpuIg1g-DfP5SHUn64ORiPEiWNUvpvNLPdRatNAlMC1ISr6H7Dh5Xw1FtITSfoPeN2iXElS71nEj1GhrhYpQk9HcuRdzPE-A4YHPmQl8A2w03GSobw/4c4/rJlvFIumQvaF-2mREmtdXw/h6/h001.zShzAOJSV2BN0OMLTkeTno0UBlRWyMJz-Yemw2SCoDA).

Peter,
As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022.
However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.
Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone!
Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Lucas Kunce’s today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84594?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84595?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84595?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84595?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84595?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84595?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84595?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84594?refcode=em20241208-8687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8687%2E614464%2EGtkaNy)

Abigail

| Friends, Come celebrate with us. I will be sworn in as a Member of Congress on Friday, January 3rd, 2025. This is a historic opportunity in our Nations Capitol, and I hope you can make it. There is limited space available so please ask family and friends to:
[RSVP with required form by clicking here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pAAYyAilJp1hOaq1Rrq7tKSdVh2mItLsOmf3PF4Hiax9r_PJG5CFCHSvnqPWptdX38RCVLmYdrIMrTX5vaAp3ttbsYGVm87gY276zCY1GS7ih1YV48F-u4_kyIgGH98lVE1jNKiOxmtz5xnejlhT_kC5HA00h7cbQ64MKdeL1_AuscC-aIpLuOhr1YPN_ggLsn3SVt-Y6wCRxRQeX8ipqMTmp3BHA9-FS2DEXGqTYh9fYr8qtylfwUFE3FvcB5b3QY951hiY_hw=&c=FtfpYVX0je219AANOLf2Sib2q2VumwsdLO3sR1t1np_MZEiG4piG3g==&ch=76PY9niYwkmXZpykpeV3BAVaYryTpcUl76sFoJEuFvDlZd4Ku-jqDg==) Guests will have a designated room on the Capitol complex for John McGuire supporters to watch the proceedings on TV.
The day will begin around 10am and end with a tour of the Capitol with John McGuire that ends around 5pm.
***Note: There are no assigned or designated parking spots for guests. It is best to arrive near the Capitol early to try and find street parking close by or park farther away and uber to the Capitol Complex.
For questions, please email, john@mcguireva.com
On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress!
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria

name: For Peter [DOTL]
subject: Did you see what Chuck Schumer had to say about SCOTUS!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
sign onto our EMERGENCY “Pass the No Kings Act”

|
---

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Fighting for workers this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Many of those who will work the hardest to make this holiday season happen are also some of the lowest paid.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241208-4571-footer&t=1&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)
Peter, this holiday season, everyday people across the country are putting in the hard work it takes to make the holiday magic happen. 🎄🎁✨
There are factory workers, truck drivers, warehouse employees, retail workers, customer service reps, food service employees, and more who are on their feet day in and day out to make sure shelves are stocked and the incredible demand is met.
And while it’s often said that it’s important to appreciate their work, the truth is we need to do much more than appreciate.
**We need to fight for policies that will materially improve their lives.**
**[Pitch in $3 to help](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241208?amount=3&refcode=em20241208-4571&refcode2=4571_420207_ChDr7o&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)**
Many of those who will work the hardest to make this holiday season happen are also some of the lowest paid — often with few or no benefits.
**If Democrats want to win again, it’s crucial that we organize around an agenda that centers those everyday working people:**
* Raising the minimum wage
* Making it easier to join or form a union
* Paid family and medical leave
* Strengthening workplace protections
* Medicare for All

It’s not only the right thing to do, it’s also the best way to rebuild our party’s image with everyday working class voters in all 50 states.
[**Peter, if you’re ready to fight for workers this holiday season, will you pitch in $3 or more to Pramila’s campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241208?refcode=em20241208-4571&amount=3&refcode2=4571_420207_ChDr7o&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241208?amount=3&refcode=em20241208-4571&refcode2=4571_420207_ChDr7o&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241208-4571-footer&t=2&refcode2=4571_420207_ChDr7o&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4571%2E420207%2EChDr7o)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_t=yczM6acbkfvFIowDpV4Apak5CtQ09lH6-KyODG_0apSRZLfIhtBqbI9OTlEysqiygvPQZzja0EIza7Wxjf2XQoJH436XwfmRqkTzg2SBYvOJ1bSr3HIlAYLUTxaXHCMj)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_e=pBVFe0XWZjsmxcI9y-TIavuU_LCUZnjA56V4VzsA5eoc2M71iaw-ZD0PjLw2NCvsTvyICy4eY2OEIyuDRTnlqfyGGJ5n0huKQtD72OSmc3LBwrCquJrsIW-BZwN1OWl4ufWIHTrCc84zkfQEnu5AAYK8VLqVrLEYrwiaYDVdNkR3yfRLLa_uJwb3rJ5lkORODcHhYpoWc9PZaaBhGBp8_CxqDXAmcqVQWQ3TDm5ZOvWQCLZYUueq1kho6YRfmnCRaEdjNLSZUiGsjyeRrn4NO2k68r0fKn1-cwDRMdlJbbU_J9OZG57Kih5iSShQLKgIMoCwz9bYFMqnYFMoqV7oaVrKIa0fkvVsShnfq8qXPdodXdxxIjOlrMEzDFuAFaYHpuqNHLSN0SXpTuVPK1vo7frHdeDUBFMqvr5TIDRHZI8%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_e=pBVFe0XWZjsmxcI9y-TIavuU_LCUZnjA56V4VzsA5eoc2M71iaw-ZD0PjLw2NCvsTvyICy4eY2OEIyuDRTnlqfyGGJ5n0huKQtD72OSmc3LBwrCquJrsIW-BZwN1OWl4ufWIHTrCc84zkfQEnu5AAYK8VLqVrLEYrwiaYDVdNkR3yfRLLa_uJwb3rJ5lkORODcHhYpoWc9PZaaBhGBp8_CxqDXAmcqVQWQ3TDm5ZOvWQCLZYUueq1kho6YRfmnCRaEdjNLSZUiGsjyeRrn4NO7kL51U6HfjbNKwiZxHexE9dcW_PeeucIwy-dRqEfGvt2EETNDsQ422z7KLxgszVnjx1g69gIh1QMC34pSn5gsegJKGfHrIp1XKf13zaTlNNmR2KZUpSYpVGYvcMv-cpRCbCtr7jmcbtJEN-lC_Lb0w%3D) studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_e=pBVFe0XWZjsmxcI9y-TIavuU_LCUZnjA56V4VzsA5eoc2M71iaw-ZD0PjLw2NCvsTvyICy4eY2OEIyuDRTnlqfyGGJ5n0huKQtD72OSmc3LBwrCquJrsIW-BZwN1OWl4ufWIHTrCc84zkfQEnu5AAYK8VLqVrLEYrwiaYDVdNkR3yfRLLa_uJwb3rJ5lkORODcHhYpoWc9PZaaBhGBp8_CxqDXAmcqVQWQ3TDm5ZOvWQCLZYUueq1kho6YRfmnCRaEdjNLSZUiGsjyeRrn4NO-KYlOmOOylqmmBwXrG1hv9uujeUP0kyHs-WhAyHlpJexmOhDhcP7eK9M3i0CkawKnhlfbl88JYkSuaAN8EZub-dBXUMAm3s_u8OxHoYv7PgY7W5lbNCS8V9Prl2viskyNeNbfb4UODLcbE4dlIOFic%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_e=pBVFe0XWZjsmxcI9y-TIavuU_LCUZnjA56V4VzsA5eoc2M71iaw-ZD0PjLw2NCvsTvyICy4eY2OEIyuDRTnlqfyGGJ5n0huKQtD72OSmc3LBwrCquJrsIW-BZwN1OWl4ufWIHTrCc84zkfQEnu5AAYK8VLqVrLEYrwiaYDVdNkR3yfRLLa_uJwb3rJ5lkORODcHhYpoWc9PZaaBhGBp8_CxqDXAmcqVQWQ3TDm5ZOvWQCLZYUueq1kho6YRfmnCRaEdjNLSZUiGsjyeRrn4NO4A6TfPF4GSVlKevd-nGhV9h0FOxldYs3B3ktFPuKQ3_qkTVeAwm9CxqaLC915y3ovfWwVQTY8I1ZwnhG6w8NuBd6SU68TBf4PTiXHhUsRAPC_bYwzuAHlx663gE3vEkpj7F14Ux2Xr-Ado20v2oTNE%3D) for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_e=pBVFe0XWZjsmxcI9y-TIavuU_LCUZnjA56V4VzsA5eoc2M71iaw-ZD0PjLw2NCvsTvyICy4eY2OEIyuDRTnlqfyGGJ5n0huKQtD72OSmc3LBwrCquJrsIW-BZwN1OWl4ufWIHTrCc84zkfQEnu5AAYK8VLqVrLEYrwiaYDVdNkR3yfRLLa_uJwb3rJ5lkORODcHhYpoWc9PZaaBhGBp8_CxqDXAmcqVQWQ3TDm5ZOvWQCLZYUueq1kho6YRfmnCRaEdjNLSZUiGsjyeRrn4NO_7hR-zQtOhFZWlf_Q60h-nA8Ge7UkMqyz1YRt6hsiDT9oPaKp87LtfsgRqCLgKZkVGuh6GNzhpsGMx3myv0JsMO6Vssj_UoCg29m06o5U31j6OtJV-h2cjt8yhfv01E3AbM1Sg2oai4AzyK4WO7W5E%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c2b49cda0abe407f8783973ff17bb3a6&_e=pBVFe0XWZjsmxcI9y-TIavuU_LCUZnjA56V4VzsA5eoc2M71iaw-ZD0PjLw2NCvsTvyICy4eY2OEIyuDRTnlqfyGGJ5n0huKQtD72OSmc3LBwrCquJrsIW-BZwN1OWl4ufWIHTrCc84zkfQEnu5AAYK8VLqVrLEYrwiaYDVdNkR3yfRLLa_uJwb3rJ5lkORODcHhYpoWc9PZaaBhGBp8_CxqDXAmcqVQWQ3TDm5ZOvWQCLZYUueq1kho6YRfmnCRaEdjNLSZUiGsjyeRrn4NO_t_uWdJ-r55KHpX6iYtThZhDh4a6NZR5ud5wX70Bcp1GCeuBojwF7EboGo2tw7ThByTrwnzhJiLPXCgWGioArYFw2bDPaQFLwFaVnQl_-vHO6ZOgktiL3NaRUL5y5Skezr_Y6tQsZte994-M8CznzQ%3D) Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=82f835348fc74c448601758821ef3e61&_e=HwyC7MfPYyrAPIyWH63-2eeINbuaweC1I33DNl3QEpom2WUUrIWLOa9idsBvrf0Hpn_abh35h-kQHkvpE0laUrhXgZ-Tqz6oZRC5LfBt2pAE6tg_UkPQAiZTuVW2ykK7vzX1CB-Jtq5-7nan3sXZ4mr1v82hiO542IuQTXC7OqY_fmy5Wvu99l5H0hgDHUyuq2pCXtZ_N2eEaCheQZb1pHmKlUBd7IgDPIaN1ufIVEAc0X4QK4ilsCwUkpybWM4JX__a5wXBgosyCaheU3srU5a9elpqrWS6ALytK0zf7B5Nq1IHIjbfYE6sAyMuToSGyT7mn0RVn3EF_7zuiSQabgOKY5Zb2f6lgRvf4QIkf-1a4e1ssu0u7I6q_15JQnGs95ZQLsIXBdc7Yg1mWeaCZ-jln3k00jPi_6ItPiFwBTA%3D)**
---
|

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=82f835348fc74c448601758821ef3e61&_e=HwyC7MfPYyrAPIyWH63-2eeINbuaweC1I33DNl3QEpom2WUUrIWLOa9idsBvrf0Hpn_abh35h-kQHkvpE0laUrhXgZ-Tqz6oZRC5LfBt2pAE6tg_UkPQAiZTuVW2ykK7vzX1CB-Jtq5-7nan3sXZ4mr1v82hiO542IuQTXC7OqY_fmy5Wvu99l5H0hgDHUyuq2pCXtZ_N2eEaCheQZb1pHmKlUBd7IgDPIaN1ufIVEAc0X4QK4ilsCwUkpybWM4JK51r-fNUGw47gSqLI4RhdALXTZNJa-y6TgVYCNa5xNBxSBnu7WB-aNesyfii1Z9UiZi7m8wcaR6mrEf3y9NcJGnv7glzGiXu9yyvnkF5Ma5P19Z9p3O7cnDwR0R00zKi6hsiODozH526AFYPj6G9TIVmaDTd7IsJSOxjePqsdoU%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=82f835348fc74c448601758821ef3e61&_e=HwyC7MfPYyrAPIyWH63-2eeINbuaweC1I33DNl3QEpom2WUUrIWLOa9idsBvrf0Hpn_abh35h-kQHkvpE0laUrhXgZ-Tqz6oZRC5LfBt2pAE6tg_UkPQAiZTuVW2ykK7vzX1CB-Jtq5-7nan3sXZ4mr1v82hiO542IuQTXC7OqY_fmy5Wvu99l5H0hgDHUyuq2pCXtZ_N2eEaCheQZb1pHmKlUBd7IgDPIaN1ufIVEAc0X4QK4ilsCwUkpybWM4Jk9H0ulwE20DgKKitQdUPIuTr-UkMpuWcX7YVpvKDEHB-Lc6EvVOaskW5BYrFqBpPitGoQvTCuqs1wiVNy_Se7psyvrO1D9O_Oo39F-E-e_mkMWgznHsXAjA_2_N0niE-Q57KudUisKAjDq-kVdl9XG4ddDDBCDjT8EhwiGZ_uKI%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=82f835348fc74c448601758821ef3e61&_e=HwyC7MfPYyrAPIyWH63-2eeINbuaweC1I33DNl3QEpom2WUUrIWLOa9idsBvrf0Hpn_abh35h-kQHkvpE0laUrhXgZ-Tqz6oZRC5LfBt2pAE6tg_UkPQAiZTuVW2ykK7vzX1CB-Jtq5-7nan3sXZ4mr1v82hiO542IuQTXC7OqY_fmy5Wvu99l5H0hgDHUyuq2pCXtZ_N2eEaCheQZb1pHmKlUBd7IgDPIaN1ufIVEAc0X4QK4ilsCwUkpybWM4JNRBmbMTObIQghdKX86S2F_AMD3RZlh_2s3Py4fSWEN-fMznlV6I3tXV015W3AAREScvvmOlmO5oF9VExon2q8ecFB-_ylYMpcJh5c5Pb2l5XCig6gDji_tC8hMtJMfV8MSL-nBGdsBvqKVcGQCUvoZs5Uk7689opVftdO9WP8Sw%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |

Kari Lake

Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=82f835348fc74c448601758821ef3e61&_e=HwyC7MfPYyrAPIyWH63-2eeINbuaweC1I33DNl3QEpom2WUUrIWLOa9idsBvrf0Hpn_abh35h-kQHkvpE0laUrhXgZ-Tqz6oZRC5LfBt2pAE6tg_UkPQAiZTuVW2ykK7vzX1CB-Jtq5-7nan3sXZ4mr1v82hiO542IuQTXC7OqY_fmy5Wvu99l5H0hgDHUyuq2pCXtZ_N2eEaCheQZb1pHmKlUBd7IgDPIaN1ufIVEAc0X4QK4ilsCwUkpybWM4JcA72O_HBF62B8Q8ckndFeAkU5oFLbjlLHqSzavwucaeyn0FMga1-jokQz1Kaoj1XzMwrOX5i6kTx7-J_CDT8TXoULstyH367HxhdbB9w5x3bko27bmRis5zLTame73dj-gzEap1iEhvdqztyxseX4UOaUzs_ZIeo9rE4tPkKWnE%3D)**

Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Lacy_Lunsford=C2=A0?=
subject: The hardest thing I’ve ever done
body:
| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Looking at this photo used to make me so proud.
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8JqhSxlcdyIODSZ-amNK8b7d6SQTLAfo428XOC3ZLN855zoUpI9sAHMF3uu_60d9tkUi0Mj8gpYRyEEezPvQzQLxgjcZD5Ggfdjs4VfzSmD4wUNViPR8XDSKPpKqlKBcxWEWZmrD3PGs54TSYrk_RSyXbR6iC7S8Xl51O5AN0Pl8Wmafv2aY-NjfgCynPkJh557ZMY0bR87BhwkJkfPOTkW_6EwABuAiXfFHyfe9D3JJ8nRkgQFTcrpjQforpIOIURx0JtONCLpC6TxFf_Fkokq95_1UT0gCZH2fXwsXIXIHCiKY42tIbFQSliopRpNWPXMYQViJ6LwHcv2NEcVGSSnyFSblf8qwsBf0O8Tfin8v)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8JqhSxlcdyIODSZ-amNK8b7d6SQTLAfo428XOC3ZLN855zoUpI9sAHMF3uu_60d9tkUi0Mj8gpYRyEEezPvQzQLxgjcZD5Ggfdjs4VfzSmD4wUNViPR8XDSKPpKqlKBcxWEWZmrD3PGs54TSYrk_RSyXbR6iC7S8Xl51O5AN0Pl8Wmafv2aY-NjfgCynPkJh557ZMY0bR87BhwkJkfPOTkWrFPrRzFpLyapoca4NNczNzQhcebHfFsgui-fAc8X_EbEcpdBgzOuVF-HjWdOvGMVBKkGd32cq3Z_6v1P8SfAYX8RRBqbPrWZo4LQyCibtjb4qge10yQ1kRzLaobx6HYwQHPMO_4dEPQPjonZw-Vqb)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8JqhSxlcdyIODSZ-amNK8b7d6SQTLAfo428XOC3ZLN855zoUpI9sAHMF3uu_60d9tkUi0Mj8gpYRyEEezPvQzQLxgjcZD5Ggfdjs4VfzSmD4wUNViPR8XDSKPpKqlKBcxWEWZmrD3PGs54TSYrk_RSyXbR6iC7S8Xl51O5AN0Pl8Wmafv2aY-NjfgCynPkJh557ZMY0bR87BhwkJkfPOTkUNG7dEwkWxGB5ZgBpIi9sBUgkW_kLqTmnwEkQELpN1-jzKRVkr89e9hn5gVI8nZLRCrL27ebYGH1EoERz1XQkl06BhHHq_dx_WJKhObKZO654bMyYbK-naIT1KtPeu6RLmp2ESVTUD3CEGin0bk6Zx)** Because next February **this Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try to rip my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for** _**11********years**_**\-- for saving a fellow officer's life.** I'm sorry, I'm so angry and heartbroken I don't even know where to begin. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8JqhSxlcdyIODSZ-amNK8b7d6SQTLAfo428XOC3ZLN855zoUpI9sAHMF3uu_60d9tkUi0Mj8gpYRyEEezPvQzQLxgjcZD5Ggfdjs4VfzSmD4wUNViPR8XDSKPpKqlKBcxWEWZmrD3PGs54TSYrk_RSyXbR6iC7S8Xl51O5AN0Pl8Wmafv2aY-NjfgCynPkJh557ZMY0bR87BhwkJkfPOTkUKTjACPQ1-4kB9tmMmC5BrwoFXFrSJcsoUCynncceWjqlM9HTnq9vRpNxepmEiZNCxOekD73laHfhJEtE3Yqs1CVpYV02HOUbMdxX4Plhy4jkTrSFF3fikBW1uDLHmVLUTWQeizSfMFSL0R1JsqflD)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8JqhSxlcdyIODSZ-amNK8b7d6SQTLAfo428XOC3ZLN855zoUpI9sAHMF3uu_60d9tkUi0Mj8gpYRyEEezPvQzQLxgjcZD5Ggfdjs4VfzSmD4wUNViPR8XDSKPpKqlKBcxWEWZmrD3PGs54TSYrk_RSyXbR6iC7S8Xl51O5AN0Pl8Wmafv2aY-NjfgCynPkJh557ZMY0bR87BhwkJkfPOTkWnCVwzq5hMMOJ5lBc0qC89Gnpti6H9_8tMa74oIWZlehvXzutcll4TkJocjyCvcYEO1aNxg0xJB2SGgehaUf3wFjDGLewqfhDL1faoTw-jipeDqlegu25f_Q87N6rzfRs3MaJhjo95RKYxW_BGXpQT) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8JqhSxlcdyIODSZ-amNK8b7d6SQTLAfo428XOC3ZLN855zoUpI9sAHMF3uu_60d9tkUi0Mj8gpYRyEEezPvQzQLxgjcZD5Ggfdjs4VfzSmD4wUNViPR8XDSKPpKqlKBcxWEWZmrD3PGs54TSYrk_RSyXbR6iC7S8Xl51O5AN0Pl8Wmafv2aY-NjfgCynPkJh557ZMY0bR87BhwkJkfPOTkUjEITDstqGkVpVVwGh4lHjyU1xvJH08flW8hqjX0-9Kq9pw1m1Cfo8bnXkoqwmIu0YIUHx0q0vev9Qwg5XlhNz_uqJvYstykknwoxsz-EWODzc2Bsmf0wZ1lKT2Tl5ff85v8v_F8hWsFcEut0-jd4_) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_
---
© Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_e=ckV7eEtBVPZLlGkv8CoN8NmF1akNAZpWX6_SJNUdoZT4UsFGJuMZ56f6cW36ng3RxAz2BkVY9Rvhu5DYbi8yNmBFxpOuKPW0ZBjO0-OWIC80qXOiuR03-9nISsO_Go3mQDg8-wXIrKfSCZOGshilJACTRcMqZz_JzlVjMSKmwTkvaAXHWLPIJlJRdHc8IyQi-mK7IEhukBGnLPla__BEdQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=cbac3ab8f1044141830d9993671098dc&_t=2JQTuZZSeVY-79p8lio1JbsApmGcCZulOerhXms1idBOLEG5cR07IFwsTY2HWPY4OxPXVCyJj90g3aFiMyONfNJVWgKx9PtJVItu4AQQ8mFnSc1VJAQP_FtuvDW-1VGE)

name: VoteVets
subject: Dangerous, Unfit, Compromised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
From Kennedy to Hegseth to Gabbard to Kash Patel — none of these people should be serving in positions of public trust and massive importance.
#
Peter —
Most people are taking some down time now. But at VoteVets, we’re gearing up. There’s too much coming for us to take time off. Think about it:
Trump’s working to purge the Military and fill it with loyalists.
His administration is laying the groundwork to gut the VA, sell it off to the lowest bidder, and slash care and benefits for the men and women who wore the uniform.
And his appointees are some of the most dangerous, unfit, and compromised individuals we’ve ever seen. From Kennedy to Hegseth to Gabbard to Kash Patel — none of these people should be serving in positions of public trust and massive importance.
**So, we’re asking you to chip in $5.**
Yes, just $5.
$5 might not seem like the kind of money that can stop Trump — and we’ll be completely honest with you, we’re not going to win every fight we pick.
But by chipping in $5 to VoteVets, you’re donating to an organization that will be at the forefront of the fight every day for the next four years. We’ll be working to defend the VA, to stop Trump from destroying the Military, and to block the worst of his appointees.
We get results when we drill down and find the places we can have the biggest impact. But we can’t do it alone. That’s why your $5 (or more, if you can afford it) makes such a big difference here.
How about it...
[**Can we count on you to chip in that $5 or whatever you can today as we prepare to take the fight to Trump and his administration?](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241208-1-30&t=1&akid=34013%2E3013755%2EANQOHy)**

Peter — Most people are taking some down time now. But at VoteVets, we’re gearing up. There’s too much coming for us to take time off. Think about it: Trump’s working to purge the Military and fill it with loyalists. His administration is laying the groundwork to gut the VA, sell it off to the lowest bidder, and slash care and benefits for the men and women who wore the uniform. And his appointees are some of the most dangerous, unfit, and compromised individuals we’ve ever seen. From Kennedy to Hegseth to Gabbard to Kash Patel — none of these people should be serving in positions of public trust and massive importance. So, we’re asking you to chip in $5. But by chipping in $5 to VoteVets, you’re donating to an organization that will be at the forefront of the fight every day for the next four years. subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:
Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.
It's a voice America needs

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

name: Josh Harder
subject: RFK Jr.
body:
Yikes.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98377888/516455601/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ5MWNmZDktOGNiNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BN1Utjqik7IorPMfZTJsaaeuhKJYjBtPQ8DcpZD_rTg=) | Peter, I’m truly scared about the possibility of RFK Jr. becoming Trump’s Secretary of Health and Human Services. This guy has spent years spreading wild conspiracy theories about vaccines and now Trump wants him in charge of our nation’s health policies? It’s not just irresponsible — it’s dangerous and genuinely puts our families in danger. Did you see the story from 2019? Over 80 people — mostly children — died as a result of the measles outbreak because RFK Jr. was scaring parents away from vaccinating their kids. His actions have real consequences! [_**We can’t let this happen. This article is a deeply personal and vulnerable piece about our daughter Hannah Noor. It is primarily written by my wife [Ayesha Noor](https://open.substack.com/users/247364977-ayesha-noor?utm_source=mentions). We are sharing this not because our daughter's story is special, but sadly, because her story is all too common. Every year thousands of children and adults suffer incomprehensible pain, suffering, and even death. They suffer not because we lack the means to treat them, but because exploitative insurance companies, incompetent bureaucrats, and apathetic politicians deny them access to the life saving care they need. In light of recent events [See: [America's Violent Health System](https://substack.com/redirect/1d43fd0c-af48-4b42-8313-217548e7ee59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)], we are sharing this story to bear witness to the preventable suffering of so many, the deadly violence imposed upon them, and to give hope that even in the darkest of times things can get better if we demand it. **Let 's Address This.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ab202c5-8d64-43d8-818f-67e9fd389469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hannah Noor (Pictured Right) at 5 hours old.
### A Scream in the Dark
It was just after her sixth birthday in 2021 when our daughter screamed from her bed in the middle of the night. We rushed to her room to find she had thrown up all over her bed. We cleaned her up, changed her sheets, and blamed the incident on the Oreos she'd eaten after dinner. The next day she complained of a stomach ache and rushed to the bathroom, experiencing diarrhea. Like most parents, we dismissed it as a passing bug--kids get diarrhea now and then. But something felt different this time, even though it was her first experience.
When it happened again just a short time later, the stomach pain was more severe. She screamed, cried, and rushed to the bathroom, but this time there was blood--so much blood. It terrified us. Before we could even make it to urgent care, she had another episode with even more bleeding. We hurried her in, only to be told by the nurse practitioner to "keep her hydrated" and that it was probably a stomach virus. But again, something in our gut told us otherwise.
This was just before Thanksgiving 2021, and I convinced myself she'd recover over the break and be able to return to school. She loved school, as most kindergarteners do. But the bleeding continued. The pain worsened. More urgent care and pediatrician visits followed, but answers did not. By now, our once energetic and chatty daughter was pale, frightened, and visibly losing weight.
### Navigating Through the Dark
We reached out to a close friend who happened to be a pediatric gastroenterologist. His questions and careful listening indicated it was not a simple virus, but he didn't say much directly. He urged us to connect with the GI team at Children's National Hospital in Washington D.C. Unfortunately, we were met with insurance hurdles and skepticism from her pediatrician. Weeks passed, and her condition deteriorated until, thanks to our friend's intervention, we finally secured an appointment with a pediatric GI doctor in December.
Hannah Noor, now frail and scared, was put on iron supplements, and an colonoscopy was scheduled for January. She now weighed just 30 pounds--skin and bones, and we feared the worst. Her fear of eating, going to the bathroom, or even moving too much consumed her days. Our winter break became a period of sleepless nights, endless tears, and prayers. We felt like prisoners trying to navigate through treacherous terrain while blindfolded and shackled.
The preparation for the scope was grueling--a 24-hour liquid diet. To make matters worse, a severe snowstorm in early January 2022 left us without power for three days. Despite the chaos, we made it to the hospital. As I held her tiny hand, she bravely went under anesthesia. Hours later, the doctors confirmed what we feared: Hannah had ulcers all over her colon.
Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) was the diagnosis--a chronic, lifelong condition that would require extensive management. Even as the doctor explained, I couldn't fully grasp the gravity of it. I naively asked, "_How long will she need the medication_?" The doctor replied--"_Do you understand what it means to have IBD? This is for life_."
It shattered me. My world crumbled.
Steroids, with their array of side effects, initially helped stabilize her condition, and she was subsequently started on mesalamine. However, managing IBD is never straightforward. Moving homes and finding a new doctor compatible with our insurance became an uphill battle. Procuring mesalamine was a nightmare, as our insurance kept on requiring prior-authorization--a term we'd never even heard before. Evidently, even though our doctor had prescribed a specific medication to save our daughter's life, the insurance company required their non-medically trained admins to agree that our board certified physician knew what she was doing in prescribing the medication she prescribed. Spoiler: They disagreed and repeatedly denied the critical medication our daughter needed.
Making matters worse, moving meant we were in between doctors. Desperate to try anything to improve Hannah's quality of life, we spent hours consulting with a nutritionist to see if dietary changes could make a difference. We invested extensive time and resources into a gluten-free diet, but it did not help at all; in fact, it made her averse to eating. We also tried the FODMAP diet, which was recommended during a flare, but it added to the confusion of what she should or shouldn't eat. Every day became a battle over something as simple as food--one filled with uncertainty and frustration. Despite our efforts, Hannah's condition remained unpredictable, with debilitating flares continuing to disrupt her life. By late 2023, we had pursued every imaginable route to find a way to protect our daughter's health and life, and yet felt exhausted and at a dead end.
It was clear that only one option remained--she needed a quickly advancing form of therapy known as biological treatment. This would be a direct IV infusion of medication to stabilize the IBD, every six to eight weeks, forever.
### A Dark Dead End
We were at the end of the road. If we couldn't access biologic treatment, there was nowhere left to go. But what we hoped would finally bring us closure and healing, resulted in yet another emotional roller coaster and painful circus--our insurance corporation blocked us. Turns out, insurance corporations block more than 51% of patients whose doctors prescribe them biologic treatment to save their lives.
The recommended biologic promised not a cure, but a chance at living a healthy life. Our insurance rejected us outright reasoning that we hadn't tried other medications first--a policy called "step therapy." Despite our daughter's life threatening condition, they wanted us to try every other variation of every other possible medication--knowing full well they would likely fail just as much and make our daughter suffer, vomit, bleed, and lose weight. But that did not matter to them, because that was the preferable path to ensure they "_maximized shareholder value_."
Our doctor stepped in and conducted a peer-to-peer direct meeting with the insurance company to show all the data, blood tests, and medical reports to prove that our daughter needed biologics to live. To show without a shadow of a doubt that the yet untried medications they demanded we try were not substantively different than the plethora of medications we had tried and had not worked. Yet, that meeting also went in vain. The insurance company still refused to approve our claim. And Hannah Noor's condition worsened. She was pale, swollen from steroids, in pain, losing weight, and back to missing school.
We finally contemplated paying for the biologic treatment out of pocket. We knew it would only require six doses a year. How much could one dose be, after all? We checked and our hearts sank once more. Each dosage cost and administration would run into the tens of thousands of dollars. A year's supply to keep our daughter alive would run into the hundreds of thousands. We certainly did not have that kind of money. We were cornered and desperate.
We contemplated what any parents might. Do we sell the house and cars and move into a small apartment? Do we set up a GoFundMe? Do we borrow money from family and friends? Do we take out a second mortgage?
Do we file for medical bankruptcy, as 500,000 Americans do annually?
But we soon learned another sinister result of hyper-privatization of health insurance--even if we had the excessive means to pay the hundreds of thousands of dollars out of pocket, the hospital would not accept the funds. Why? The industry is such that not only do insurance companies deny 51% of claims, they have enacted policies forbidding people from paying for the critical medication they need out of pocket, lest the insurance company lose control and revenue. "_Either you pay us, or you pay no one_ ," is a line you'd expect out of a mafia handbook--not out of a health provider. This is not health insurance, this is health exploitation.
### A Spark of Light in the Darkness
In that moment of confusion we happened to run into to a fellow parent who, now is a great friend, and learned her children shared a similar medical struggle. She suggested calling the biologic manufacturers directly and applying for their patient assistance program. An idea that seems so obvious now, but something we did not even know was a possibility then.
The application process was tedious, and even then, it was initially rejected. But after weeks of back-and-forth, countless phone calls, and sleepless nights, a miracle happened--we finally secured approval. We let out a cathartic sigh of relief after more than two years of suffocation. And to be sure, the approval was not through our insurance company, who never even bothered to offer such an option, likely because it would cost them money. Rather, the approval was from the drug manufacturer directly. To this day our health insurance company has refused to budge on their cruel and calloused "maximizing shareholder value" decision to deny our daughter the medicine she needs to live.
On March 6, 2024--more than two months after the doctor first prescribed it, a period in which our daughter suffered horrific and unimaginable pain, bleeding, and vomiting--Hannah Noor received her first infusion at Comer Children's Hospital in Chicago. And since then, everything has changed. Her spark of light returned. Our daughter was back.
### The Light We Create
A process that should have only taken 30-60 days from the night we heard that scream in the dark, took us on a 28 month torturous journey to finally see light again. Hannah Noor's journey since starting biologic treatment has been a blessing. She's eating, playing, drawing, and even learning karate (currently a Yellow Belt). The last three years of her life had been a torture for her, but now she is finally thriving as any 9-year-old girl should. Though the fear of flares always looms, we refuse to let it dictate our lives. Herbal and homeopathic treatments complement her medical regimen, and her strength inspires us daily.
As for our insurance company? Those corporate leeches also denied covering the hospital costs as well. Fortunately, despite that high price tag still running into the thousands, we tightened our belts and found a way to pay for that out of pocket, and continue to pay for that out of pocket. (We were shocked there wasn't some additional insurance rule preventing us from paying our hospital directly). Despite us paying our insurance premiums every single month without exception, our insurance company has not covered a single penny of our daughter's critical healthcare needs. The care she needs to live. But at least they're maximizing shareholder value.
This story isn't just about one child's struggle with IBD; it's about the systemic barriers hundreds of millions of families face every single day. From insurance denials to inaccessible care, to step therapy nonsense, to prior authorization red tape, the system fails the most vulnerable. What if we didn't speak English? What if we couldn't afford out-of-pocket costs for tests and treatments? What if one of our close friends didn't just happen to be a national expert on this particular rare disease, and couldn't leverage his relationships to get us access to a world leading expert? What if we didn't have a network of supportive friends to recommend new ways to acquire this life saving medicine?
### A Brighter Future Is Possible
We named our daughter Hannah Noor because _Hannah_ was the mother of Mary Mother of Jesus, and _Noor_ means light. We couldn't think of a more beautiful name for our only daughter, and she has lived up to it every day of her life.
In these darkest of times, she is the Light of our eyes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ee80bc41-a868-4313-adde-dff83ddfa9dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hannah Noor (now 9) at a recent family vacation in Lahore, Pakistan. Here she is giggling at a cat that wandered over to say meow, which Hannah Noor reminded us means "hello" in cat language.
Hannah Noor's story highlights a flawed and cruel system that places profits over people. Yet it also underscores the power of advocacy, persistence, and community. To every parent navigating the complexities of chronic illness: stay strong, fight relentlessly for your child, and lean on the resources available, like the [Crohn's and Colitis Foundation](https://substack.com/redirect/b4f9f53c-351d-4a50-827f-1bf26df7a033?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and do not underestimate support groups on Facebook. If I can be of any support, do not hesitate to reach out at **ayesha [dot] noor @ gmail.com**.
Hannah Noor is living proof that even in the darkest moments, there is hope. She teaches us daily to believe in miracles--and to fight for them when necessary. It is also a reminder that our for profit exploitative health insurance system will always only serve the wealthy elites, the stock market, and whatever private investor who decides to buy and sell these corporations. They will not serve the people. Not our beautiful baby girl, nor the nearly 70,000 Americans who die annually due to lack of care, nor the 500,000 Americans who are forced to file for medical bankruptcy every single year. It is by the sheer grace of the Almighty that we still have our wonderful Light with us today. But for so many parents and families, the end result is not so fortunate.
Perhaps the most frustrating part about all of this is that the medication to save our child's life existed all along. But because some calloused business person decided her life wasn't profitable enough and worth saving, it was an acceptable cost to reject her claim and let her die.
It is our responsibility to demand better, not just for our daughter, but for all the daughters, sons, and children out there. We do not suffer from a lack of resources, but from an excess of greed. We can ensure high quality, accessible, and affordable healthcare for all people in this country--but we cannot ensure the satiation of greed for the billionaire corporations, corrupt politicians, and elitists who care more about shareholder value than the survival of innocent children. We have to choose one side. And we choose the children of this great country--we hope you do too.

Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! A deeply personal and vulnerable story about our daughter, the power of resilience, and the desperate need for change | | and | Dec 8 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | This article is a deeply personal and vulnerable piece about our daughter Hannah Noor. It is primarily written by my wife . We are sharing this not because our daughter's story is special, but sadly, because her story is all too common. Every year thousands of children and adults suffer incomprehensible pain, suffering, and even death. They suffer not because we lack the means to treat them, but because exploitative insurance companies, incompetent bureaucrats, and apathetic politicians deny them access to the life saving care they need. In light of recent events ], we are sharing this story to bear witness to the preventable suffering of so many, the deadly violence imposed upon them, and to give hope that even in the darkest of times things can get better if we demand it. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Hannah Noor (Pictured Right) at 5 hours old. A Scream in the Dark It was just after her sixth birthday in 2021 when our daughter screamed from her bed in the middle of the night. We rushed to her room to find she had thrown up all over her bed. We cleaned her up, changed her sheets, and blamed the incident on the Oreos she'd eaten after dinner. The next day she complained of a stomach ache and rushed to the bathroom, experiencing diarrhea. Like most parents, we dismissed it as a passing bug--kids get diarrhea now and then. But something felt different this time, even though it was her first experience. When it happened again just a short time later, the stomach pain was more severe. She screamed, cried, and rushed to the bathroom, but this time there was blood--so much blood. It terrified us. Before we could even make it to urgent care, she had another episode with even more bleeding. We hurried her in, only to be told by the nurse practitioner to "keep her hydrated" and that it was probably a stomach virus. But again, something in our gut told us otherwise. This was just before Thanksgiving 2021, and I convinced myself she'd recover over the break and be able to return to school. She loved school, as most kindergarteners do. But the bleeding continued. The pain worsened. More urgent care and pediatrician visits followed, but answers did not. By now, our once energetic and chatty daughter was pale, frightened, and visibly losing weight. Navigating Through the Dark We reached out to a close friend who happened to be a pediatric gastroenterologist. His questions and careful listening indicated it was not a simple virus, but he didn't say much directly. He urged us to connect with the GI team at Children's National Hospital in Washington D.C. Unfortunately, we were met with insurance hurdles and skepticism from her pediatrician. Weeks passed, and her condition deteriorated until, thanks to our friend's intervention, we finally secured an appointment with a pediatric GI doctor in December. Hannah Noor, now frail and scared, was put on iron supplements, and an colonoscopy was scheduled for January. She now weighed just 30 pounds--skin and bones, and we feared the worst. Her fear of eating, going to the bathroom, or even moving too much consumed her days. Our winter break became a period of sleepless nights, endless tears, and prayers. We felt like prisoners trying to navigate through treacherous terrain while blindfolded and shackled. The preparation for the scope was grueling--a 24-hour liquid diet. To make matters worse, a severe snowstorm in early January 2022 left us without power for three days. Despite the chaos, we made it to the hospital. As I held her tiny hand, she bravely went under anesthesia. Hours later, the doctors confirmed what we feared: Hannah had ulcers all over her colon. Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) was the diagnosis--a chronic, lifelong condition that would require extensive management. Even as the doctor explained, I couldn't fully grasp the gravity of it. I naively asked, "How long will she need the medication?" The doctor replied--"Do you understand what it means to have IBD? This is for life." It shattered me. My world crumbled. Steroids, with their array of side effects, initially helped stabilize her condition, and she was subsequently started on mesalamine. However, managing IBD is never straightforward. Moving homes and finding a new doctor compatible with our insurance became an uphill battle. Procuring mesalamine was a nightmare, as our insurance kept on requiring prior-authorization--a term we'd never even heard before. Evidently, even though our doctor had prescribed a specific medication to save our daughter's life, the insurance company required their non-medically trained admins to agree that our board certified physician knew what she was doing in prescribing the medication she prescribed. Spoiler: They disagreed and repeatedly denied the critical medication our daughter needed. Making matters worse, moving meant we were in between doctors. Desperate to try anything to improve Hannah's quality of life, we spent hours consulting with a nutritionist to see if dietary changes could make a difference. We invested extensive time and resources into a gluten-free diet, but it did not help at all; in fact, it made her averse to eating. We also tried the FODMAP diet, which was recommended during a flare, but it added to the confusion of what she should or shouldn't eat. Every day became a battle over something as simple as food--one filled with uncertainty and frustration. Despite our efforts, Hannah's condition remained unpredictable, with debilitating flares continuing to disrupt her life. By late 2023, we had pursued every imaginable route to find a way to protect our daughter's health and life, and yet felt exhausted and at a dead end. It was clear that only one option remained--she needed a quickly advancing form of therapy known as biological treatment. This would be a direct IV infusion of medication to stabilize the IBD, every six to eight weeks, forever. A Dark Dead End We were at the end of the road. If we couldn't access biologic treatment, there was nowhere left to go. But what we hoped would finally bring us closure and healing, resulted in yet another emotional roller coaster and painful circus--our insurance corporation blocked us. Turns out, insurance corporations block more than 51% of patients whose doctors prescribe them biologic treatment to save their lives. The recommended biologic promised not a cure, but a chance at living a healthy life. Our insurance rejected us outright reasoning that we hadn't tried other medications first--a policy called "step therapy." Despite our daughter's life threatening condition, they wanted us to try every other variation of every other possible medication--knowing full well they would likely fail just as much and make our daughter suffer, vomit, bleed, and lose weight. But that did not matter to them, because that was the preferable path to ensure they "maximized shareholder value." Our doctor stepped in and conducted a peer-to-peer direct meeting with the insurance company to show all the data, blood tests, and medical reports to prove that our daughter needed biologics to live. To show without a shadow of a doubt that the yet untried medications they demanded we try were not substantively different than the plethora of medications we had tried and had not worked. Yet, that meeting also went in vain. The insurance company still refused to approve our claim. And Hannah Noor's condition worsened. She was pale, swollen from steroids, in pain, losing weight, and back to missing school. We finally contemplated paying for the biologic treatment out of pocket. We knew it would only require six doses a year. How much could one dose be, after all? We checked and our hearts sank once more. Each dosage cost and administration would run into the tens of thousands of dollars. A year's supply to keep our daughter alive would run into the hundreds of thousands. We certainly did not have that kind of money. We were cornered and desperate. We contemplated what any parents might. Do we sell the house and cars and move into a small apartment? Do we set up a GoFundMe? Do we borrow money from family and friends? Do we take out a second mortgage? Do we file for medical bankruptcy, as 500,000 Americans do annually? But we soon learned another sinister result of hyper-privatization of health insurance--even if we had the excessive means to pay the hundreds of thousands of dollars out of pocket, the hospital would not accept the funds. Why? The industry is such that not only do insurance companies deny 51% of claims, they have enacted policies forbidding people from paying for the critical medication they need out of pocket, lest the insurance company lose control and revenue. "Either you pay us, or you pay no one ," is a line you'd expect out of a mafia handbook--not out of a health provider. This is not health insurance, this is health exploitation. A Spark of Light in the Darkness In that moment of confusion we happened to run into to a fellow parent who, now is a great friend, and learned her children shared a similar medical struggle. She suggested calling the biologic manufacturers directly and applying for their patient assistance program. An idea that seems so obvious now, but something we did not even know was a possibility then. The application process was tedious, and even then, it was initially rejected. But after weeks of back-and-forth, countless phone calls, and sleepless nights, a miracle happened--we finally secured approval. We let out a cathartic sigh of relief after more than two years of suffocation. And to be sure, the approval was not through our insurance company, who never even bothered to offer such an option, likely because it would cost them money. Rather, the approval was from the drug manufacturer directly. To this day our health insurance company has refused to budge on their cruel and calloused "maximizing shareholder value" decision to deny our daughter the medicine she needs to live. On March 6, 2024--more than two months after the doctor first prescribed it, a period in which our daughter suffered horrific and unimaginable pain, bleeding, and vomiting--Hannah Noor received her first infusion at Comer Children's Hospital in Chicago. And since then, everything has changed. Her spark of light returned. Our daughter was back. The Light We Create A process that should have only taken 30-60 days from the night we heard that scream in the dark, took us on a 28 month torturous journey to finally see light again. Hannah Noor's journey since starting biologic treatment has been a blessing. She's eating, playing, drawing, and even learning karate (currently a Yellow Belt). The last three years of her life had been a torture for her, but now she is finally thriving as any 9-year-old girl should. Though the fear of flares always looms, we refuse to let it dictate our lives. Herbal and homeopathic treatments complement her medical regimen, and her strength inspires us daily. As for our insurance company? Those corporate leeches also denied covering the hospital costs as well. Fortunately, despite that high price tag still running into the thousands, we tightened our belts and found a way to pay for that out of pocket, and continue to pay for that out of pocket. (We were shocked there wasn't some additional insurance rule preventing us from paying our hospital directly). Despite us paying our insurance premiums every single month without exception, our insurance company has not covered a single penny of our daughter's critical healthcare needs. The care she needs to live. But at least they're maximizing shareholder value. This story isn't just about one child's struggle with IBD; it's about the systemic barriers hundreds of millions of families face every single day. From insurance denials to inaccessible care, to step therapy nonsense, to prior authorization red tape, the system fails the most vulnerable. What if we didn't speak English? What if we couldn't afford out-of-pocket costs for tests and treatments? What if one of our close friends didn't just happen to be a national expert on this particular rare disease, and couldn't leverage his relationships to get us access to a world leading expert? What if we didn't have a network of supportive friends to recommend new ways to acquire this life saving medicine? A Brighter Future Is Possible We named our daughter Hannah Noor because Hannah was the mother of Mary Mother of Jesus, and Noor means light. We couldn't think of a more beautiful name for our only daughter, and she has lived up to it every day of her life. In these darkest of times, she is the Light of our eyes. | | ---|---|--- Hannah Noor (now 9) at a recent family vacation in Lahore, Pakistan. Here she is giggling at a cat that wandered over to say meow, which Hannah Noor reminded us means "hello" in cat language. Hannah Noor's story highlights a flawed and cruel system that places profits over people. Yet it also underscores the power of advocacy, persistence, and community. To every parent navigating the complexities of chronic illness: stay strong, fight relentlessly for your child, and lean on the resources available, like the , and do not underestimate support groups on Facebook. If I can be of any support, do not hesitate to reach out at ayesha [dot] noor @ gmail.com. Hannah Noor is living proof that even in the darkest moments, there is hope. She teaches us daily to believe in miracles--and to fight for them when necessary. It is also a reminder that our for profit exploitative health insurance system will always only serve the wealthy elites, the stock market, and whatever private investor who decides to buy and sell these corporations. They will not serve the people. Not our beautiful baby girl, nor the nearly 70,000 Americans who die annually due to lack of care, nor the 500,000 Americans who are forced to file for medical bankruptcy every single year. It is by the sheer grace of the Almighty that we still have our wonderful Light with us today. But for so many parents and families, the end result is not so fortunate. Perhaps the most frustrating part about all of this is that the medication to save our child's life existed all along. But because some calloused business person decided her life wasn't profitable enough and worth saving, it was an acceptable cost to reject her claim and let her die. It is our responsibility to demand better, not just for our daughter, but for all the daughters, sons, and children out there. We do not suffer from a lack of resources, but from an excess of greed. We can ensure high quality, accessible, and affordable healthcare for all people in this country--but we cannot ensure the satiation of greed for the billionaire corporations, corrupt politicians, and elitists who care more about shareholder value than the survival of innocent children. We have to choose one side. And we choose the children of this great country--we hope you do too. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.** | A guest post by| believe in the empowerment, equality, & public representation of women & girls. My blogposts will advance that belief. You 're currently a free subscriber to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. When possible, I hope you'll upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Swamp Digest

name: PragerU
subject: Did you hear what Google did?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

In case you missed it, Google recently removed the PragerU app
from the Play Store without warning. Only after our app
disappeared from Google's platform did they bother to notify us
that it had been suspended and removed indefinitely for
"Violation of Hate Speech."

Stand Up to Big Tech

In the email from Google, they said our app contained "content
or speech asserting that a protected group is inhuman, inferior,
or worthy of being hated," referring to our recently released
short documentary, Dear Infidels: A Warning to America, which
features first-hand accounts from individuals who escaped the
oppressive grip of radical Islamic rule.

According to Google, sharing the stories of a former
Palestinian refugee, an Arab Muslim born in Israel, and brave
U.S. Navy SEALs who witnessed the horrors of Muslim extremism
constitutes "hate speech."

Dear Infidels went viral on social media, reaching millions of
people! Like clockwork, Big Tech reared its ugly head to shut us
down and suppress our reach.

We immediately jumped into action and began sounding the alarm.
Thanks to our dedicated followers and supporters, Big Tech did
NOT win, and their Soviet-style censorship tactics were thwarted.

After major outcry from our supporters and several media
outlets, Google put the PragerU app back on the Google Play
Store…for now.

Unfortunately, we know this won't be the last time we are
targeted by Big Tech giants. It is imperative that we keep
fighting for our freedoms.

At PragerU, we always fight back, but we need your help. This
is a David vs. Goliath battle. They may expect us to give up and
throw in the towel, but as long as there is breath in our lungs,
and courageous supporters like you standing beside us, we refuse
to be silenced.

Join us in the fight against Big Tech censorship with a 100%
tax-deductible donation.

Your generous tax-deductible donation will help us to keep
fighting Big Tech, expand our reach, and continue our mission to
educate and inspire Americans with the truth. Every dollar counts
in this battle for free speech and the future of our nation.

Donate now to ensure PragerU's voice remains loud and clear!

Sincerely,

Your PragerU team

Donate Now

Copyright © 2024 PragerU

All rights reserved.

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
