name: Amanda Chase
subject: Final Count Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
6 days until election day in Senate District 10
| | | | Things You Should Know
---
---
|
# 6 Days Until Election Day
---
|
# LOGISTICS DETAILS
---
|
# VOLUNTEER FOR AMANDA
---
| Greetings!, Only 6 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road.
Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote.
Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location.
We are looking for volunteers outside of the district to volunteer for the day. If you have a 15 passenger van and would be willing to transport attendees from the parking areas to the voting location, please click[ here.](mailto:Britton@chaseforva.com) We also need door greeters and people with trucks.
There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking.
Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin.
Once voters are registered at the door, they will wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots:
Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely
Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50% plus one.
If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50% plus one, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place.
If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50% plus one, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50% plus one.
The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat.
Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat.
---
| |
---
Here's something to think about.
The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one.
Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years.
How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%
They can't.
And yes. I will work with the new Republican Senate leadership.
Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases. I had a serious problem with sitting under Republican leadership who was not a true conservative. When conservative leaders refused to stand up to the moderate leader, I voluntarily chose to leave the caucus. It was about standing for principle, not personality. This leader retired in 2023. Leader McDougle is a conservative, like me.
I do plan to rejoin the Republican Senate Caucus. Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so. I had to do it.
Now we have good leadership. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office.
I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors in Amelia County and School Board members in Hanover County.
I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. You can't buy me. I work for the people of Senate District 10.
The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
Thank you! For God & Country,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023

clean_body: 6 days until election day in Senate District 10 | | | | Things You Should Know | 6 Days Until Election Day | LOGISTICS DETAILS | VOLUNTEER FOR AMANDA | Greetings!, Only 6 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. We are looking for volunteers outside of the district to volunteer for the day. If you have a 15 passenger van and would be willing to transport attendees from the parking areas to the voting location, please clickmailto:Britton@chaseforva.com We also need door greeters and people with trucks. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking. Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin. Once voters are registered at the door, they will wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots: Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50% plus one. If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50% plus one, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place. If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50% plus one, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50% plus one. The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat. Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat. | | Here's something to think about. The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years. How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100% They can't. And yes. I will work with the new Republican Senate leadership. Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases. I had a serious problem with sitting under Republican leadership who was not a true conservative. When conservative leaders refused to stand up to the moderate leader, I voluntarily chose to leave the caucus. It was about standing for principle, not personality. This leader retired in 2023. Leader McDougle is a conservative, like me. I do plan to rejoin the Republican Senate Caucus. Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so. I had to do it. Now we have good leadership. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office. I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors in Amelia County and School Board members in Hanover County. I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. You can't buy me. I work for the people of Senate District 10. The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. Thank you! For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | | | | == | | == | PARKING | | | | == | | | Miss one of my emails? | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Why we need Christian attorneys
body:
This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life

| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyEkLtqwzAYRp9G3mR0vwwaCsVT06FLR_NL-h0LZDvISkveviQv0Pn7OBzO92W-QKllv37ChmGpbW7nDDinmunKZ8GEolxQ5mY-5MC4z0oNGLiV0jglGBvWoI2MxmBcHHqnUPtkQYqoOWShosWhhCeHC-a440b4MXnmGBPG5MgXvTiiGFRsfVwaYj422HMtEVt_NLwdrY_p2IYa1t5vJ5FvRExETCeme8MRdszH60HElNZWzl5gpxWvUOl5pIL98VxyVlZHRz3qRNViIwWugZroNXdWCQtA5HQe95ZwTkdGIt-njy_tmeRDC_n2W2otp7FEsesGpb6k-j_NfoL4CwAA__9q_W2e)

Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. **[**And I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST in support of our newest lawsuit.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c0541ce60c14184932e2adc8f290732&_e=rBSJA9z2d0tmq0MOdhyOVwcHtXQXxjNzlgriO1jpLIZpBW8SCgWRypxVHnk240__Us93JMjT4cE7sEPwPBc21ZlRNS78kWTsVqJEGh7sKF_etdVYjXtGIPun6PwNR_EYAfuUOUkNxzIeApCvjICmohIaJ8CGuhQECAIq1gQi_hqd-7U3Ojz0tIaEb2NXGPO8DEftU7rlGowdxyQzl1xTvI5QjsbYkRUWs3gXN4PZGtne0Z4yfuJrkAb1OeX0ZZlFiDRR-8vCHSSkXt5S0fUsfnBI7LBf9ido_W9EGmD5GG3G-wQ9RPpApFEQ50BfhS-SvDMhU3HoAD564CXL6DQTntMc1_9oSgY7ggtBFfdvN13HZeZ8LfmNfAYcSUtxD-eJ_v1zmF4kWOjppmHxai1sdQ%3D%3D)** Please let me explain...Our client, Nicole Solas, is a courageous mother of two from Rhode Island. She refused to blindly trust that the leftists running her children's school had their best interests at heart -- so she requested to view the curriculum being taught in her child's _**kindergarten**_ class.Nicole quickly learned the only way to find out what's really going on in schools is to file public records requests -- and it cost her $74,000 in fees just to obtain public records that should be readily available to parents!Worse, the teachers' union SUED Nicole to try to stop the school district from providing her with the curriculum and public records she requested.Peter, you're probably wondering _what is the school district hiding?_ Well, Nicole did not back down. She did not waver. **And now, she's exposing the pornographic materials educators use _in the classroom_ to sexualize young children.**No child should be exposed to pornography -- but we're specifically talking about a kindergarten curriculum. Little 5 and 6-year-old children! _Is this what you want for your kids or grandkids?_ I have an 8-year-old daughter and a 4-year-old son, and just thinking about this makes me sick -- so __**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c0541ce60c14184932e2adc8f290732&_e=rBSJA9z2d0tmq0MOdhyOVwcHtXQXxjNzlgriO1jpLIZpBW8SCgWRypxVHnk240__Us93JMjT4cE7sEPwPBc21ZlRNS78kWTsVqJEGh7sKF_etdVYjXtGIPun6PwNR_EYAfuUOUkNxzIeApCvjICmohIaJ8CGuhQECAIq1gQi_hqd-7U3Ojz0tIaEb2NXGPO8DEftU7rlGowdxyQzl1xTvI5QjsbYkRUWs3gXN4PZGtne0Z4yfuJrkAb1OeX0ZZlFaCgbkZ-qKXV-Nh6w6aeJX51DnbDzN68cjuyttOvE-3WKpfNBiHqRc2DUpwq-exNufrEYe_tS4DOrlvyWLpqDTyrWC3EHzyy57JVsGslEEzrCLsvY8OB48V3YsSZvjQq81YKUwXXIKxNRo_UOYuo5MA%3D%3D)** Because believe it or not, this story gets worse... Biden's Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona used his official government account on X to condemn efforts to "censor" books -- so Nicole exercised her First Amendment rights in response.She replied to Secretary Cardona's post by posting cartoon images from the controversial "banned" book _Fun Home: A Family Tragicomic._ The images are cartoon drawings of teenage children performing sexual acts on each other.Secretary Cardona apparently agreed that such images were not appropriate for public view because within minutes of Nicole’s reply post, he used X's "hide" function to censor the post from public view. **_Too inappropriate for X but not for young children in public schools seems to be the Department of Education’s position on pornography._** That's why I'm thrilled that we are suing Secretary Cardona for violating Nicole's First Amendment rights.You know what they say, daylight is the best disinfectant and Nicole is shining a whole lot of light on what is really going on in the classroom. **[**I hope you'll join us by adding your name to this CITIZEN PROTEST.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c0541ce60c14184932e2adc8f290732&_e=rBSJA9z2d0tmq0MOdhyOVwcHtXQXxjNzlgriO1jpLIZpBW8SCgWRypxVHnk240__Us93JMjT4cE7sEPwPBc21ZlRNS78kWTsVqJEGh7sKF_etdVYjXtGIPun6PwNR_EYAfuUOUkNxzIeApCvjICmohIaJ8CGuhQECAIq1gQi_hqd-7U3Ojz0tIaEb2NXGPO8DEftU7rlGowdxyQzl1xTvI5QjsbYkRUWs3gXN4PZGtne0Z4yfuJrkAb1OeX0ZZlFyF4Bg50nbs0HrrMgeIu_7LggLYQ-goJFupSV495EC-fD36PGV1ApjxwGIzhTSjjbqbneqESQSiAN-OZlvv66YWnDUha8Hcf9crPvEBKdMzf_47n4nGBjBW5lyWvKUc7wBT-zuwnDQ71UlGfiOXpGRA%3D%3D)** You and I cannot allow government officials to get away with leveraging their power to discriminate against viewpoints that make them look bad or that they disagree with.The left wants to abolish your First Amendment rights and if we give them an inch, they'll take a mile. Thank you in advance for standing with us -- and for standing with Nicole -- in this critical new lawsuit.

---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---

clean_body: Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst | Dear Friend, Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car – I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice. And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: Newsweek : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! That’s why I will KEEP FIGHTING for my God-given freedoms and rights. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| | Dear Fellow American,

As we begin to rebuild our country next year after four years of leftist tyranny, we just completed The Heritage Foundation's key strategic goals for the next four years.

We aim to:
* Dismantle the administrative state and reestablish a constitutional republic.
* Defeat globalism and defend America's interests at home and abroad.
* Take back and build American institutions.
* Restore the family.
* Promote opportunity for all.

**I 'd love to get your thoughts on these goals. So my team put together this brief survey on this strategy that you can complete at the link below. **

[**https://secured.heritage.org/thf-end-of-year-survey/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=73d720eba2db4c82abb60c0b8262b410&_e=WmJqXB0FLWx3PZqs816eV40SrC_BTImNQqOJX5mBa0LT6iDZbF5ugjnTVkKipHI-Sd95d1PFLa8ptpOHz1PQ125HFlDZoVAq0O0e-BXkQshbtvVfcma2OAcQ-wFuz6pa0j9rRUaBoRrMQLcN7vl3kCF7peMYQX6JQ4s6lsEfS9G2UPYUtg6VuqXp3yvKxHOJQN4PrcJcXTcWcNSgAVPR6jFqgDj0nVwr3-Vnu8Bvd6rTf0hRumRNWEqOVuYTSkW54vGRHFHtLMpivWbiqWOEc6mevl3hGFduImhHntzre2GlOSuuXsDII8oxARbH2i0JrdC17aeIH-x9CD9DWJ2_X51323TUjNnYFnELFBJ0N7Y%3D)

This survey should take just a few minutes and will help me understand your priorities as our work to save America continues.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership

**P.S. Let me know your thoughts on The Heritage Foundation 's new strategic goals using this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/thf-end-of-year-survey/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=73d720eba2db4c82abb60c0b8262b410&_e=WmJqXB0FLWx3PZqs816eV40SrC_BTImNQqOJX5mBa0LT6iDZbF5ugjnTVkKipHI-Sd95d1PFLa8ptpOHz1PQ125HFlDZoVAq0O0e-BXkQshbtvVfcma2OAcQ-wFuz6pa0j9rRUaBoRrMQLcN7vl3kCF7peMYQX6JQ4s6lsEfS9G2UPYUtg6VuqXp3yvKxHOJQN4PrcJcXTcWcNSgAVPR6h97g0wnCSt5II4kxmN8TZoxEq43V2Z2VmmTJVV96cMEqyyT1L9R-yWIQsRFLT-iQ1lBC-0BOWcoq5fcdFDblooMS78TcTmJb_0sVMO-WUPeL3QUeC0TfOM8L2W5yPzt9cndVt7l2-3w7nlVYINUGjU%3D)**

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, As we begin to rebuild our country next year after four years of leftist tyranny, we just completed The Heritage Foundation's key strategic goals for the next four years. We aim to: Dismantle the administrative state and reestablish a constitutional republic. Defeat globalism and defend America's interests at home and abroad. Take back and build American institutions. Restore the family. Promote opportunity for all. I 'd love to get your thoughts on these goals. So my team put together this brief survey on this strategy that you can complete at the link below. This survey should take just a few minutes and will help me understand your priorities as our work to save America continues. Best, Tony Johnson Director of Membership P.S. Let me know your thoughts on The Heritage Foundation 's new strategic goals using this secure link: ** The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 .

subject: Trump prosecuting Jack Smith?!

body:
please don’t ignore this!
| **🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith ** Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge. **He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!** [**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85306?t=6&akid=18158%2E878179%2EdpiP7Z) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85306?t=7&akid=18158%2E878179%2EdpiP7Z)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85306?t=8&akid=18158%2E878179%2EdpiP7Z) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85306?t=9&akid=18158%2E878179%2EdpiP7Z)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18158%2E878179%2EdpiP7Z). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18158%2E878179%2EdpiP7Z).**

name: Emily Randall
subject: Planned Parenthood in the crosshairs (SIGN ON)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the incoming leaders of President-elect Trump’s to-be-created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), are already threatening funding for Planned Parenthood clinics.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98380034/516463032/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.08_PlannedParenthood_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODMyYmEzYi05NWI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EqH0qev4PPnZ8CHVX0kyF-EWBnzLluP1c15Xp6ndNE=&emci=19aac5c1-73b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b832ba3b-95b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23483442) | **Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the incoming leaders of President-elect Trump’s to-be-created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), are already threatening funding for Planned Parenthood clinics.** In an op-ed about their plans for “DOGE,” they shared their plans to cut “federal overspending,” including “$300 million to progressive groups like Planned Parenthood.” Let’s be clear: Planned Parenthood doesn’t get a blank check from the government. Planned Parenthood clinics are reimbursed for the many services they provide, from cancer screenings to vasectomies to reproductive care – just like every other hospital and healthcare provider. **It’s not “federal overspending.” It’s affordable, accessible health care for millions of Americans._[Sign on to tell Musk and Ramaswamy: Hands off Planned Parenthood!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98380035/516463033/-177946760?contactdata=1KDZd9sqDropd0RMIwRpV7h7hbCW5O456abvNh+DCREVG/xzzL9uRiDeBShfIycjZuVNfcX2IO8U8RTN0hlEQ4AUSyDvIint0uFskFDKbPWlEGSxFALdgmNNyDYiQ35ks3lLGIUo3m8frhmCl2Z8Slb4Z3De7+kBQRfU6GyqZ3g=&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.08_PlannedParenthood_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODMyYmEzYi05NWI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EqH0qev4PPnZ8CHVX0kyF-EWBnzLluP1c15Xp6ndNE=&emci=19aac5c1-73b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b832ba3b-95b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23483442)_** [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98380036/516463034/2074279966?contactdata=1KDZd9sqDropd0RMIwRpV7h7hbCW5O456abvNh+DCREVG/xzzL9uRiDeBShfIycjZuVNfcX2IO8U8RTN0hlEQ4AUSyDvIint0uFskFDKbPWlEGSxFALdgmNNyDYiQ35ks3lLGIUo3m8frhmCl2Z8Slb4Z3De7+kBQRfU6GyqZ3g=&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.08_PlannedParenthood_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODMyYmEzYi05NWI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EqH0qev4PPnZ8CHVX0kyF-EWBnzLluP1c15Xp6ndNE=&emci=19aac5c1-73b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b832ba3b-95b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23483442) When I worked for Planned Parenthood, I saw firsthand the vital services that clinics provide across the country. In many places, Planned Parenthood clinics are the only affordable healthcare provider. HALF of all Planned Parenthood patients are enrolled in Medicaid and other programs for uninsured patients. _**One in three American women has been to a Planned Parenthood health center in their lifetime.**_ Threatening funding for clinics — based solely on the idea that they are “progressive” — would hurt millions of people. _[**I’ll do everything in my power to stop attacks on our healthcare, Peter. clean_body: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the incoming leaders of President-elect Trump’s to-be-created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), are already threatening funding for Planned Parenthood clinics. | Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the incoming leaders of President-elect Trump’s to-be-created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), are already threatening funding for Planned Parenthood clinics. In an op-ed about their plans for “DOGE,” they shared their plans to cut “federal overspending,” including “$300 million to progressive groups like Planned Parenthood.” Let’s be clear: Planned Parenthood doesn’t get a blank check from the government. Planned Parenthood clinics are reimbursed for the many services they provide, from cancer screenings to vasectomies to reproductive care – just like every other hospital and healthcare provider. It’s not “federal overspending.” It’s affordable, accessible health care for millions of Americans. When I worked for Planned Parenthood, I saw firsthand the vital services that clinics provide across the country. In many places, Planned Parenthood clinics are the only affordable healthcare provider. HALF of all Planned Parenthood patients are enrolled in Medicaid and other programs for uninsured patients. One in three American women has been to a Planned Parenthood health center in their lifetime. Threatening funding for clinics — based solely on the idea that they are “progressive” — would hurt millions of people. In service, — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . body:

Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxL/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxL/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_ This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxL/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxL/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
__Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!

_Yours Sincerely,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxL/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: River Gassen
subject: Grateful for Your Support, Committed to Our Future
body:
Grateful for You, Ready for What’s Next | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us9.campaign-archive.com/?e=3818d77efc&u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=3e6c162319)
---
| | | | |
# Thank you all so dearly for your support! Now let’s move forward.
---
| To my supporters,

First, I want to say how much I appreciate everyone’s grace and patience, as I took some time for myself to unwind from my campaign - and it’s taken me some time to recharge and restart back into campaign mode. Everyone worked so furiously to get us here and I could not have done it without you.

As I reflect on this past campaign, my heart is filled with gratitude for every one of you who stood beside me. To my incredible team, my loving partner, our dedicated volunteers, and all of you who made calls, sent texts, and knocked on countless doors—thank you. Your passion and resilience carried this campaign forward, and I am so proud of what we accomplished together.While we didn’t achieve the outcome we hoped for, we made history. With your support, we earned the highest margins ever for a Democrat in our district. This is not the end of our fight; it’s just the beginning.

This campaign faced its share of challenges—limited resources, time, and funding—but we pushed forward. Together, we proved that determination and community can move mountains. From the experience I’ve gained to the connections we’ve built, I know a win is on the horizon.

The morning after the election, I called Representative-Elect Crank to congratulate him on his victory and secured his commitment to future debates. While we may not see eye to eye on policy, I will continue to hold him accountable to the people of Colorado’s 5th Congressional District.
Looking ahead to 2026, I hope I have earned your continued support. Our movement is growing stronger, fueled by the hope and passion of people like you who believe in a brighter future for our district.

So, let’s keep moving forward. Don’t ever stop working to strengthen our community. Don’t hesitate to take up space in the place you call home, to lead with pride and purpose. Together, we will continue to fight for freedom, equity, and opportunity for all.

The fight is not over—for as long as we the people demand freedom, our democracy will endure. Let’s build on this momentum and create the future our district deserves.

That is why today, I am proud to formally announce my candidacy for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District as we launch our 2026 campaign

In solidarity and gratitude,
River Gassen
Democratic Candidate for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District, 2026

---

subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=021c38977e1c47ad97d8371a7e65cbe3&_t=wui548fPuZccy6V5ykbX0RYqq9srKgmS7XB2vmub5fqVy-XDvrJjyacYRs_yc-VBPsImZuMv1xZK4IHeL7bBQGOuZ1D9B9wSJYY6fERREMqo_MCRmYvIwnFbRRFYj0uT)_

---
| | Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical--same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history--a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen--echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised--I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an **_informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? ** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the State of American Education **using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=021c38977e1c47ad97d8371a7e65cbe3&_e=7eBAdPIx3G9xzK7uaMYz7ZUanDzj95v_vQJ1Mp5FOV_KVVe5TTw2RgF5Qx_xgD7Mt52SrOQ2ZiAkYQvT7dcy9bkQvDeDOkx7VJBhY0yDTxLAHuPGvljTbECUIGLg7c3MTukgTWQ5VtAb1HH8AxgOMYgxCLYzbhh44VpFDm0UvYmshvXgxJ1NyNo9ptlu9ak3RPaAOMvd0ZO5Tbgmh-_hNTtn4n5x7k1O-vQNmYPVEaQX-BvqWuQgxjs8WoMGwGg6uF0eVBAktFLk8JFWWWvf6eD3kf3ROT_bO2uX0BnzJgkqdV4l_yvgKnfPCMwu7-hUYxjRYbCsORbp_2k1Dw5eWzjhPM9OwrmGGImLwpPRMocbAhMdWihVb505uCnSK8WT6Q6q-jKFHB8uvpc4pdx8rg%3D%3D) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. ** The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. ** That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **[National Survey on the State of American Education](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=021c38977e1c47ad97d8371a7e65cbe3&_e=7eBAdPIx3G9xzK7uaMYz7ZUanDzj95v_vQJ1Mp5FOV_KVVe5TTw2RgF5Qx_xgD7Mt52SrOQ2ZiAkYQvT7dcy9bkQvDeDOkx7VJBhY0yDTxLAHuPGvljTbECUIGLg7c3MTukgTWQ5VtAb1HH8AxgOMYgxCLYzbhh44VpFDm0UvYmshvXgxJ1NyNo9ptlu9ak3RPaAOMvd0ZO5Tbgmh-_hNTtn4n5x7k1O-vQNmYPVEaRsXWW-gNNmX5BkecOmc9atMF0_4T5wS0jmFupccpGesxRMaxGDhjOW89_Nu6W98gW9bEY3FGTpTEOJSc3Ros-qFJ2WtNS2l62_LMCr119hhm7OwVc71BlIbpDhOA88yh3_6tgEBxgN4bZfJMoOUM89vCVJ2OORadY1VRYqHopG2Q%3D%3D) **today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical--same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history--a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen--echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid , hateful , and even racist. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised--I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending. This young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. body:

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6420tr2h1vrf1mhabquj4pj1korpdaj3ibp6rr0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj791lmkp79dhk6ep34t5l6cqb7dpjkorrbdt6e5p79c3l6uh7ac9km9qjccbnsor7fl9lmgqb3df161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4or7fljhe9qb0t9km4qu8oj5cpjm2op66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bpdk6ioredbjm8gq48bi4bh28pr6cpjm0oj1cpi649fg

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---

But we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you in this fight, friend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Special Elections Team (via DLCC.org)
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Early next year, Democrats will have critical opportunities to defend and grow our power in key states like Virginia in competitive special elections. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**First,** grassroots donors helped power Democrats to historic victories in the states. **Then,** Democrats faced setbacks at the federal level on Election Day – raising the stakes for state-level races in 2025. **But now,** we have opportunities to defend and grow our power in key states like Virginia through upcoming special elections. clean_body: | | | "I gave my best to you. For fifty years, like many of you, I gave my heart and soul to our nation." \- President Joe Biden One question for you: Peter, will you share your support of Joe Biden? We're putting together a card for President Biden filled with messages of gratitude from his top supporters. Will you be the next person to sign, Peter? | | We’d love to tell President Biden that you added your name today. Thank you and Happy Holidays! Team Harris-Walz | | | |

name: Seth Moulton
subject: The clock is ticking for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Trump is back. With every new loyalist cabinet pick, that reality sets in. The Republican trifecta will drive the agenda.

And now the clock is ticking for Democrats. Do we go back to the same old playbook and keep losing, or do we start changing now so that we can win?

We’ve lost support everywhere. One of the biggest reasons is that Democrats can’t seem to have honest conversations with Americans about what matters in their lives. We’re more concerned about strict ideological positions than fixing problems. We can’t even tolerate enough reasonable debate on social issues to counter MAGA’s cruelest tactics.

That’s why I recently said something that I know a lot of people agree with: Democrats seem to care more about not offending anyone than actually winning. I wrote about it recently in a Washington Post op-ed. [https://wapo.st/3Ow6XHH]

But now I’m likely facing a primary challenge simply for saying what so many have been thinking.

I’ve never been one to shy away from a fight. I’m a proud Democrat, and I’m pushing our party because I’m sick of ceding ground to MAGA extremists. You should be, too.

We need to win, and if you agree, I’ll need your help starting today. Please consider making an early investment in my re-election campaign here. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Thanks for all you do.

-Seth

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vsWf5Sf7vt-IDGUfjqQ5Sw~~/AARclAA~)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vsWf5Sf7vt-IDGUfjqQ5Sw~~/AARclAA~)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vsWf5Sf7vt-IDGUfjqQ5Sw~~/AARclAA~)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

US Conservative Network
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IBrY7ysYsR24w8okjxT9tg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOItaP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQudXNjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVuZXR3b3JrLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZ1WV_lVnbl5HW1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FSMX9ldRiMbn-Y67yGaPmw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOItaP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZW5ldHdvcmsuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnVZX-VWduXkdbUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29afcef6afd34ab98d469f105849cc97&_e=JJfeBFBg7q4jdmQdwiMMvtM1QAqJt4KlJHvGV_cd-gvNJnGaituYEJLfUnTeaGj4Xmvz-DWcopZ-RkT6qBWQGmNKO518W80H4Ic0eqNIZxIsf2tbd5EjTrpt2svEM4VE_X2oBkF7rejbYcto2s8EhptlmqznuWkspGTSGukKgXGxmBdNFKGTh9LgLlWYWBThm2UlqSEhYZBxS1omi4RKHXjSWYUOLLk76fPkNg1x6apUQfxmhTAc0ZKd5sgZx_YtSlXktG3PqVMVRwhBQS_wkI5ZeripL-AJIxd4wuJKK2wIBHfDz9Cc1eboEx858iryFxHGj0665VstBbKndf-0elmtqSYjpx9sy9-JsDd5SiN04zK1ouIbhAuuIgrYYo3CY-veU28epognZRw8YPw7CQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29afcef6afd34ab98d469f105849cc97&_e=JJfeBFBg7q4jdmQdwiMMvtM1QAqJt4KlJHvGV_cd-gvNJnGaituYEJLfUnTeaGj4Xmvz-DWcopZ-RkT6qBWQGmNKO518W80H4Ic0eqNIZxIsf2tbd5EjTrpt2svEM4VE_X2oBkF7rejbYcto2s8EhptlmqznuWkspGTSGukKgXGxmBdNFKGTh9LgLlWYWBThm2UlqSEhYZBxS1omi4RKHXjSWYUOLLk76fPkNg1x6apUQfxmhTAc0ZKd5sgZx_YtfYB2ZzRgaJCa2Vvpmvh68meto6HXnEsRP1pwelSwT_tGJB9dUO9rkt2wCXkiH1l17J0NOvE8dOhuFGRwSHic4uGx2cpMDUAV4jpu0RuDewITLrDdEvFGAEMK_kDyr554PyRIgmc4dM7oWIg3OhQK_g%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29afcef6afd34ab98d469f105849cc97&_e=JJfeBFBg7q4jdmQdwiMMvtM1QAqJt4KlJHvGV_cd-gvNJnGaituYEJLfUnTeaGj4Xmvz-DWcopZ-RkT6qBWQGmNKO518W80H4Ic0eqNIZxIsf2tbd5EjTrpt2svEM4VE_X2oBkF7rejbYcto2s8EhptlmqznuWkspGTSGukKgXGxmBdNFKGTh9LgLlWYWBThm2UlqSEhYZBxS1omi4RKHXjSWYUOLLk76fPkNg1x6apUQfxmhTAc0ZKd5sgZx_YtxEWYT2GYeLsfgPti1lb6oqJhUFnR76QO5MLYX_LKt7S31gZb11pWQv3FBG4d9aqeQ5p3pU_DgXss-xl_jA54uKx-5LihCLWXNMtnWMPXDOr4B-igZyB9GboZtQHB3jaSyJOIINGWhU8rjLQMQ1c_Hw%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29afcef6afd34ab98d469f105849cc97&_e=JJfeBFBg7q4jdmQdwiMMvtM1QAqJt4KlJHvGV_cd-gvNJnGaituYEJLfUnTeaGj4Xmvz-DWcopZ-RkT6qBWQGmNKO518W80H4Ic0eqNIZxIsf2tbd5EjTrpt2svEM4VE_X2oBkF7rejbYcto2s8EhptlmqznuWkspGTSGukKgXGxmBdNFKGTh9LgLlWYWBThm2UlqSEhYZBxS1omi4RKHXjSWYUOLLk76fPkNg1x6apUQfxmhTAc0ZKd5sgZx_YtV7w2ttdPVAUuAUsqXYnGJoox15eYQitPi3CGevaqOOfW1uL06Ft8RX0QmuU3fRi5CtJOkArqyIaDoUPltcd2fajXT79vXbd-rUqoLiOSSFZ3BcZd4WcZnpr7hD4xklqimalIlps51JO3kALzSfh9zw%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29afcef6afd34ab98d469f105849cc97&_e=JJfeBFBg7q4jdmQdwiMMvtM1QAqJt4KlJHvGV_cd-gvNJnGaituYEJLfUnTeaGj4Xmvz-DWcopZ-RkT6qBWQGmNKO518W80H4Ic0eqNIZxIsf2tbd5EjTrpt2svEM4VE_X2oBkF7rejbYcto2s8EhptlmqznuWkspGTSGukKgXGxmBdNFKGTh9LgLlWYWBThm2UlqSEhYZBxS1omi4RKHXjSWYUOLLk76fPkNg1x6apUQfxmhTAc0ZKd5sgZx_Yt01JX7a-qeGTolirINp0UtGhujy_ucMqHG3qlTQBJ8zzzh0I4bBO5HwjXm1jzpQkjpJ0b6eDS0U9VwoKY2mAqG2fiUSV2mo33bRKEMItwgqK_4PZB5NNBsQBJx7DHs015DmDcT446rsiQWm3DFAZNhA%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29afcef6afd34ab98d469f105849cc97&_e=JJfeBFBg7q4jdmQdwiMMvtM1QAqJt4KlJHvGV_cd-gvNJnGaituYEJLfUnTeaGj4Xmvz-DWcopZ-RkT6qBWQGmNKO518W80H4Ic0eqNIZxIsf2tbd5EjTrpt2svEM4VE_X2oBkF7rejbYcto2s8EhptlmqznuWkspGTSGukKgXGxmBdNFKGTh9LgLlWYWBThm2UlqSEhYZBxS1omi4RKHXjSWYUOLLk76fPkNg1x6apUQfxmhTAc0ZKd5sgZx_Ytx4vaAQX_lXjJPuT75lKOLNjZyCKmnr9VJLyAftBSloUPvpNpP8BdyBP-iHWdXwA69j1oXz-thsYlmvJIiXugj2VUUyRHOf7ppRInyKEdpDhwcXZbxDRSp88jztNLL8dboetk67RnwbszsXNLgFFkdQ%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,

clean_body: We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best , Marcus Welby , M.D. , and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will receive: ** All ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ** And a FREE copy of my children's book:Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Inmate Number P01135780
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=58e7c7277edc4d7eba14f4ba088f3413&_e=2mvXdADrGcIDawdEkjYYfqIm6ALjg2XzU_uUJITXg9ltnoIb1sWpKKZYBVaDTtycmIkWL_QGpQqh1CPSwB1onunKEl5ma4atifqbb5qzh0WT7jPrz6t1JJmYTUlnRcTTu4Ni_wMMRtbxcbthYItrHdjBlFIYdiBHX6sqBNuaI7Nfs5FyRMkhe6ZYMUNS9WIsaAQPWdKu7sMnwsWLnxEZWliBOGpZB9o67u1mEpsxWyEkrlBKl-NrxXzkv34xbhl-QuUe9_QyNyiBsFd0LepIWgeK4-0QRojKIibJ-ZQOXEC_-O7GPDU6A96JkY__1dbX1FCWZhugmfBigbFdl2TEuLdw7PftUU2lL7feAWpa_KwN0UcLNRmoRX3KDTu64gUB)
---
Dear Friend,
---
There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.
---
Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.
---
According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_ , **_“she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.”_**
---
How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard _facts_.
---
_But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free._
---
**“‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee”**
---
[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]
---
When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as **Inmate Number _P01135780_**.
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=58e7c7277edc4d7eba14f4ba088f3413&_e=2mvXdADrGcIDawdEkjYYfqIm6ALjg2XzU_uUJITXg9ltnoIb1sWpKKZYBVaDTtycmIkWL_QGpQqh1CPSwB1onunKEl5ma4atifqbb5qzh0WT7jPrz6t1JJmYTUlnRcTTu4Ni_wMMRtbxcbthYItrHdjBlFIYdiBHX6sqBNuaI7Nfs5FyRMkhe6ZYMUNS9WIsaAQPWdKu7sMnwsWLnxEZWliBOGpZB9o67u1mEpsxWyG9GH_uO9hfChtxGdz07oVCw_ui1PqcEEz3sXn5JOaudm_8UE-rKtchHk3GqHStaT3Zuykz28PUuy18gLVhSMjSXhX55DKh4xx8gxOpGugtmst4zvXAafJfqkeFNebRUMihmSJANGT8dsG2ujfjvWuL)
__
---
**In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.”**
---
And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!
---

clean_body: There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump. | Dear Friend, There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is still trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE. Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going. According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the NY Post , “she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.” How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard facts. But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free. “‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee” [SOURCE: Law & Crime] When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as Inmate Number P01135780. In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.” And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York! (Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please don’t even think twice!) Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
