name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m nervous
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Well, Peter, I’ll admit it… Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our final goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f89f511c503338ef9809553193ff8fbfcf35f35b2cad0f437c83d36daf6680553856a1a72c35fb6d93b6dc79b8f47da3a72b9703b73a5629a3 I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f89f511c503338ef9809553193ff8fbfcf35f35b2cad0f437c83d36daf6680553856a1a72c35fb6d93b6dc79b8f47da3a72b9703b73a5629a3 I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f819200fa3505ce2aea1c46d5aaa6b921516f0791d6bab92387911280b686fdd88458f50a061ff0f8934ce3c4a3cddd1cfe8d194e9e0cbe691 iCloud , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f828eca50a3237422e3f1b4a187851e9567c07c062c3cdc2d5aa388876f38a2948a095c9c7dde262d26b191e0c66c5000266faa75fa72d5efe Gmail , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f8ea45bf63513fdb7aca53178de4db53c349a437f96ca73e6dc9fb45069067f6c66cc422896041d6e73c3c96b2817a8710276e71c357c9f4ac Outlook , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f8909e694a79d442127a5b41f8742542b7adc67815217ce6763de667934a2c7f2d8ddf1b6f0444cbc8a08b4e3f0e5b97565ba1a63d58781759 Yahoo Mail , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=276bc31e7f2784f8faaf7a30b1edea00ee51aeff7f526ddd77931055cd27e1c45f86ccc45ed8e37d4ceec3a95cd1a7f8bdbc302c144b42e33e889ac02d782ab9 AOL Mail Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. iCloud , Gmail , Outlook , Yahoo Mail , AOL Mail Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2BWZSJqAL1lGn93hMImTbpyRCsnnfxt34YXDDbFlNBSwgjq6YjOzAj3ywI_Uos3umU6yDVleUvuQMXJHFj1bpjSQ8XAFB-1jZM3MG2QOjMvXzVEUAnGipw0surdABRD3zbJAJAY6x2uYSvuTVs0rvGb)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2BDkqsXbaS6DoBHgKV4S6h_MSQLb2_Hx0T6fPwo0cINEOSCtoYtU8jqnDuOXZ8GYhymbGtsrpHeARdtgNFfEvs-lTriYPjk6nkRKyFzazKy7ygZdro9O8_UyASEZwaS0iyIWo2jssZs4zHfaHzcw0YV)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2C42U2vcLmVV5qQK4MXIpCqWUE3l77Z6nJftdB61jAn7xxQQmPhJHJ8m4X24sh8BlOi-TvinqR7BrWSwWL7czyXrbm4oZymOzlmTikYPnnqyA3muaaY7qgexKcZb-jZ8Q952AlZEJYYIUy1bkiVLcqi)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2B3qmQUD5Fmr9MQXfvvm87G_B-6ebpBhlcW3XPRqcfbyQcMaisdkDDTFpZhxEevmNFOHi0-ilVX05Uja6vmHRw8LDvuAjjWp9rR2CYs8Sesh7cWSAuvIX0YEn5Uq5886pHw33JLGCyyo_0tz3lvTcel)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2DYR2oXFQcDYW_nEj510NdATKqE4em_e_F886qB5fNOP_UBw7rNoAX8wil0jRo1LOgSliyHJuc1uIVIMh0hSUE5BY9GhBtVKWZ3H6GjwS32CYoxJw6GgDYuHiEn_cdT4LmQ5A7gfOpNHF2xB28Ui1Vz)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2DWY-9ysHFx8YzeuV47n13FwOXLojrg6uHxXlBnPM9llc9j0a-e9L208Y4WMHZs-2Fp3rsknpYWF18x30TKT0DJFmUcxcbH7xmud6HZdB-vyaP_sYCeVu3ugwCa65ySBzeAm0GR7D74Km_erB1qzDLI)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_e=bnN3ap_Uo5wRNwCuVKWjCVTl9qKC3XYVNUreJ5ucPzor85LDogO2yfCBGPPslbffMktqKlvTzTp1pxGZQLGHtCcB1OjZPMpOmc6rW8uWUdwHrbxK6Et9PV_V0H9vnLH5kmZeGJk-oO3jgzQFWw2j_RDKQ_bQD-gwJ9Yjg1cJP7-7wyFagcCfW48-7lRTnZgs1iwAeBcb9G1t3qOvdUBvuc3egGJpsBNgbUwnBEAVo2CFZfcvZNbJNfehWclfCVIQAuwugnTX5m5_jsxnIU2C6Y8ywnt5Hwy9alOSC6WIU88PRbiYUWeE7FQujjtdKog3eZtsYsFJ1WPBZIQDe9AiEnalsPyd4U0oikPNrs7WEawR-co_KNBo5kzkMj3gWiKk)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=7cce98351afe422a8bbbf8ed3c245665&_t=itmnjdNQqJl46W_Nv-2RS7p1mhpw4pWQSk_q3HvQ7a-CtWP1HHJvoEa-41pg2T-N6vv7abfFVGsKLTXkydP0q2d6cOAxCaK75FgzAZeQYOathiNUsymM-jm8buQVYVij) to unsubscribe

body:
Trump’s return is weeks away. Let’s protect what we’ve built.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98381724/516469104/1328794144?refcode=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Njk2ZTE0LWE2YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UQ4yxyt-Eulsg9tKadq1ymu-yGLw1cjd71BZHx5VhR8=&emci=c3696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
In just a few weeks, Donald Trump will be sworn into office, bringing with him a cabinet packed with MAGA loyalists, Trump sycophants, fossil fuel executives, and climate deniers intent on rolling back everything we’ve fought for. That’s why we’re teaming up with leading climate organizations to demand immediate action from Congress to protect our climate progress — and we need you to help lead this fight. **Your voice is the key to making Congress listen.[Will you sign the petition and tell your representatives to protect our climate progress?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98381725/516469105/-1393488005?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Njk2ZTE0LWE2YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UQ4yxyt-Eulsg9tKadq1ymu-yGLw1cjd71BZHx5VhR8=&emci=c3696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** We have a narrow window to stop Republicans from dismantling critical climate protections once they take control in 2025. Here’s what we must demand of Congress right now: 🚫 **Prevent cuts to the EPA budget or other critical climate agency budgets** 🚫 **Reject bad amendments or riders to must-pass bills** 🚫 **Prevent legislative language that increases reliance on fossil fuels or weakens key climate programs from passing** This fight is personal — for all of us. It’s about our future, our kids, and every community already on the frontlines of the climate crisis. Washington politicians need to understand that we’re paying attention to their every move. And if Congress fails to act, they’ll answer to us at the ballot box. It’s now or never. **[Sign the petition now and tell Congress to protect our climate progress!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98381726/516469106/-1393488005?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Njk2ZTE0LWE2YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UQ4yxyt-Eulsg9tKadq1ymu-yGLw1cjd71BZHx5VhR8=&emci=c3696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98381727/516469107/-1393488005?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Njk2ZTE0LWE2YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UQ4yxyt-Eulsg9tKadq1ymu-yGLw1cjd71BZHx5VhR8=&emci=c3696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c4696e14-a6b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98381864/516469534/-807643367?&refcode=E11709-20241207-SpecialElections-Image-SpecialElection&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2EwZTQxNi1hN2I1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bG7mTsmJG5f6kCPjwBPF_0J-9Y1S7vR8XRvB0khp6Q=) Virginia is the first battleground of 2025, Derek. **Three urgent special elections** will decide whether we regain our momentum after a tough fight in November.
These special elections aren’t just about Virginia, though — they’ll set the tone for the nation in 2025. If we win these races, we’ll be able to keep fighting for working families, reproductive rights, and a stronger democracy. But if we lose, we’ll be giving Republicans a big head start in the next election cycle.
Virginia is the only state in the South with full abortion access and a Democratic firewall against MAGA extremism. The outcome of these elections won’t just affect Virginians but everyone in the South who’s counting on us.
**These elections are just around the corner in January,** and the GOP is already mobilizing to win these seats — [_**every dollar you give will help us counter their attacks and deliver wins that set the tone for the rest of the year. Will you chip in to help us in these elections?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98381865/516469535/-807643367?&refcode=E11709-20241207-SpecialElections-SL-SpecialElection&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2EwZTQxNi1hN2I1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bG7mTsmJG5f6kCPjwBPF_0J-9Y1S7vR8XRvB0khp6Q=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 » →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98381866/516469536/1383413614?express_lane=true&refcode=E11709-20241207-SpecialElections-EG-SpecialElection&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2EwZTQxNi1hN2I1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bG7mTsmJG5f6kCPjwBPF_0J-9Y1S7vR8XRvB0khp6Q=)

clean_body: It’s time to set the tone for 2025. | = Virginia is the first battleground of 2025, Derek. Three urgent special elections will decide whether we regain our momentum after a tough fight in November. These special elections aren’t just about Virginia, though — they’ll set the tone for the nation in 2025. If we win these races, we’ll be able to keep fighting for working families, reproductive rights, and a stronger democracy. But if we lose, we’ll be giving Republicans a big head start in the next election cycle. Virginia is the only state in the South with full abortion access and a Democratic firewall against MAGA extremism. The outcome of these elections won’t just affect Virginians but everyone in the South who’s counting on us. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=21a4aff6cd49430b9025b538c90875a4&_e=8o0wiAL0Ixa0p0bbVDnUJ-UFHYzswcy83eHTTjq5vYxQigKyqpAs_gLEssZvRUzOlk6albHeZ-aJ9Dq4xpAQT9ipJFT_k8w4_eSOjXlLT5wFVVEBTYMf5xV5iBGAInE4oYvtfdkJaDVtpvqC7lz3o2c8bcnEaLPsKiyzF4fOHb4LEqhrkXtSSK9LxbMTfKEUWQs37xcavJs9OCoyHzHojP1tCDFrDewbBrv2BUasg6hsPwKK3ZXD8iEpmknKi3GDSfk5q8_gnEe2dlnNzfuBxUorUzY3Qj_3Cxp3zLnxQobuvR8CznPmGCJzd5a9jhFI8ym9VsA3eS2u14O5JOIPTxVSGZ0zqdaYDOLyughzFfnBUZ801ck21utZHnSBv7LsduB8cDrS8V1ro1QW5SYK2A%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=21a4aff6cd49430b9025b538c90875a4&_e=8o0wiAL0Ixa0p0bbVDnUJ-UFHYzswcy83eHTTjq5vYxQigKyqpAs_gLEssZvRUzOlk6albHeZ-aJ9Dq4xpAQT9ipJFT_k8w4_eSOjXlLT5wFVVEBTYMf5xV5iBGAInE4oYvtfdkJaDVtpvqC7lz3o2c8bcnEaLPsKiyzF4fOHb4LEqhrkXtSSK9LxbMTfKEUWQs37xcavJs9OCoyHzHojP1tCDFrDewbBrv2BUasg6hsPwKK3ZXD8iEpmknKi3GDWhnro5jxeL0kJTPjLO1PU3lJNbuePm_LNRdaYmbJZ-G0VOT6d7LoCiUmJI2cRLrYR50wjufMP3iKWtQnqb6d9sLfXXnbHXwKnwE5cmK8MeS-Rw_RfKqvuqu71pzBMwk21IuFXfSLIE6xw5FjNsN2RQ%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=21a4aff6cd49430b9025b538c90875a4&_e=8o0wiAL0Ixa0p0bbVDnUJ-UFHYzswcy83eHTTjq5vYxQigKyqpAs_gLEssZvRUzOlk6albHeZ-aJ9Dq4xpAQT9ipJFT_k8w4_eSOjXlLT5wFVVEBTYMf5xV5iBGAInE4oYvtfdkJaDVtpvqC7lz3o2c8bcnEaLPsKiyzF4fOHb4LEqhrkXtSSK9LxbMTfKEUWQs37xcavJs9OCoyHzHojP1tCDFrDewbBrv2BUasg6hsPwKK3ZXD8iEpmknKi3GDCEi5tYhlZnvY8tBUZNYciaYDpeY3yLi712yLt2s5k49RI7kxa30EApVSYvK-pzjobGSOyl1lsnDPSBgAzjCeV78Nagcni252vRcClwKsSQbf8E968GE-dSdPZ2oUE5vYiq0tDJbhwVR2AhiantntQQ%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=21a4aff6cd49430b9025b538c90875a4&_e=8o0wiAL0Ixa0p0bbVDnUJ-UFHYzswcy83eHTTjq5vYxQigKyqpAs_gLEssZvRUzOlk6albHeZ-aJ9Dq4xpAQT9ipJFT_k8w4_eSOjXlLT5wFVVEBTYMf5xV5iBGAInE4oYvtfdkJaDVtpvqC7lz3o2c8bcnEaLPsKiyzF4fOHb4LEqhrkXtSSK9LxbMTfKEUWQs37xcavJs9OCoyHzHojP1tCDFrDewbBrv2BUasg6hsPwKK3ZXD8iEpmknKi3GDC6YBMKGbzHkK_GAR4PxRUTa80-2P8rxG6kBQ-FG-hLUnKw7f3mjzpGXX1JAqsnyVIA5f0CrzLRbt432Fywf-REWzDVxxMNeRKjpxMrIup_0Vuyn-19UB7pyBEa9Kza5zXEUJKQcjrqrkovbURdHIXg%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

clean_body: Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce87d25d334749fe822eefc01d318cb8&_e=Q1Oe_-bwk6T_IINQ3U6fng2DMGYibbI4Gqy6T4kQkLhm_-hGxoVjOaYP9t0Dic1E2lHFifI1QbOK-mpBYofCjUWZY2dAn2w_NcKciJFcW5v9dvhe931ihjtQsFt96i6nEddxk7e7YGglrzMrQ-DGJmZi9XemSu-HqWhoFU3SRSOh5o72gw7aPN94rGPDIY70eDhl8ic4Ddc_tmpyPkbVQeS9deFL9Gtbh_9-2YPStJbNpECqUg6VRuY1LJQB_6s9oyY5KLRmSVvpv7eZsfbpO0Vm0rOrtxjeQxkA2G7JFXxfsjHpk_U0zfiA2Egensgyq2gk6LBM7llU-cX7f6gNv-yvL1kjCRzUoPOvEtKW06LLWw7ejTdIn4DTcMTeHlfJoEZn_82OEyo1LImmJP2eEw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce87d25d334749fe822eefc01d318cb8&_e=Q1Oe_-bwk6T_IINQ3U6fng2DMGYibbI4Gqy6T4kQkLhm_-hGxoVjOaYP9t0Dic1E2lHFifI1QbOK-mpBYofCjUWZY2dAn2w_NcKciJFcW5v9dvhe931ihjtQsFt96i6nEddxk7e7YGglrzMrQ-DGJmZi9XemSu-HqWhoFU3SRSOh5o72gw7aPN94rGPDIY70eDhl8ic4Ddc_tmpyPkbVQeS9deFL9Gtbh_9-2YPStJbNpECqUg6VRuY1LJQB_6s9uoClksi9FeWfIj3YRuxNWRDlTsi_wAz3qVXWou8t75peaWVsAVlK_16TR2nnBMC59OWjRXRtVtCtdjPD5aFrHoG9f68_K9WpMY_D3VdB0f7LtZv4wyG6zVMJJBDeU7r25JafP7Clv36yTAz9Oo2NGA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Peter, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I know a thing or two about overcoming obstacles
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

I know a thing or two about overcoming obstacles.
After I was shot in 2011, doctors never knew if I’d be able to walk or talk again. But my family, friends, doctors, and therapists never gave up on me. And I never gave up on myself. That’s why today I’m able to do things that once felt impossible, such as riding my bike, playing the French horn, and practicing yoga.
I often think about our movement to end gun violence in the same way I think about my recovery. In both of these journeys, some days are harder than others.
No doubt, we will experience some hard days the next four years with Donald Trump as president. But that doesn’t mean it’s time for us to give up. It means it’s time for us to be ready to fight harder than ever before to protect our gun safety progress.
[**Our movement is its strongest when we all work together. So today, I’m asking you to join me in the fight to end gun violence by making a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241208-1-b&t=1&akid=9576%2E3935704%2EYEI8o-)

name: Olivia Krolczyk, Leadership Institute
subject: They want to fail students
body:
Create campus leaders
| Peter, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d6cdf837d6714519bb0c43965f301972&_e=TP4YIBkKNpc3gBlR2kaWGcGo8g0SVWhOC1cgWmmbCOKkCvywnL7YG8HX4UmFc6hKffmok6cnpEnD3T4cG3HW4gQBurbChstOYkfVf6RUiZUgnJWoSEVbf683G6UXzdzB4g5kqb_QUErOhc58lbjR10O_v6WQsuyvpA7dYKBkFc6bExyAhtYZ4kWtLJAyuKJMgEniHNHVUZW1k7jR_rmO8XIrPQRwNhW8WADUE5sBVxRJ2a1LYWT9iseOrGybkRWlPH-SUljL0-4s1dKhV2NCKj9tJv2sDXiSvl8y6oKkkDKQDkL49H37WZDrqeUyNi0Vct4kflFu8mF1_ksSCrIYlsE7VSUNfuPYZNa-MM3XacD4bn0Vs2wM12Xjxu4-4rlwEKqtQ488lCYW6hPV3_znfg%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Peter, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d6cdf837d6714519bb0c43965f301972&_e=TP4YIBkKNpc3gBlR2kaWGcGo8g0SVWhOC1cgWmmbCOKkCvywnL7YG8HX4UmFc6hKffmok6cnpEnD3T4cG3HW4gQBurbChstOYkfVf6RUiZUgnJWoSEVbf683G6UXzdzB4g5kqb_QUErOhc58lbjR10O_v6WQsuyvpA7dYKBkFc6bExyAhtYZ4kWtLJAyuKJMgEniHNHVUZW1k7jR_rmO8XIrPQRwNhW8WADUE5sBVxRV0M5sRAWJBMoOpzU3lCBw25Xail3A9URoYU4AU9ZPukPv_r9Y1hvNLyPaHpyd5ivm78WJeor9rOUhKiehOWXmM_Oebwm9TR8sBtmirFjBhjqSWZuHNXuBIoat7ar8xrEBQ0plexMaRhJyKnn4PMWeahslcRM06p4J6U50cY0K3A%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley? ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d6cdf837d6714519bb0c43965f301972&_e=TP4YIBkKNpc3gBlR2kaWGcGo8g0SVWhOC1cgWmmbCOKkCvywnL7YG8HX4UmFc6hKffmok6cnpEnD3T4cG3HW4gQBurbChstOYkfVf6RUiZUgnJWoSEVbf683G6UXzdzB4g5kqb_QUErOhc58lbjR10O_v6WQsuyvpA7dYKBkFc6bExyAhtYZ4kWtLJAyuKJMgEniHNHVUZW1k7jR_rmO8XIrPQRwNhW8WADUE5sBVxQ0KCShxzVbJP278ttUikSy2g_2T-q4s9KN_Cmcu33dN4harhPHKUG2xHY6HT9GdjaneHe26iKDwKjJG3eykUB4lWPQEHRDjFN9OpDmxCact4qj1NOd8NrTKlqRZihT1XTx5UMVJDO5fZigLKhfk9e0wumjXqnbnUvmIixyfRJ1cQ%3D%3D) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both
President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.

Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and
President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just
got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.

According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_,
_“SHE’S GOING FULL TILT WITH VENGEANCE AND EMOTIONS.”_

How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and
“vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the
Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the
cold hard _facts_.

But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch
hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk
free.

“‘IT IS UNDISPUTED’: FANI WILLIS HARSHLY CHASTISED BY JUDGE FOR
VIOLATING OPEN RECORDS LAWS IN LAWSUIT SEEKING HER COMMUNICATIONS WITH
JACK SMITH AND JAN. 6 COMMITTEE”

[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]

When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as
INMATE NUMBER P01135780.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]
__

IN FANI’S EYES, THE “P” STOOD FOR “PRISONER.” BUT, AS AN
INNOCENT MAN FIGHTING FOR HIS FREEDOM, TO ME THE “P” STANDS FOR
“PATRIOT.”

And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your
last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this
despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I
fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in
Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!

_(Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please
don’t even think twice!)_

IF YOU CAN, AND, SERIOUSLY, ONLY IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A
CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND – AS I KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE
DEMOCRATS’ DEEP STATE TRIES TO JAIL ME FOR LIFE.

name: Mark Takano
subject: We have to fight for students, parents, and teachers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
This fight is personal to me

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98382860/516472979/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjEzM2JjNi1hZmI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PN-Ws55B7q8wO18JbQttpB3HpDOf2LFPDAJ7nM9GTFU=)
---
**Before running for Congress I was an English teacher for 20 years.** Here I am in the classroom back in 1994. Simpler times. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98382861/516472980/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241208_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjEzM2JjNi1hZmI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PN-Ws55B7q8wO18JbQttpB3HpDOf2LFPDAJ7nM9GTFU=&emci=eeb32cd4-13b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c6133bc6-afb5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=18839602) Working with students and their parents has still been the most rewarding part of my decades in public service.

**Looking back, it would be unconscionable to think that just 30 years after that picture was taken, the very foundation of public education in this country – the Department of Education – would be under attack.**

**_Let me be as abundantly clear_ : abolishing the Department of Education would be a disaster– for our students, for our teachers, for parents, for our economy, and for our future.**

Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to dismantle public education in this country. Top to bottom, inside and out, they want to gut education and force working families to pay more taxes for less.

I know this seems like a losing fight, Peter. But that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants you to feel. He wants you to feel defeated. He wants you to give up and acquiesce to his extreme agenda. **We cannot let him win.**

We have to fight back, Peter. For students, for parents, for teachers, and for our future. This is one of the most important fights we’ll take on in the New Year.

[**If you’re willing to stand with me, can you add your name to the growing list of Democrats defending the Department of Education from MAGA Republicans? I am hoping to see at least 150 new signatures from PA tonight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98382862/516472981/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241208_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjEzM2JjNi1hZmI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PN-Ws55B7q8wO18JbQttpB3HpDOf2LFPDAJ7nM9GTFU=&emci=eeb32cd4-13b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c6133bc6-afb5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=18839602) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98382863/516472982/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241208_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjEzM2JjNi1hZmI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PN-Ws55B7q8wO18JbQttpB3HpDOf2LFPDAJ7nM9GTFU=&emci=eeb32cd4-13b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c6133bc6-afb5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=18839602)
---
Thank you for taking action,

Mark Takano
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517

clean_body: This fight is personal to me | = Before running for Congress I was an English teacher for 20 years. Here I am in the classroom back in 1994. Simpler times. Working with students and their parents has still been the most rewarding part of my decades in public service. Looking back, it would be unconscionable to think that just 30 years after that picture was taken, the very foundation of public education in this country – the Department of Education – would be under attack. Let me be as abundantly clear : abolishing the Department of Education would be a disaster– for our students, for our teachers, for parents, for our economy, and for our future. Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to dismantle public education in this country. Top to bottom, inside and out, they want to gut education and force working families to pay more taxes for less. I know this seems like a losing fight, Peter. But that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants you to feel. He wants you to feel defeated. He wants you to give up and acquiesce to his extreme agenda. We cannot let him win. We have to fight back, Peter. For students, for parents, for teachers, and for our future. This is one of the most important fights we’ll take on in the New Year. | Thank you for taking action, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. We wanted to make sure you saw this message.

Many Americans – especially American women – have spent the past month wondering: How can we protect all of the progress from the past century in the face of so many real threats to that progress?

**Here’s how:**

It has never been more clear that electing _**WOMEN**_ to public office is the best possible defense against attacks on women – and the best strategy for securing women’s autonomy in America.

Hi Peter,

As pundits continue to reflect on the results of the 2024 election, many Americans are feeling despair and distrust in strategies they believed would work to protect from another Trump presidency. Americans are, understandably, searching for what to do next and where to turn our energy.

[**On this Giving Tuesday, we are reaching out to be an outlet for that energy. The truth is, the work we’re doing at Her Bold Move is going to be unbelievably critical over the next four years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98383040/516473621/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241207safeguard_N_HBM_90DO_6_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMTMzYmM2LWFmYjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RVJM40p6ysKCU9n9NNv3HyQxzmmdxOTrCumBFLat4aA=)

**We have a vision for this country and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. Here is why our work is so important:

✅ By electing qualified, pro-choice women to state and local offices, we are building necessary guardrails to defend against the potential damage of the incoming administration. Research shows women leaders spend time working on women’s issues. The more women in the rooms where decisions are being made – the more likely we are to see women’s rights protected.

✅ We are not afraid to work in deep red abortion ban states. These are the states where women are truly being left behind and most desperately need women representing them in their government. We’re chipping away at the male, GOP supermajorities in those states.

✅ We are building a bench of qualified, pro-choice women. The more women serving in our government, the more opportunities there will be for a woman to run for president and, FINALLY, win.

✅ Seeing is believing. It is critical that our daughters see themselves reflected in their leaders. We must ensure that there is female representation at every level of the American government.

Thanks to your support, we have grown exponentially since our founding. We are seeing results and success stories year after year. This past election, 44% of our winners were women of color, and 47% of our _winners_ came from _abortion-ban states_ (!!!!!). Almost ALL of our winners shattered glass ceilings with their victories. That ^ is the impact that we are having, and we are asking for your support to keep up the fight.

[**We know exactly where we go from here: We must continue the work to elect pro-women WOMEN so we can have a voice in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. This Giving Tuesday, help us continue the fight for our future by rushing $20.25 or more immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241207safeguard_N_HBM_90DO_6_NG_N_L4&amount=20.25)

We wouldn’t be able to do all of this without your support. Thank you so much for joining us in this fight. Happy Giving Tuesday!

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98383051/516473634/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241207safeguard_N_HBM_90DO_6_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMTMzYmM2LWFmYjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RVJM40p6ysKCU9n9NNv3HyQxzmmdxOTrCumBFLat4aA=)

name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Your thoughts: Pam Bondi for AG?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120824_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: After Matt Gaetz's nomination for Attorney General blew up spectacularly, Donald Trump quickly moved to name a MAGA-approved replacement: former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi.
As Florida's AG, Bondi examined allegations against Trump University, but then suddenly stopped the nascent investigation after Donald Trump made a $25,000 donation to her campaign fund. After she ended her term as AG, she became one of Trump's chief election deniers, spreading the false claim that the 2020 election had been stolen. Needless to say, we don't believe she'll lift a finger to defend voting rights as head of the Justice Department.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about her nomination. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you oppose Pam Bondi for AG?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120824_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120824_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120824_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120824_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120824_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120824_1&amount=25]

_\---Forwarded Message from Dr. Raul Ruiz---_
In Congress, I’ve made it a top priority of mine to protect and expand Social Security benefits and ensure that no Californian is left behind.
That’s why I was proud to vote in favor of protecting Social Security to ensure that our seniors continue getting the benefits they deserve.
But with Republican control in Congress and the White House, MAGA extremists have more opportunities than ever to make good on their promise to slash Social Security — _**and we have to respond.**_
[Will you join me in calling on all Republicans in Washington to protect Social Security and our seniors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98383245/516474435/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_120824_1_2_SocialSecurityFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQyZTc1NDEtYjFiNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BlxM28jcSNqRhF1PR1xvx_gRR2QBtSwWEprKTyO5yE4=&emci=9b2e7541-b1b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9d2e7541-b1b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)

In moments like this, it’s more important than ever that we stand united in defense of the millions of Americans who rely on these lifeline programs.
We need 10,000 signatures before the end of the week if we want to send a powerful message — and I’m counting on your help to do it.
[That’s why I’m asking: Will you take just a moment of your time to stand with me and other House Democrats who are fighting to preserve Social Security?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98383247/516474437/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_120824_1_2_SocialSecurityFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQyZTc1NDEtYjFiNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BlxM28jcSNqRhF1PR1xvx_gRR2QBtSwWEprKTyO5yE4=&emci=9b2e7541-b1b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9d2e7541-b1b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)

clean_body: Add your name before midnight to protect Social Security → While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | We won’t sugarcoat it: With a Republican trifecta in Washington, critical programs like Social Security are at risk of being cut like never before. This is an unprecedented opportunity for MAGA extremists to fulfill their promise to slash benefits for our seniors, and it’s more important than ever that we’re pushing back and making our voices heard. | | \---Forwarded Message from Dr. Raul Ruiz--- In Congress, I’ve made it a top priority of mine to protect and expand Social Security benefits and ensure that no Californian is left behind. That’s why I was proud to vote in favor of protecting Social Security to ensure that our seniors continue getting the benefits they deserve. But with Republican control in Congress and the White House, MAGA extremists have more opportunities than ever to make good on their promise to slash Social Security — and we have to respond. | In moments like this, it’s more important than ever that we stand united in defense of the millions of Americans who rely on these lifeline programs. We need 10,000 signatures before the end of the week if we want to send a powerful message — and I’m counting on your help to do it. | Sincerely, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. | | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help.[_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy me._](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4f2bc135c3cf4aa5a9afe12c145ea590&_e=Bjlsy3-3A38PZSovrgElq7kYaaJtA5SsG49I_uoVLi3lk5ihvYxxzbEqyy9dZTaJWdPYnhPe8DzOjreAzq9hHZnl2Bdj_sTSGRSk_fAt8xyZNNySdMbLxfJVW5l3bYL7lIRWTx7J0K-vq-uopwTDANPZTLhOTAoKJKYFgwxEllxP89FQAxbKvpoJ092Yt5CbqZRTAgd3Fe005xp4kxxQ9OGyACnuKM9kc_ifybl428A_PmeuqPRZRxph0dpuzgueh1qen2d7q8vmGNX7MjQlI8M7rGNokt08lmxQe5r_otnVq1ZTHlqaHHtoRLn6FfC8bZSigTezmRD7Whb_PC32vZvm-Y8l-bY4h2YlXVkNGub6bL7S6892ylW05ZznhOFu4gHAIsT-LHYqEoTMV1GA2ifUi8Fn4yaFWdxlzQHxgfI%3D) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. Team -- _We need your help._

Preparations to flip the Senate are already underway, but we can _only_ make the Senate blue again if we hear from top Democrats in Pennsylvania -- including you!

We need to know what works, what doesn't, and what you're seeing in your own community. Your guidance will be crucial from start to finish, and the decisions we make _right now_ will have a massive impact as we get ready to defeat MAGA extremism.

**The Senior Leadership Team needs to hear from you by midnight, so please -- answer our Post-Election Strategy Survey immediately to help inform our future campaign strategy.**

**Here's your personal link:[www.dscc.org/PostElectionSurvey#dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/20737?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241208-InputNeeded-PostElectionStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241208-InputNeeded-PostElectionStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=19091%2E9716520%2E8V0TYB)**

Team DSCC

Businessman and 'Shark Tank' star Kevin O'Leary faced-off-with Washington Post columnist Catherine Rampell over whether _**[Trump's tariff agenda will actually work.](https://substack.com/redirect/9a4a2300-bdef-4b9b-87e3-5d65a3bf4c43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
O'Leary puts her right in her place! _**[Watch them clash below:](https://substack.com/redirect/9a4a2300-bdef-4b9b-87e3-5d65a3bf4c43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9a4a2300-bdef-4b9b-87e3-5d65a3bf4c43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9a4a2300-bdef-4b9b-87e3-5d65a3bf4c43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I would like to go to DEFCON 1 with China. Tariffs 400%!" O'Leary told the CNN panel. "Bring the Supreme Leader to Washington or crush his economy."
Rampell interrupted, saying that the U.S. has already tried similar strategies in the past to no avail.
"No we have not!" O'Leary returned fire. "Not one administration since 1999 has dealt with them."
Trump promised in a Truth Social post that he would levy an additional 10% tariff on China on top of other existing tariffs, as well as a _**[25% tariff on Canada and Mexico.](https://substack.com/redirect/3d51c8ec-da48-40ae-ad69-d71c3ace44ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **_
"I have had many talks with China about the massive amounts of drugs, in particular Fentanyl, being sent into the United States - But to no avail," Trump's social media post read. "Representatives of China told me that they would institute their maximum penalty, that of death, for any drug dealers caught doing this but, unfortunately, they never followed through, and drugs are pouring into our Country, mostly through Mexico, at levels never seen before."
"Until such time as they stop, we will be charging China an additional 10% Tariff, above any additional Tariffs, on all of their many products coming into the United States of America," he continued.
| | POLL
---
Will's Trump's tariff's work to control China?
| [Yes, we need strong negotiating](https://substack..jl8i1HkQBBeeM_pRbI-BrPnz4WWYKX5vsTXmMBpylH4?)
---
[Maybe, i'm not sure about tariffs](https://substack..rGONEq_2flDtkoPIIyv4VZM8J2DAeTl25ghxk2q37Mw?)
[No, they will backfire](https://substack..eDtCfCcfSMdj4QNmnCfd1QWoqSAjPWdnrQ3qHMzkN7g?)

# Guy walks through liberal Washington DC wearing MAGA hat the day after the election - Watch what happens next...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7d79984a-41da-4abe-b506-665e3e72e653?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller walked through the streets of Washington D.C. wearing a MAGA hat the day after Trump's big win.
He did not receive a very warm welcome to say the least!
_**[Watch it right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/51c19ee2-56d8-4c0c-a20e-1012a1db4a91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

# _**Southern Fried Justice:**_ Daddy's SPOILED PRINCESS thinks she is above the law, learns lesson the hard way!
Police body cam footage shows the _**[arrest of a young female](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4f0333-0d7c-48f2-8a5f-aef928f7e9b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ from a poolside bar in Key West, Florida on March 23, 2024.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4f0333-0d7c-48f2-8a5f-aef928f7e9b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The female suspect was drinking at a bar with a group of her friends, when the bar staff asked the entire group to leave for noncompliance with the establishment's rules.
The young partiers refused to leave and officers were called to the scene. Several members of the group disputed the bar's decision and the situation escalated.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8025df49-f757-4ed0-b5c6-27f068433caa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**[Officers gave the group an ultimatum to leave the bar](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4f0333-0d7c-48f2-8a5f-aef928f7e9b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ within two minutes or they would arrest them, and although some in the group tried to cooperate with the officer's orders, the female suspect felt she had pretty privilege and was above the law. She could even be heard saying that she could not be arrested, moments before she was arrested.
_**[Watch justice be served:](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4f0333-0d7c-48f2-8a5f-aef928f7e9b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4f0333-0d7c-48f2-8a5f-aef928f7e9b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Dec 8 | | | | | | | | | | | Businessman and 'Shark Tank' star Kevin O'Leary faced-off-with Washington Post columnist Catherine Rampell over whether O'Leary puts her right in her place! "I would like to go to DEFCON 1 with China. Tariffs 400%!" O'Leary told the CNN panel. "Bring the Supreme Leader to Washington or crush his economy." Rampell interrupted, saying that the U.S. has already tried similar strategies in the past to no avail. "No we have not!" O'Leary returned fire. "Not one administration since 1999 has dealt with them." Trump promised in a Truth Social post that he would levy an additional 10% tariff on China on top of other existing tariffs, as well as a "I have had many talks with China about the massive amounts of drugs, in particular Fentanyl, being sent into the United States - But to no avail," Trump's social media post read. "Representatives of China told me that they would institute their maximum penalty, that of death, for any drug dealers caught doing this but, unfortunately, they never followed through, and drugs are pouring into our Country, mostly through Mexico, at levels never seen before." "Until such time as they stop, we will be charging China an additional 10% Tariff, above any additional Tariffs, on all of their many products coming into the United States of America," he continued. | | POLL Will's Trump's tariff's work to control China? | ? ? ? # **[Kari Lake](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ae8a6fe5a62b472696087f800303658c&_e=sn2dRk4if4dYQGnTYnHE-dedFb6866pFBOwXXaruKrRR6zuMmCLqfQd6nHcLYPR5HVHMouSQ-QRqU1eoolCJAMKjJrYpqOg10SgPCpb2zx8IFO39sX8bLWwijNFSoPOFvDfBWQ2oGV3yzCu2hXi1DjeJMT9ht6BMPvD9yjNRxEQ6xaHs800mrReuuYPiMeqniV-biznav_NubjcYPeNKml0ltz8R3nGso42USp63Enij7wKCdWMAu8H-gxUlvY0LuE-5730MCM0BHn_RgGuoQjTEVX3IM4yTsxjlKzl41_S-O_io7Mvaei5g0PdplOsHzyRaVGS8OD-aOIE722AJ1e6TCJFJw8uXt6MGAeZ0CbxGaw432gUm3XsTUr4_Ext49v2KPKBurJlOEUzEfALzRJZPfZf3twB1L8otn7pYMcA%3D)**

Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ae8a6fe5a62b472696087f800303658c&_e=sn2dRk4if4dYQGnTYnHE-dedFb6866pFBOwXXaruKrRR6zuMmCLqfQd6nHcLYPR5HVHMouSQ-QRqU1eoolCJAMKjJrYpqOg10SgPCpb2zx8IFO39sX8bLWwijNFSoPOFvDfBWQ2oGV3yzCu2hXi1DjeJMT9ht6BMPvD9yjNRxEQ6xaHs800mrReuuYPiMeqniV-biznav_NubjcYPeNKml0ltz8R3nGso42USp63Enij7wKCdWMAu8H-gxUlvY0LuE-5730MCM0BHn_RgGuoQvGZUA5LGwYmFbqqxiynvJ54fEIk1KKOZfZC23NTEimlfQ8eDIxePf3VGIg2r3pd76TvFGy6TNvLZwF5HBehNGNMg6xcbQm359myaoI0AX_qKEgxOmYsy0O5kLeJPYFvp8lE_id4iT12CmqNKbHUYgk%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ae8a6fe5a62b472696087f800303658c&_e=sn2dRk4if4dYQGnTYnHE-dedFb6866pFBOwXXaruKrRR6zuMmCLqfQd6nHcLYPR5HVHMouSQ-QRqU1eoolCJAMKjJrYpqOg10SgPCpb2zx8IFO39sX8bLWwijNFSoPOFvDfBWQ2oGV3yzCu2hXi1DjeJMT9ht6BMPvD9yjNRxEQ6xaHs800mrReuuYPiMeqniV-biznav_NubjcYPeNKml0ltz8R3nGso42USp63Enij7wKCdWMAu8H-gxUlvY0LuE-5730MCM0BHn_RgGuoQu4T81131F32ynYrH4PaA0RZhorbPBbosV3l2isSgX5iNvLbRWq-bwH8Ao5WdrNlS49qv5lHMPEBjWy_u1jn7xWOsLhglOtOrsg_TyX4cRURKsHmo--cGRALuxDSjQylq4gfVMFB3x2KtIixcLTR-HU%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ae8a6fe5a62b472696087f800303658c&_e=sn2dRk4if4dYQGnTYnHE-dedFb6866pFBOwXXaruKrRR6zuMmCLqfQd6nHcLYPR5HVHMouSQ-QRqU1eoolCJAMKjJrYpqOg10SgPCpb2zx8IFO39sX8bLWwijNFSoPOFvDfBWQ2oGV3yzCu2hXi1DjeJMT9ht6BMPvD9yjNRxEQ6xaHs800mrReuuYPiMeqniV-biznav_NubjcYPeNKml0ltz8R3nGso42USp63Enij7wKCdWMAu8H-gxUlvY0LuE-5730MCM0BHn_RgGuoQix4AauVGevHNvZXB10qGCXYnOP5gAJ1Z406Bhm3CxXDUJMLAvRIaqqgKA6cwA4UWfoPBqvI42EdPWRNebPsqFd-YKhYvctwRJuqJbkzbaAN_iBym4y6Z5FG9ZRNI_DNj_7H1-_i8CZDN1X_avNcWvo%3D)

body:
---
$3. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee as we rebuild after a tough election. If that’s all you need to hear, use this link to contribute to the Democratic Party today: [**https://democrats.org/go/DNC**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241208_2371_fr&refcode2=2374_22930333__xrLtM&akid=2374%2E22930333%2E_xrLtM) Otherwise, here’s why this ask is so important: $3 because when Trump takes office, he will issue a flurry of executive orders aimed at weakening our democracy and attacking our freedoms. We must be prepared from day one. $3 because this moment requires a strong, robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party. $3 because the DNC is the organization best positioned to move urgent resources to the places they’re needed most as we take on the fights ahead. We will put your contribution to work ensuring we do not lose the organizing and tech infrastructure we’ve built up all across the country. We will put it toward organizing against destructive legislation and executive orders. And we will put it toward winning local and statewide races next year, taking back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. [**So please, contribute $3 directly to the Democratic Party today. We will put your contribution to work immediately:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241208_2371_fr&refcode2=2374_22930333__xrLtM&akid=2374%2E22930333%2E_xrLtM) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241208_2371_fr&refcode2=2374_22930333__xrLtM&akid=2374%2E22930333%2E_xrLtM)**

body:

**TIM WALZ TOLD YOU** the Electoral College “needs to go”!

**PETE BUTTIGIEG TOLD YOU** “America would be better off if we got rid of the Electoral College.”

**But you STILL haven’t signed our emergency petition to abolish the Electoral College?!**

name: POMPEO
subject: Communist China's been put on notice: Republicans are in charge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
Sign your name and join the petition!

| |
---
| | |
**A new era of American greatness has dawned, but our work is far from over.**

As we celebrate President Donald J. Trump's historic re-election victory and the Republican Party's sweeping wins across the nation, we must remain vigilant against threats to our sovereignty.

Communist China's covert campaign to buy up strategic U.S. land, often near our most critical military bases, poses a grave risk to our national security.

But with a Republican-led government, we have a unique opportunity to take decisive action. **That is why I've just launched an official GOP petition asking Congress to BAN Communist China from buying American farmland, and I urge you to join the fight.**

Friend, with a strong show of grassroots support, we can ensure that our elected leaders prioritize America's interests and protect our land from Beijing's influence. **[So please, I'm respectfully asking you to sign the petition right here, RIGHT NOW, and join the chorus of Patriots demanding action.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7a44501e29824f0c9f7e7e279f29ac10&_e=Noo68ln_RV9c6uM9uADKHQjzAmW22QbmhboA4BmihU-0oj6kC9XqTZLr_w2TW3TejQh-6MVDZm8GNhuw53WiKCSuLnMy_m3g8OzJ8eyskEqruMi8l5lydGniVu57W6HYc2FT_V0cTVSA0-upX0kMy4erJ5-w9bIVWR7LNRjxqVc0AgzRBKO8nhH6k2oZlD0Y7AM0G7M_nomFZ6hZoELQ4Fzwsve4ze9Ok2oOLKZ6THWAUTOFNylN2k0YPI9w5Fgqn_OeZkR6JVxSuOJSZYTbKM2yuQG5eWuMnZYMRrWpjrvR3AqOGPYG1zPsW3_bq3e7RuRLcaBM4Wj--qEAWeNZ_d5Gdyzzfzswif6zueLoiP0jFUQA742v0sgJI85xmbAnLCZlTHQbUYtsD7spSlRrcGwj3JHlTlUL8QuQZnU14no%3D "So please, I’m respectfully asking you to sign the petition right here, RIGHT NOW, and join the chorus of Patriots demanding action.")**
